Friends, I want to take a moment today to thank you for your generous support as we faced our final pre-primary FEC deadline this past Wednesday. Because of you, we were able to reach and exceed our goal – keeping us on track to enter these final weeks of this primary strong.

Friends, I want to take a moment today to _thank you_ for your generous support as we faced our final pre-primary FEC deadline this past Wednesday. Because of you, we were able to reach and exceed our goal – keeping us on track to enter these final weeks of this primary strong. **We’re so grateful for every member of this team who has supported our campaign, and it’s thanks to this support that – in 18 days – we’re going to be in a position to win this race. ** So thank you for stepping up at each and every call to action. Your support truly makes a difference and brings us one step closer to delivering progress for families like yours and mine. Thank you again friend. We’re almost there! _Janelle_ **P.S. Ballots are being sent out _now_ and Oregonians are starting to vote in this ultra-competitive primary election.** **[Our race is still neck-and-neck, so if you’re able, can you chip in to help us reach voters before they cast their ballots (as early as this week!)?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84283932/471033683/476240567?refcode=em_fr_2024.05.03_b1_jb_all-nd&amount=10&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDEzZGE5NDUtYTkwOS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=w2_dzGmjY6kxb1eWe692RbmQqhFDtu2h4ve6Kyj0Tr8=)**

body:
|

Hey folks, do you have any tattoos?

I ask because I have this one that was inspired by one of my heroes, the late Congressman John Lewis.

Before I show you, I want to make a promise – when I'm elected to serve Maryland's 3rd district, I will support the John Lewis Voting Rights Act from Day 1.

[**_Part of protecting our democracy means strengthening our voting rights laws so more people around the country are participating in elections. **The Black heart, that represents the struggle of Black people.** It's a struggle every Black American faces throughout their life. And being a Black man, running for Congress, that's the ultimate sign I've persevered through the struggles.

**The blood tears are for all the bloodshed Black Americans cast,** especially from historic events like Bloody Sunday. Hundreds of Black heroes, like John Lewis, took beatings that day – and some even laid down their lives so that people like me could have a voice in our democracy.

**And the red lightning symbolizes the chaos** that ensues when you get into good trouble. Because like John Lewis said, "get in good trouble, necessary trouble, and help redeem the soul of America."

**_It's because of my heroes that I have the opportunity to run for Congress and be one of the loudest voices fighting for our democracy. I'm following down the path they carved for Black Americans._**

clean_body: | = Hey folks, do you have any tattoos? I ask because I have this one that was inspired by one of my heroes, the late Congressman John Lewis. Before I show you, I want to make a promise – when I'm elected to serve Maryland's 3rd district, I will support the John Lewis Voting Rights Act from Day 1. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = So, back to my tattoo. 😂 = The Black heart, that represents the struggle of Black people. It's a struggle every Black American faces throughout their life. And being a Black man, running for Congress, that's the ultimate sign I've persevered through the struggles. The blood tears are for all the bloodshed Black Americans cast, especially from historic events like Bloody Sunday. Hundreds of Black heroes, like John Lewis, took beatings that day – and some even laid down their lives so that people like me could have a voice in our democracy. And the red lightning symbolizes the chaos that ensues when you get into good trouble. Because like John Lewis said, "get in good trouble, necessary trouble, and help redeem the soul of America." It's because of my heroes that I have the opportunity to run for Congress and be one of the loudest voices fighting for our democracy. I'm following down the path they carved for Black Americans. = = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you! Harry Dunn = = | = Harry Dunn for Congress PO Box 1449 Columbia, MD 21044 United States | mailto:info@harrydunnforcongress.com Paid for by Harry Dunn for Congress

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: re: Trump’s rally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| **Friend, Donald Trump just held a massive MAGA rally right here in my mid-Michigan district.** His speech was full of division and lies, and it made one thing clear: Trump and the GOP will do whatever they think it takes to win in Michigan. [**So I’m asking for a donation today to win my tossup race that will decide control of Congress and defeat the MAGA GOP in Michigan:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/66988?t=6&akid=14085%2E878179%2Eb_ucw7)

Here’s what happened:

Trump praised his hand-picked Supreme Court for overturning _Roe v. Wade,_ giving states the opportunity to rip away abortion rights for millions of people. He doubled down on his claims that the 2020 election was rigged in Michigan. He even restated his plan for a new Muslim Ban.

His agenda is radical and dangerous – but it’s not just Trump. __All__ of my Republican opponents went out of their way to endorse, attend, and kiss his ring. If they win this House race, you can bet they’ll rubber-stamp his agenda in Congress, no matter what.

**Trump came to mid-Michigan because he sees it as his ticket back to the White House. And his MAGA allies know if they want to win back the House, they need to win our swing district and defeat me.**

Look, I won’t let them win. We are building the strongest coalition imaginable to fight back, rise above their divisive rhetoric and harmful policies, and win this tossup House race for Democrats. [**As Trump and the MAGA GOP make Michigan their top target and spend millions of dollars in our district, I need your continued support. Will you chip in $10 today to help us fight back and win?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/66988?t=7&akid=14085%2E878179%2Eb_ucw7) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Kristen McDonald Rivet and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/66989?t=8&akid=14085%2E878179%2Eb_ucw7)
---

Thanks,
Kristen

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=14085%2E878179%2Eb_ucw7). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=14085%2E878179%2Eb_ucw7).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=14085%2E878179%2Eb_ucw7) to request fewer emails. By supporting our work, you are supporting state Democrats who will fight to BLOCK the GOP’s dangerous agenda and PROTECT your fundamental freedoms. ➡️The DLCC is the only party organization dedicated to electing Democrats to statehouses nationwide. name: Steve Scalise
subject: This conservative patriot is needed in Washington.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | It’s House Majority Leader Steve Scalise. Peter, I’m starting to get nervous.

My good friend, Senator Rick Scott, is running in one of the closest Senate races in the country, and Democrats are spending millions to get rid of him.

**In 2018, he won by less than 1% of the vote. This year, it could be even closer**. They’re targeting his seat because he’s a top Trump ally in the Senate.

**[**Can you send campaign reinforcements to his campaign?**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=bf59ce29c73048e6bd3d160140924e68&_e=2gGZ7gMIxG8wMW4cb7w6qvl3Psljmu0dCpLJ7PF4omQVXRRdqOit6XH7HS4_RyyHPXrlfRgubMqlFsAb2VYmf2PORVgZ372yYW_ms9MdT2OErR-VGJUzWvqGYO28tEndAXsrDe-QuRun1LOeB3EICiZM-J09fvcBTy3NGptLgTfvvyBODMLn5vB8b3xEI2b5Bv_EheQa-ObHhVTn-NxQqlhlBh_GhzEvDzXg0q6oBrDSQvlxDZVnKACv3txCYsfE5e7zdZ0zrwz9lFXBAzJ982KnbItZRmQVR-bTca9sdhd4LhRx-WiQVhIbbkwQGk7xXzTPYGwlyMACi2rturAMMfFrruEhY_uktKKybI6F05TOSb3gsmCTifPngiunHhss)**

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: What are your priorities?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84285102/471042340/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20240503_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWI2YjIzMi1hYjA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rc6-_YQBuh_IXvf_CnP7WmvjZNsIJ4U9gOfaoB8b-Nc=&emci=eb7262f6-a309-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=65b6b232-ab09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=252045)
---
Folks — all of the issues that matter most to working families in New Mexico and across the country are on the ballot this year. The future of our public lands, reproductive rights, access to affordable healthcare, Social Security, and _more_ are on the line. **These are just a few of the priorities this grassroots team has told me matter to you before.** I’m grateful I can travel around New Mexico and talk to folks about what’s on their mind in person. I wish I could meet with each and every one of you. But since that’s not possible, my campaign put together a Priorities Survey so you can tell me what issues matter most to you as we get closer to the election. **[Can you spend just a few minutes filling out our Priorities Survey? Your voice is integral to this campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84285103/471042341/-1146280793?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20240503_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWI2YjIzMi1hYjA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rc6-_YQBuh_IXvf_CnP7WmvjZNsIJ4U9gOfaoB8b-Nc=&emci=eb7262f6-a309-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=65b6b232-ab09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=252045)** | [TAKE OUR SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84285104/471042342/-1146280793?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20240503_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWI2YjIzMi1hYjA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rc6-_YQBuh_IXvf_CnP7WmvjZNsIJ4U9gOfaoB8b-Nc=&emci=eb7262f6-a309-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=65b6b232-ab09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=252045)

Martin

# Meeting May 6th
---
---
|
---
# NEWS
My Friends,
I am honored to address you today with an important announcement. As we gear up for the upcoming CRA Convention and navigate through travel challenges this weekend, I regret to inform you that our regular meeting for this month stands postponed. However, I have good news! Derrick and I, in collaboration with the South Bay CRA, are excited to invite you to a special event on Monday, May 6th.
This event holds immense significance as it will equip you with the knowledge and tools needed to exercise your voting rights effectively at the forthcoming California Republican Party (CAGOP/CRP) Convention in May. Your voice matters, and this is an opportunity for you to be empowered and make a tangible difference.
Join us on May 6th and be a part of this transformative experience. Together, let's pave the way for a brighter future for our community and our great state of California.
Please RSVP at
nenarenae2@gmail.com
Thank you, and let's move forward together, Nena R. Gates
**The Address for the May 6th Meeting is 20620 Leapwood Ave, Suite G, Carson, CA** _**_
## The Address for the May 6th Meeting is 20620 Leapwood Ave, Suite G, Carson, CA

## The Border War
---
My fellow citizens, Today, I write you with a heavy heart, burdened by the stark realities I witnessed firsthand at our nation's border. I embarked on a journey fueled by duty and curiosity, to delve into the depths of the border conflict that has gripped our nation's attention. What I encountered there was beyond comprehension, beyond what any of us could have imagined. In my pursuit of truth, I stumbled upon scenes that shook me to my core. I could not turn away, for it is our duty as leaders, as stewards of this great nation, to confront the harsh realities that confront us. With profound urgency, I present to you a brief glimpse into the depths of this crisis, a testament to the importance of addressing these challenges head-on. I implore each and every one of you to bear witness to this footage, to let it serve as a call to action, a rallying cry for compassion, for empathy, and for decisive action. Together, we can and we must confront the challenges that lie ahead, for the sake of our nation, for the sake of our humanity. Please, click the link below to view the video, and join me in the journey. I will be returning next week to spend a few days.
---

What I encountered there was beyond comprehension, beyond what any of us could have imagined. In my pursuit of truth, I stumbled upon scenes that shook me to my core. I could not turn away, for it is our duty as leaders, as stewards of this great nation, to confront the harsh realities that confront us. With profound urgency, I present to you a brief glimpse into the depths of this crisis, a testament to the importance of addressing these challenges head-on. I implore each and every one of you to bear witness to this footage, to let it serve as a call to action, a rallying cry for compassion, for empathy, and for decisive action. Together, we can and we must confront the challenges that lie ahead, for the sake of our nation, for the sake of our humanity. Please, click the link below to view the video, and join me in the journey. I will be returning next week to spend a few days. | Click to Watch Add my Social Media | After my Social Media pages all got nuked during the last few years I'm trying to build my pages back up. Please follow and share my socials. My name is Lily Tang Williams.

I grew up in communist China, where I was a slave to Mao Zedong's rule. Extremely poor living conditions, food rationing, social chaos, and Communist indoctrination were the norm.......

........ never again.

[](http://links.libertysociety.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=727060f5d2ec40218e649828c5cd64b0&_e=Xm1-dPvnrHJEx-95YeG4oHmMWhoKScxO7o2bIhApjTX__-GVUlGNBW3vQx34Bd_QY4w7j5WboU4VMK5qnQPXFeMlvP3b6oNrK2R6IYCRHlX35Aqs8mXsvZKYGZT6d55O4MM1a6ltxE35Vb-FpuGtB89eBHXH0iOZnLikd7LE1eXPfgljbX5QH6zCyW2AZWnCtd6dP4tR8rDBXBLP7Thq2ZHhMAOoninEtrW9sNH7nuGLjATvab2UOT5kUkr4alKf9T8o5WFgDr4z0C2CC_5Gdoe0hhTkW8X8MdYbblKHxGrs9m5_6k0qIVTwJKp5I7r-_ub7tMQd1QzJQf3qHKzcz7DrXoev_8RMsWhQZUS5E0v2w9eFM3RHD1B6iP6FOeTi-_y9cAHMIzJAX4fF2O_Zzg%3D%3D)
Today, I'm a proud American citizen, wife, mother, and proponent of freedom.

America is the greatest country in the world, and we MUST fight to keep it free.

If you agree, support my campaign for Congress **[HERE.](http://links.libertysociety.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=727060f5d2ec40218e649828c5cd64b0&_e=Xm1-dPvnrHJEx-95YeG4oHmMWhoKScxO7o2bIhApjTX__-GVUlGNBW3vQx34Bd_QY4w7j5WboU4VMK5qnQPXFeMlvP3b6oNrK2R6IYCRHlX35Aqs8mXsvZKYGZT6d55O4MM1a6ltxE35Vb-FpuGtB89eBHXH0iOZnLikd7LE1eXPfgljbX5QH6zCyW2AZWnCtd6dP4tR8rDBXBLP7Thq2RpiD77iXXb4B28AIouwO9El4xl14VpJelhKa0VQdR6Bi2B_cd8BMzSYLbSqjTZxkjor-LOdjS80JpA4gtOqPAbjQ7HTc9uA28DomL2suwcbLbwIApabQjzdOlkbHQhb5WrkxFYL4vhf8xL7voFbjZ4CioKZ1TAENQyMsWnwPOXjFZnxtWzHEet6D9u1fgiw_HtTGEBVkTJxgDntaq9Mq6E%3D)**

_- Lily Tang Williams_

**_I fear that the country I love is becoming like the country I left. That's why I am running for Congress. It's time for the majority to speak up and defend our country from the radical left and keep the American Dream alive for our children._******

name: Debbie
subject: Rick Scott knows he can't win if he tells the truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
Friend, I need you to hear this:
| | |
---
Listen, I need you to hear this: My opponent, Rick Scott, has already spent over $4 MILLION running attack ads.
Not only has he spent millions, he's calling me a liar every chance he gets. He just went on the record to say that I lied about his stance on abortion.**Let me make this clear:** _Rick Scott co-sponsored a 15-week national abortion ban._ **I am unapologetically pro-choice, and his accusations don't scare me. I will always fight to protect reproductive freedom.** His spending and his blatant attempts to smear me and this campaign might look like a sign of strength at first glance. But that couldn't be further from the truth.
**In reality, Rick Scott is terrified. Honestly, I don't blame him — polling shows our team in the lead, and experts at _CBS_ just ranked Florida as one of the most likely Senate seats to flip blue.**

Scott knows that he's more vulnerable than ever before. Last time around, he had to outspend his Democratic opponent by $50 MILLION to just barely win this seat — that race came down to just 10,033 votes. Now, he's trying to pull the same trick again in a desperate last-ditch effort to save his campaign. We can't let him get away with it: **[_So, friend, if you have anything extra to spare today, will you chip in to help us win in Florida and defend Democrats' Senate majority?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84285239/471057771/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1190-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTI2YjI1NDYtYjAwOS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WeGXLsVzNqjMv2Pz_TyQY1uBkEVT_Cmv6bft42NPaYA=)**

| | [DONATE $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84285241/471057773/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=jtk1190-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTI2YjI1NDYtYjAwOS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WeGXLsVzNqjMv2Pz_TyQY1uBkEVT_Cmv6bft42NPaYA=)

| | [DONATE $50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84285242/471057774/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=jtk1190-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTI2YjI1NDYtYjAwOS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WeGXLsVzNqjMv2Pz_TyQY1uBkEVT_Cmv6bft42NPaYA=)
---
| | [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84285243/471057775/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1190-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTI2YjI1NDYtYjAwOS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WeGXLsVzNqjMv2Pz_TyQY1uBkEVT_Cmv6bft42NPaYA=)
---
Listen, friend, we cannot let these attacks go unanswered. He is lying, and he is spreading disinformation.
Rick Scott knows that he can't win this race by telling the truth about his record. He built his fortune as the CEO of a hospital chain convicted of what the Justice Department called the largest Medicare fraud scheme ever at the time. He made off with millions, pled the Fifth, and faced no consequences. Now, he's pushing a far-right agenda that would ban abortions, raise taxes on working families, and end Social Security and Medicare.
My story is different. As a teen immigrant from Ecuador, I fought hard to create my own American dream. In high school, I worked early morning shifts to help my family afford rent for our one room apartment.
I studied hard to earn a scholarship that made college possible for me and dedicated my career to public service. Eventually, I ran for Congress, flipped a battleground district blue, and became the first South American immigrant elected to the House. In Congress, I fought tirelessly to expand Medicare access, lower the cost of living, end gun violence, and protect families like yours.
**I've spent my life giving back to the communities that gave me so much and fighting to protect the opportunities that made my story possible. Rick Scott has spent his career getting rich and leaving working families behind. That's why I'm running for Senate to defeat him — because Floridians will suffer if he wins six more years.**
**But every day that we allow these ads to go unanswered, his lies and disinformation are reaching more and more voters, undermining our message, and jeopardizing our campaign. We've got to fight back, and I can't do that without your help:[So I'm personally asking — if you've made it this far, will you please chip in $5 to help us tell the truth about Rick Scott's record and flip Florida blue? With your help, this race is truly ours to win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84285244/471057776/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1190-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTI2YjI1NDYtYjAwOS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WeGXLsVzNqjMv2Pz_TyQY1uBkEVT_Cmv6bft42NPaYA=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84285245/471057777/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1190-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTI2YjI1NDYtYjAwOS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WeGXLsVzNqjMv2Pz_TyQY1uBkEVT_Cmv6bft42NPaYA=)
---
With immense gratitude,

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
|
* * *
| | | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84285246/471057778/-31196584?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1190-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTI2YjI1NDYtYjAwOS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WeGXLsVzNqjMv2Pz_TyQY1uBkEVT_Cmv6bft42NPaYA=)
---
Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/7CGTHFDMeUWW_Wz2yFDujA2?unsubscribedata=QJFgv7USNcVxwnUcB7icTV57ocpBI4ipBaXTmSFHh36RlJp9MRElrmF3R7eR419IyJT5pdk84YoCYpWG0rjTjvq%2FNSxz31kptzhI2Aqe3cUzZkMiEeYL%2ByVPBY2YKye9FAlswFkH8W5sRyVhvr8GTWZ6jksWQcaHUuiKtg72StsGqBZuRSAme4BDcUIjwKxMQLFtdzrU6iHmrGynw1r1ONnsf75AITnbz3%2BF6O1%2Bc%2BE1hAw1tpoSXFxvqH0WyY424mT0hXqkB4UdWzW0beTaPyuZEuRASyrN6x%2B8wk7XIbFAjj6bq%2BcGP6xmd1Oq6446jaQJLokNYDnMLOnXTlIIegyhsIX6YwnazEMwI41ZGkBAN9cp4%2BVwYZOSIObuhaH7MkwyULzFzMuQVlLeHQqmCiaBb5wPGMu5KDcwZipYPqRvUfPQwDTcPuBsqsHs2Pkn) from Debbie's email list.

As a teen immigrant from Ecuador, I fought hard to create my own American dream. In high school, I worked early morning shifts to help my family afford rent for our one room apartment. I studied hard to earn a scholarship that made college possible for me and dedicated my career to public service. Eventually, I ran for Congress, flipped a battleground district blue, and became the first South American immigrant elected to the House. In Congress, I fought tirelessly to expand Medicare access, lower the cost of living, end gun violence, and protect families like yours. I've spent my life giving back to the communities that gave me so much and fighting to protect the opportunities that made my story possible. Rick Scott has spent his career getting rich and leaving working families behind. That's why I'm running for Senate to defeat him — because Floridians will suffer if he wins six more years. But every day that we allow these ads to go unanswered, his lies and disinformation are reaching more and more voters, undermining our message, and jeopardizing our campaign. We've got to fight back, and I can't do that without your help:= | | = With immense gratitude, Debbie Mucarsel-Powell | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: Lucas Kunce HQ
subject: This could change EVERYTHING in Missouri’s U.S. Senate race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Peter,
This could change EVERYTHING in Missouri’s U.S. Senate race.
Missourians for Constitutional Freedom just submitted over 380,000 signatures to get abortion on the ballot in Missouri this year — more than double what they were required to collect, from voters of all parties all across the state.
**Josh Hawley will share a ballot with abortion rights this November.** And thanks to his uniquely terrible record, it’s not going to be easy for him.
**[CHIP IN NOW: DEFEAT HAWLEY](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49484?refcode=em20240503-5434&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5434%2E614464%2ExE2hO2)**
**FIRST:** Hawley built his career on attacking reproductive freedom. He was part of the _Hobby Lobby_ case that tried to restrict access to birth control. And he later led the charge to overturn Roe v. Wade — which resulted in Missouri’s extreme and total abortion ban.
**THEN:** Hawley was exposed for his corrupt crusade to ban the most commonly used abortion pill in all 50 states. _Right now,_ the Supreme Court is considering arguments made earlier this year in the mifepristone case — led by Hawley’s wife and originally decided by a campaign donor Hawley made a federal judge.
**NOW:** Hawley’s in SERIOUS trouble. He knows Missourians will vote to protect their freedom and their families — just like they have by approving measures to expand Medicaid, raise the minimum wage, and legalize weed in recent elections.
**[CHIP IN NOW: DEFEAT HAWLEY](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49484?refcode=em20240503-5434&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5434%2E614464%2ExE2hO2)**
Hawley was already the most vulnerable GOP U.S. Senator up for re-election this November — with approval ratings lower than Ted Cruz in Texas and Rick Scott in Florida — but now, he’s vulnerable for a whole different reason.
**Voters in red states across the country have been turning out BIG to support pro-freedom initiatives like the one going on the ballot in Missouri this year.**
So if we’re able to reach Missouri voters with the truth about Josh Hawley’s record on reproductive freedom between now and November 5, we have a real chance to elect Lucas Kunce, defeat Josh Hawley, and restore abortion rights in Missouri. **But we won’t be able to do it without your help, Peter.**
**[So please, will you help us take advantage of this historic moment by rushing a donation of any amount toward our grassroots campaign to defeat Josh Hawley this year? Every dollar will help us get Lucas and his message of taking back power for everyday people in front of Missouri voters.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49484?refcode=em20240503-5434&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=5434%2E614464%2ExE2hO2)**

name: Patriot Sentinel
subject: The Patriot Sentinel
body:
| |
---
|
# MAY MORTGAGE RATES TO STAY ABOVE 7% AS HOPE DIMS FOR FED CUTS
---
| | [](https://109073.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=ym3z7obdk3vvoalkw1&linkid=0&link=ca3a94e915fd4c92b8ffc83f22a85b77)
---
**Mortgage rates will probably remain above 7% in May as inflation resists the Federal Reserve's efforts to bring it under control. It left rates unchanged at the conclusion of its April 30-May 1 meeting, and seemed as frustrated by inflation and high interest rates as home buyers are.** The Fed is trying to wrestle the inflation rate down to 2%. The central bank made progress toward that goal in the last half of 2023, and investors rang in the new year with hopes of a Fed rate cut by spring. But the inflation rate sprang a surprise: It hardly budged in the first three months of the year. Investors have convinced themselves that inflation will stick around for a while. Mortgage rates have moved higher as a consequence. The 30-year mortgage leapt more than a quarter of a percentage point in April. Mortgage rates are unlikely to fall significantly until inflation wanes and the Fed signals that it's getting ready to announce a rate cut. It's unlikely that we’ll see such a turnaround by Memorial Day.
| [READ MORE](https://109073.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=ym3z7obdk3vvoalkw1&linkid=1&link=454b898daeb04103b2ffcd8e9bc6f3d9)
---
|
---
|
# AS TEXAS' BORDER SECURITY EFFORTS SUCCEED, CALIFORNIA 'NEW EPICENTER' OF CRISIS
---
| | [](https://109073.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=ym3z7obdk3vvoalkw1&linkid=2&link=334d8e0ac0a84c00b8f0416c6dcf363c)
---
**With the success of Texas' border security mission Operation Lone Star pushing human trafficking efforts by Mexican cartels further west, southern California is "the new epicenter" of illegal immigration, officials say.** “San Diego is the new epicenter for migrants and illegal immigration,” San Diego County Supervisor Jim Desmond said again this week as record numbers of illegal border crossers continue to pour into California. He made a similar claim two weeks ago when the county was overwhelmed by thousands of illegal border crossers being dropped off on street corners after a U.S. Customs and Border Protection processing center was closed by the Biden administration.
| [READ MORE](https://109073.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=ym3z7obdk3vvoalkw1&linkid=3&link=6ca623df1d7e481d9cfcb4cb07d0824c)
---
|
---
|
# AMERICANS LESS CONFIDENT ABOUT ECONOMY, POLL SHOWS
---
| | [](https://109073.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=ym3z7obdk3vvoalkw1&linkid=4&link=bc69d06e1454450b8536a3931ae42537)
---
**Newly released survey data shows that Americans are less confident about the economy.** Gallup’s recently released economic confidence rating dropped from March to April as inflation remains elevated. Just after the polling was conducted from April 1-22, the federal government released underperforming Gross Domestic Product data. “This is the first time in five months that confidence has not seen a marginal improvement, and the first decline in economic confidence in the past seven months,” Gallup said.
| [READ MORE](https://109073.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=ym3z7obdk3vvoalkw1&linkid=5&link=4993035ddb6f4bec8475308996cfb9d7)
---
|
---
|
# SURVEY: WORKERS REALLY LOVE THE IDEA OF A FOUR-DAY WORK WEEK
---
| | [](https://109073.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=ym3z7obdk3vvoalkw1&linkid=6&link=3ff283ea4f54433c831a4eefc1d2f3b6)
---
**The idea of a four-day workweek is so popular with some workers that they’d be willing to take a pay cut to make it happen, according to a new survey.** The survey, which included 1,250 people who work full time, was conducted in April by Resume Builder, a career services company. It found that 8 in 10 workers would be excited to work 32 hours a week instead of 40 because they believe it would help them achieve better work-life balance, improve their health, mitigate burnout, be more productive and reduce commuting costs. The survey results suggest some workers feel pretty desperate for that better work experience. Even though nearly all the survey participants (94%) said they could do the same amount of work in fewer hours, about 21% said they would take a pay cut if it meant they could work the equivalent of one less day per week.
| [READ MORE](https://109073.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=ym3z7obdk3vvoalkw1&linkid=7&link=d59c276c38104905b3f75d67651f6370)
---
|
---
|
# U.S. SUPREME COURT MOVES GUN BAN CHALLENGES TO CONFERENCE
---
| | [](https://109073.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=ym3z7obdk3vvoalkw1&linkid=8&link=a77537188e0e4953a01c89fd0e9d77f9)
---
**Cases challenging gun and magazine bans, including several lawsuits from Illinois, have been distributed for an upcoming conference of the U.S. Supreme Court.** After Illinois banned more than 170 semi-automatic firearms and magazines over certain capacities in January 2023, federal lawsuits were filed. Appeals of separate preliminary actions against the law were shot down by the Seventh Circuit U.S. Court of Appeals last year. Plaintiffs in February asked the U.S. Supreme Court to intervene. On Tuesday, the U.S. Supreme Court moved several Illinois cases, and one challenging Maryland’s ban, to conference for May 16, 2024.
| [READ MORE](https://109073.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=ym3z7obdk3vvoalkw1&linkid=9&link=2ce90e1833c94c2297dda25bcab23e74)
---
|
---
|
# MOROCCO'S FARMING REVOLUTION: DEFYING DROUGHT WITH SCIENCE
---
| [](https://109073.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=ym3z7obdk3vvoalkw1&linkid=10&link=a01258d5bb044c80a5bd953e7b6b4595)
---
**In the heart of sun-soaked Morocco, scientists are cultivating a future where tough crops defy a relentless drought, now in its sixth year.** "Look at these beautiful ears of wheat," said Wuletaw Tadesse Degu, the head of wheat breeding at the International Center for Agricultural Research in Dry Areas (ICARDA). "The difference in quality between our field and others is striking," he said, pointing towards a lush expanse in Marchouch, south of Rabat, that stood in stark contrast with the barren lands elsewhere.
| [READ MORE](https://109073.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=ym3z7obdk3vvoalkw1&linkid=11&link=380d02328c79475a8a95877c3cbf3480)
---
| |
---

body:
Hey, it’s Vivek – never before in the history of the world has a truly great country fallen so far from grace in such a short time.

| |

---
| | | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9vegm7enna8s8inhga9b3c5une0e1emlvjnkfso_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3i6ao36c3h2bs "Vivek Ramaswamy")
---

My fellow Americans:

**This is Vivek Ramaswamy.** I hoped to email you on a lighter note but I didn't have another choice with everything happening right now.

The unholy alliance between Joe Biden, the corrupt Deep State, the DC Swamp, the Liberal Media, and the Radical Left Democrats is a national disgrace.

_**[We, the American People, will never forget what they've done to us. Luckily, we have a plan to stop these radicals who:](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zn21ku5752ha0trt2lnsqfbba5a3u7jkafbnhle0_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3i6ao36c3h2bs "We, the American People, will never forget what they’ve done to us. Luckily, we have a plan to stop these radicals who: ")**_

**- Desecrated** Easter Sunday with wokeism
**- Arrested** the leader of the Republican Party
**- Removed** Trump from the ballot in key states
**- Raided** Mar-a-Lago with armed agents
**- Censored** Conservative voices
**- Spied** on Catholic worshippers
**- Gutted** election integrity measures
**- Peddled** the Russia Hoax for years
**- Threw** open our border to illegals
**- Abandoned** Americans in Afghanistan
**- Caved** to the Chinese Communist Party
**- Moved** to pack the Supreme Court
**- Forced** propaganda into classrooms

And the list goes on and on and on! Never before in the history of the world has a truly great country fallen so far from grace in such a short time. If the Radical Left Democrats somehow win control of the White House, the Senate, and the House... America will be lost forever.

_I know this to be true. You know it too._ But when everything is on the line, moments like this separate the strong from the weak. And make no mistake - the future of our country hangs in the balance.

_**[That's why I'm partnering with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME. Together, we're rallying the STRONGEST American Patriots from across the country and building the biggest surge of grassroots support this country has ever seen.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrn197l3tjt5jlhq7or3cg91p6ur2bkqtmv1alc8_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3i6ao36c3h2bs "That’s why I’m partnering with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME. Together, we’re rallying the STRONGEST American Patriots from across the country and building the biggest surge of grassroots support this country has ever seen. ")**_

If you consider yourself a strong American Patriot - like the two of us do - I'm personally asking for your full commitment right here and right now.

The resources we collect today will help build the largest GOP voter turnout operation in history, deploy an army of volunteers in swing districts, run hard-hitting ads in battleground states, harvest ballots where it's legal, and help make this the most secure election EVER.

**THAT** is how Conservatives will win in a landslide...

**THAT** is how we take control of the White House, Senate, AND House...

**THAT** is how we stop the Radical Left Democrats from destroying America...

**THAT** is how we save our country as we know it...

**AND THAT** is how we send shockwaves through the heart of the Deep State, DC Swamp, and Liberal Media...

_**[I'm asking for 100% participation from every strong American Patriot reading this. If that's you, we need your help for the sake of the country. It's the only way we win. So what do you say? Can we count on you?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2za2rdjurp7b0m7ogh0vk1pnbkn3cska6j8jcskro_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3i6ao36c3h2bs "I’m asking for 100% participation from every strong American Patriot reading this. If that’s you, we need your help for the sake of the country. It’s the only way we win. So what do you say? Can we count on you? ")**_

If you can't afford to pitch in $100 or $50 right now, I understand completely. If you can spare JUST $5 or $10, it will still go a long way in the fight for what we believe in. I only ask that everyone contributes SOMETHING.

No matter what, I'm honored to fight alongside you.

Thanks for all you do,
Vivek Ramaswamy

It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else.

name: American Action News
subject: CIA Warns: Deadly Strike Coming To America’sPower Grid
body:
Can you keep your family safe when the lights go out?

**FORMER CIA OFFICIAL WARNS:** **DEADLY STRIKE COMING TO AMERICA'S POWER GRID** _**Can you keep your family safe when the lights go out?**_ **Former CIA Director stunned listeners with a stern warning...** An attack on America's infrastructure would _"blackout the national grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse"._ In fact, attacks on just nine of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in coast-to-coast black-outs, plunging millions into darkness for up to 18 months. Terrifying. **OUR GOVERNMENT IS WOEFULLY UNPREPARED** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers? YOU and your family. Imagine a blackout lasting months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6c4ucgbm1co78b84mhfklf5vdfgs31134j8u898_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3i66o74sdh2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **FOX & FRIENDS FEATURES BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR** [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrn948cm9cbaunk3vohes0onjnbprq79qctp3pdo_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3i66o74sdh2bs) Fox & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out of generators.**_ Then a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg8bfoohpa8pa0abn9d3j3ah2k1snde0p5dc4vgg_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3i66o74sdh2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. [**SEE THIS BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR IN ACTION!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zolemkj8dbloaldb80blgd9nf209eqe1vdqs87eg_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3i66o74sdh2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkh5mchhg60dd5pkjimoahpculo9l4l2lid9u3s0_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3i66o74sdh2bs) **YOUR LIFELINE: THE NEW & IMPROVED PATRIOT POWER GENERATOR 2000X** The Patriot Power Generator 2000X now has double the capacity, more power, and newly expandable than our previous best-selling model. It was designed to safely and dependably meet your power needs. And best of all, it harnesses the power of the sun to keep a state-of-the-art lithium-iron-phosphate battery charged, so it delivers life-saving power for FREE. **Unlike other generators, you'll never run out of gas.** You'll have a power supply that you can recharge endlessly. And its portability is a huge advancement over chunky gas generators, or home-installed systems. You can take the Patriot Power Generator 2000X with you if you are forced out of your home. You'll have an ample supply of AC electricity available to power your fridge, freezer, or medical devices. Even your coffee maker... power your cell phones, computers, radios... and so much more. You can even use it to power an electric blanket to keep you warm. **NO DEADLY FUMES, AND SILENTLY STEALTHY** The Patriot Power Generator 2000X is a completely self-contained system that silently provides up to 2,000 continuous watts of totally FREE, renewable power. And it's so easy to use a child can use it.
1. Unfold and set up the solar panel in the sunlight.
2. Plug in the solar panel.
3. Now plug in your electronic devices and enjoy free power from the sun!

Amazingly, it takes just 6 hours to fully charge via AC cord. It holds a charge for up to a year. **PLEASE DON'T WAIT
TO LEARN MORE** But don't delay. We can't keep these generators in stock. Once we run out, it could be a while before we can get you one. [**SEE THIS BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR IN ACTION!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqpcj7p8gubgnjjjugih8mm1dodkbd63mto5hlv8_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3i66o74sdh2bs) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. **CUSTOMERS ARE RAVING ABOUT THEIR SOLAR GENERATOR** **Joe B.**
"My Patriot Power Generator arrived four days before Ian "the beast" hurricane hit my town. It was a lifesaver. After losing all power, we would have been in absolute darkness with no way to communicate to the outside world. If we needed aid or rescue, it would have been impossible with dead phone batteries. The Patriot Power Generator was everything you said it was and more. I say this with tears in my eyes: I'll never be without at least one. Great product, people! You should be proud!" **Bob A.**
"Could not be happier! Generator works flawlessly, solar works flawlessly, plus all the other goodies in the package are amazing! Would definitely recommend 4Patriots for all your generator and other survival needs! Just spoke with Sienna at customer service to say how much I love the products! Sienna was very courteous and professional!" **Carla U.**
"The ice storms in February left us without any type of electricity for a solid week. If it wasn't for the solar generator, my husband wouldn't have been able to sleep with his CPAP and we would have been in the dark for a week. It was very helpful and very convenient to be able to keep it charging continuously by day in the sun. It's well worth the money. Get off the fence and order this for the safety and security of your family!" **Bernice L.**
"Don't wait to add this vital piece of equipment to your preparedness arsenal! We were able to keep our lights on and our electronic equipment charged for 5 days when the power went out last year. As soon as we could, we purchased another generator!" **Patricia T.**
"This is great not just emergencies, but everyday help as well! I needed to repair my shed, but there's no power out there, and most of my tools are plug-in electric. I was unhappily thinking about running 150ft of extension cords, then remembered my 4Patriots Solar Generator! Worked like a charm. Utterly reliable and easy to use. There's no good reason to put off getting back-up power! Peace of mind and convenience, too! Love it!" [**SEE THIS BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR IN ACTION!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmpbr1n8hshh3cmirh70gfl5sskktjtiphu41vn8_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3i66o74sdh2bs)

The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. YOUR LIFELINE: THE NEW & IMPROVED PATRIOT POWER GENERATOR 2000X The Patriot Power Generator 2000X now has double the capacity, more power, and newly expandable than our previous best-selling model. It was designed to safely and dependably meet your power needs. And best of all, it harnesses the power of the sun to keep a state-of-the-art lithium-iron-phosphate battery charged, so it delivers life-saving power for FREE. Unlike other generators, you'll never run out of gas. You'll have a power supply that you can recharge endlessly. And its portability is a huge advancement over chunky gas generators, or home-installed systems. You can take the Patriot Power Generator 2000X with you if you are forced out of your home. name: Hillsdale College via Trump News HQ
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4nn4vl3ji7anqpi3nsj4l7qf8t71fhvl3mg81d8_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3i6epr2c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z82b44t4fvh2q4vaqs3pljcitcv8ct62shccs370_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3i6epr2c1h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuq9si0i79s1p8v9ist5l1shtv24v08ilg7j64mo_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3i6epr2c1h2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7fdqlhtt8uf3slgh9fgp44k1g8ug2jcbjvvqhf8_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3i6epr2c1h2bs)**

Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers? YOU and your family. Imagine a blackout lasting months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. It was designed to safely and dependably meet your power needs. And best of all, it harnesses the power of the sun to keep a state-of-the-art lithium-iron-phosphate battery charged, so it delivers life-saving power for FREE. **Unlike other generators, you'll never run out of gas.** You'll have a power supply that you can recharge endlessly. And its portability is a huge advancement over chunky gas generators, or home-installed systems. You can take the Patriot Power Generator 2000X with you if you are forced out of your home. You'll have an ample supply of AC electricity available to power your fridge, freezer, or medical devices. Even your coffee maker... power your cell phones, computers, radios... and so much more. You can even use it to power an electric blanket to keep you warm. **NO DEADLY FUMES, AND SILENTLY STEALTHY** The Patriot Power Generator 2000X is a completely self-contained system that silently provides up to 2,000 continuous watts of totally FREE, renewable power. name: Tom Cotton
subject: Liberals are afraid.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Friend,

If we're going to make America strong again, then Republicans **[must](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z24q2bds3j9as8nrm3jjsf7d15mikf7cul2jmddg_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3i61or1chh2bs) **take back the U.S. Senate this year. **[And we have a strong slate of candidates who can win in November.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkklvupvsplopj95omf8v8lvt36h5gctt6nk6lb8_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3i61or1chh2bs)**

That includes veterans Tim Sheehy (Montana), Dave McCormick (Pennsylvania), and Mike Rogers (Michigan).

It includes successful business leader Eric Hovde, and tough conservative Kari Lake in Arizona.

Liberals should be terrified, and they are. **[Just a few days ago, Rachel Maddow went on a 15 minute, unhinged rant attacking all five of these candidates.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsui75a7noeai2t1a7rhik8rp6r487m72lrm7en8_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3i61or1chh2bs)**

**[It's going to get worse. The Marxist Left and their allies are going to say, spend, and do whatever it takes to stop these Republicans from flipping these five Senate seats.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zopvf49g7diijidk9qd50k8av954h1ug3t7h61fo_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3i61or1chh2bs)**

**[That's why I'm coming to you for help. Will you split a donation between our campaigns now? Every dollar will help us flip these five Senate seats.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zh4maeluhf1l86af4l11ikr41uma1ap1pei0e6uo_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3i61or1chh2bs)**
********[FLIP THE SENATE: DONATE NOW](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z35gd0glgskp69aj06lp51j0cvd32a94363jhs6o_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3i61or1chh2bs)********
One of the biggest reasons the **[red wave](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zje0rm14mkoecktl88jibs8g5fjgu3su078eveo0_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3i61or1chh2bs)** never arrived in 2022 is because Republicans weren't able to match the Democrats' small dollar fundraising advantage.

That meant that our candidates didn't always have the means to reach voters with the truth, and to set the record straight about these lies and unhinged rants.

I refuse to let it happen this time, because if we don't win in November, we're done.

_**[J](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv9n8pfhb3lt8t9utcsdqg7rrdnp93kj743fbj6g_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3i61or1chh2bs)**_**[oin me in sending reinforcements to these tough conservative Senate candidates, and let's flip five seats in November. Split a donation between our campaigns here.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z06oupk2m3cd3uoilhglu3ro71kcb7lau49reroo_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3i61or1chh2bs)**

In service,

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zngqptedu6s2as4b6311koouk5ke0bf8ipt6mmgg_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3i69pb4chh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zimcvgvh50col4m8q0bmiqhceahi9v7b17h6vog0_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3i69pb4chh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs05e1f36dc4p3nrr8rb98ek7aai09anv9h0rcjo_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3i69pb4chh2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztn3696ag2c23qiom2nb0ne0ieo5g3vfiuva5uto_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3i69pb4chh2bs)**

clean_body: Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars” on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College P.S. The “The Second World Wars” DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. 1600 Daily PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Nicole Neily, Parents Defending Education
subject: Biden's Betrayal: Will You Stand with Parents?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper._c2VnbWVudENvZGU9U1BPNDkwNTgifQ/IRcssnRfOevbqD9FaN0Nfg)
---
Fellow American, The Biden Administration just betrayed parents, girls, and due process with their latest Title IX updates. These sweeping changes will affect public school students, teachers, administrators, athletes, and their families... MILLIONS of Americans – including you... ... which is why I'm counting on you to stand with Parents Defending Education as we fight back. The newest regulations completely rewrite the plain language of Title IX to advance the radical LGBTQ+ agenda. Biological sex will no longer be recognized in any American public school -- instead, students will be forced to share private spaces with the opposite biological sex. And anyone who doesn't play along could face PUNISHMENT for "misgendering" students. I need your help to take the Biden Administration to court over this outrageous policy. With your support, we will expose the truth, challenge this dangerous ideology, and restore a healthy, safe, and non-political educational environment for all students. **[**Can I count on you to make a donation of $35, $50, or even $100 to support Parents Defending Education's critical legal challenge?**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c2VnbWVudENvZGU9U1BPNDkwNTgifQ/qD-z_A8_L5b3YOkXVN4jQw)**
---
[Donate Now to Support Parents Defending Education](http://trk.secureandprosper._c2VnbWVudENvZGU9U1BPNDkwNTgifQ/S5vte6688eE_6AjVUo97cw)
---
This Title IX revision is a disgraceful overreach that will have real-world consequences for students across the country. Girls will be forced to share sleeping accommodations with biological males on overnight school field trips, and the privacy and safety of all students will be compromised. Parents Defending Education is on the front lines, fighting every day to give parents the knowledge and tools they need to be involved in their children's education. We believe our kids deserve an academically rigorous curriculum focused on core subjects like reading, writing, and math - not divisive political agendas. That's why we're gearing up for a landmark lawsuit against the Biden Administration. With your help, we will defend the integrity of Title IX and protect the rights of parents and students nationwide. The stakes have never been higher. But I know that with your support, we can prevail. **[**Will you make a donation of $35, $50, or even $100 to help us take on the Biden Administration and win this critical fight for our kids? Every gift makes a difference.**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c2VnbWVudENvZGU9U1BPNDkwNTgifQ/Fm9-2Y40fLVz30OpsTFFNQ)**
---
[Donate Now to Support Parents Defending Education](http://trk.secureandprosper._c2VnbWVudENvZGU9U1BPNDkwNTgifQ/PkvfnSF9n-dCj9x0kA0p9w)
---
Thank you for standing with us. I'll be in touch soon with more updates on this urgent issue. Nicole NeilyPresidentParents Defending Education
---
[Support Parents Defending Education](http://trk.secureandprosper._c2VnbWVudENvZGU9U1BPNDkwNTgifQ/8l-2R23GcGem46TCd0ErsA)
---

Arlington VA 22207

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Liberals are afraid.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Friend,

If we're going to make America strong again, then Republicans **[must](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zupvk1vs61ih0vl5aok8e2me09vikhsck1v5plo8_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3h60ob1chh2bs) **take back the U.S. Senate this year. **[And we have a strong slate of candidates who can win in November.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo6nfnnn3a5nr8v282hs3k4rkg9adjn9pk2mdarg_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3h60ob1chh2bs)**

That includes veterans Tim Sheehy (Montana), Dave McCormick (Pennsylvania), and Mike Rogers (Michigan).

It includes successful business leader Eric Hovde, and tough conservative Kari Lake in Arizona.

Liberals should be terrified, and they are. **[Just a few days ago, Rachel Maddow went on a 15 minute, unhinged rant attacking all five of these candidates.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj3s8imou8bj3ehmnn845t18k7705qqrcru64l30_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3h60ob1chh2bs)**

name: [2] Vivek Ramaswamy, Steve Scalise
subject: RE: Abandoned. Desecrated. Spied on.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Hey, it’s Vivek – never before in the history of the world has a truly great country fallen so far from grace in such a short time.

| |

---
| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zas62gmdl3m0ikq8la87vluv62878s8rgkql9dv8_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3h6cp34cph2bs "Vivek Ramaswamy")
---

My fellow Americans:

**This is Vivek Ramaswamy.** I hoped to email you on a lighter note but I didn't have another choice with everything happening right now.

The unholy alliance between Joe Biden, the corrupt Deep State, the DC Swamp, the Liberal Media, and the Radical Left Democrats is a national disgrace.

_**[We, the American People, will never forget what they've done to us. Luckily, we have a plan to stop these radicals who:](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zko5ekh26flka5lrj1envdn487dthv4bpir2n370_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3h6cp34cph2bs "We, the American People, will never forget what they’ve done to us. Luckily, we have a plan to stop these radicals who: ")**_

**- Desecrated** Easter Sunday with wokeism
**- Arrested** the leader of the Republican Party
**- Removed** Trump from the ballot in key states
**- Raided** Mar-a-Lago with armed agents
**- Censored** Conservative voices
**- Spied** on Catholic worshippers
**- Gutted** election integrity measures
**- Peddled** the Russia Hoax for years
**- Threw** open our border to illegals
**- Abandoned** Americans in Afghanistan
**- Caved** to the Chinese Communist Party
**- Moved** to pack the Supreme Court
**- Forced** propaganda into classrooms

And the list goes on and on and on! Never before in the history of the world has a truly great country fallen so far from grace in such a short time. If the Radical Left Democrats somehow win control of the White House, the Senate, and the House... America will be lost forever.

_I know this to be true. You know it too._ But when everything is on the line, moments like this separate the strong from the weak. And make no mistake - the future of our country hangs in the balance.

_**[That's why I'm partnering with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME. Together, we're rallying the STRONGEST American Patriots from across the country and building the biggest surge of grassroots support this country has ever seen.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmuhuvdt1gp7k8f4k76ph287eu8e8msloaiof56g_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3h6cp34cph2bs "That’s why I’m partnering with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME. Together, we’re rallying the STRONGEST American Patriots from across the country and building the biggest surge of grassroots support this country has ever seen. ")**_

If you consider yourself a strong American Patriot - like the two of us do - I'm personally asking for your full commitment right here and right now.

The resources we collect today will help build the largest GOP voter turnout operation in history, deploy an army of volunteers in swing districts, run hard-hitting ads in battleground states, harvest ballots where it's legal, and help make this the most secure election EVER.

**THAT** is how Conservatives will win in a landslide...

**THAT** is how we take control of the White House, Senate, AND House...

**THAT** is how we stop the Radical Left Democrats from destroying America...

**THAT** is how we save our country as we know it...

**AND THAT** is how we send shockwaves through the heart of the Deep State, DC Swamp, and Liberal Media...

_**[I'm asking for 100% participation from every strong American Patriot reading this. If that's you, we need your help for the sake of the country. It's the only way we win. So what do you say? Can we count on you?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7n01cgc1vn23oltp5if55mvll1fffiehnq1ri4o_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3h6cp34cph2bs "I’m asking for 100% participation from every strong American Patriot reading this. If that’s you, we need your help for the sake of the country. It’s the only way we win. So what do you say? Can we count on you? ")**_

If you can't afford to pitch in $100 or $50 right now, I understand completely. If you can spare JUST $5 or $10, it will still go a long way in the fight for what we believe in. I only ask that everyone contributes SOMETHING.

No matter what, I'm honored to fight alongside you.

Thanks for all you do,
Vivek Ramaswamy

---

It's House Majority Leader Steve Scalise.

I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my _**[ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdje8l61e877fi7htae9i5hplmortkhkhi3scbu8_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3h6cp34cph2bs "ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN")**_ at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else.

_What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats?_

name: Larry Klayman
subject: TORTURED: January 6 Peaceful Protesters Beg for Water
body:
Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4nkb7b3b4c3d9hrjicnp5qhm0kfedfr14o2nb9g_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3h62p70cjh2bs)
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgi56tdl8q2qjakatioe3ajoscutp2imq9ul3pd0_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3h62p70cjh2bs) Dear Patriot,

**[Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z50bv1ulerrgrk4bt4tg0uj597ujdu09ntd3huhg_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3h62p70cjh2bs)**

Over a year ago, I wrote an urgent email to patriots just like you about what’s really happening to January 6 Peaceful Protesters in the Washington, DC jail.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba ...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* **Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy****through a 4 inch by 10 inch window of cold metal doors**
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

But there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water, and keep them from going to court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for years ... in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban and Islamic terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on.

**That’s why I’ve filed crucial lawsuits to FREE January 6 peaceful protesters. Including a critical new lawsuit that PROVES the FBI and other agencies carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE on January 6 patriots. That means their criminal convictions can be THROWN OUT. And their criminal trials MUST STOP.**

I’m Larry Klayman, founder and general counsel for Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 41 years.

You’ve seen me on CNN, Fox News, and other cable news outlets.

**I’m the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime. I _guarantee_ Bill Clinton still remembers me!**

And I successfully represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and win.****And with this critically important case, I can PROVE IN COURT that Attorney General Merrick Garland, FBI Director Christopher Wray, their departments and agencies at the U.S. Department of Justice ordered and carried out ILLEGAL SURVEILLANCE OF LAW-ABIDING AMERICAN CITIZENS!**

Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

**[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $$25, $50, $100, or even more.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbib9o0ie8908r4ro6nut6ndloj4hf0tn7atgu90_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3h62p70cjh2bs)**

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can **now**.

In Justice,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, innocent Americans are begging for water in the Washington, DC jail. These innocent men and women are being tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

**[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $25, $50, $100, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Every dollar counts.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh0ms5ne7j1sdc80empjd04842dnqbnt8up2p4b8_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3h62p70cjh2bs)**

subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/DviWyifr9B4DkiVfamAybA~~/AARclAA~/RgRoGI_CP0TDaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL3N1cHBvcnQtdGhlLXNlY29uZC13b3JsZC13YXJzP3NjPTAwNDY5TjAyNDJMMTVET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1zZWNvbmR3b3JsZHdhcnNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBTX1BBLUNCLTIwMjQwNTA0VwNzcGNCCmYzV_Y1ZuaqbIVSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

clean_body: Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College ~~ Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. ~~ If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. subject: Liberals are afraid.

body:
Friend,

If we're going to make America strong again, then Republicans **[must](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkupkiu77cvssi5okh5hb2vs3dv7p91i01maq77g_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3h66pr2c1h2bs) **take back the U.S. Senate this year. **[And we have a strong slate of candidates who can win in November.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0inshha39rikgj1nb2237roks03q6fmffs2dlkg_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3h66pr2c1h2bs)**

That includes veterans Tim Sheehy (Montana), Dave McCormick (Pennsylvania), and Mike Rogers (Michigan).

It includes successful business leader Eric Hovde, and tough conservative Kari Lake in Arizona.

Liberals should be terrified, and they are. **[Just a few days ago, Rachel Maddow went on a 15 minute, unhinged rant attacking all five of these candidates.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbms9bn8uut9m8fd0peqskvq51i0ppp5prchghng_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3h66pr2c1h2bs)**

**[It's going to get worse. The Marxist Left and their allies are going to say, spend, and do whatever it takes to stop these Republicans from flipping these five Senate seats.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z12qj256o61s447v7n8jnns5e00bj7bnu9jfup18_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3h66pr2c1h2bs)**

**[That's why I'm coming to you for help. Will you split a donation between our campaigns now? Every dollar will help us flip these five Senate seats.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zchgg1gjfvjke7chbgupuusaldh4nb2pooj2sjkg_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3h66pr2c1h2bs)**
********[FLIP THE SENATE: DONATE NOW](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z44ts35jon0l5gpn0mqr259d21huisci6bad0v1g_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3h66pr2c1h2bs)********
One of the biggest reasons the **[red wave](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zb2t56nboci2blsh4rm94oo3qa3tvtgth7s4juuo_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3h66pr2c1h2bs)** never arrived in 2022 is because Republicans weren't able to match the Democrats' small dollar fundraising advantage.

That meant that our candidates didn't always have the means to reach voters with the truth, and to set the record straight about these lies and unhinged rants.

I refuse to let it happen this time, because if we don't win in November, we're done.

_**[J](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztqco7nqo71mf1sna76dtmf8bnohhm8njagqcda0_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3h66pr2c1h2bs)**_**[oin me in sending reinforcements to these tough conservative Senate candidates, and let's flip five seats in November. Split a donation between our campaigns here.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi6maund8u3avlugvnhcgaj7j5f656n1v6rung6o_rp22sh2s8i6ep31c3h66pr2c1h2bs)**

In service,

subject: Blue Collar Job Demand, an AI Air Force Jet, and Black Light Baseball
body:
Blue collar workers in the U.S. labor market[ are in higher demand](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLuO6yAUAL8Gd1hwAD8Kitu4y223tMAcYrIYLCCx8verbL31FDOar9t6MyGGdP9vDtTN59VsLbxwVVRSkKvsnPaIgKJDzUcuJxiY5N2umfJWsNlzyycr5LgNo2VKCuFmNw9u6oIGBpIpJtmkBsV7nAbBZwBvRy5GNxHJ0IWWS__IIbUdfXznF5Z-y0cX9d7aWYn4R2AhsFzX1Se7JbzqhxNY7LOGhLUSWHDLKR9vAos5S4j0I6bPSh_ZVlrwzKXRaGwu9DDlGxstWzJcMRBzV7Q7rxBjqMNIJLsfJsTfgvbXjp8AAAD__6kyYGw) than "knowledge-based" white collar professionals, economists say.

| | | [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJydjrGOwjAQRL8m7ojWXjsJhYu7gg4aCkrLZ6-JwYlRYpD4eyykk664CmnKN2-GNO_6YeilBGBeByJByKIWIBCQK9hKxWUbgiOUCnvkCEPnGwnkY8lLe8lxLiOF9MwPWlqXJzbqoJzlFVaD66UCua12UATBehS8-2FJj6Xc1ga_GrGr-cdy2pu9jSnO54OdSJeQzW3JqwHccLURaI42FbMSeUNTBfNsXfSVITeSuxrOFn25XyklOzXi21Ow91Tq8V-i_VN7L5YPRl71WWnS)
