| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz81q6zAUBOCnkXYx-jmW5IUWN1xEoTiEpFDIxsj2ka0ix8FW4_bti7vuega-mfe6qX1M8T6c_IQ2h7nxXY5PbMoDHAQ0QHsbEAVKipZrDkYoBpyOlhmDVR8YhqrS0KrSgwbU3kvfcS85jVYwAaxkwEypSl6gUZJXQoRWc6l7Q4BhH_O8FB9zvOcRQ_qen7gU3TzRZMecHyuR_4hwRLht24ovJcc1DHtOhHt9Od2ORDhZ307ny96Sbv1sOZH_j9drfX5zlx3fR9DF9o8tphRXpQmwYfIx_TL5r88_AQAA__8eDFN0) | |
# SATURDAY, MAY 4, 2024
---|---
**Happy Saturday**! On this date in 1776, [Rhode Island](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFu6yAUgOGnwRsWHGObDAx38Za7drQwHMKpCESAYvntq1YdO3_DL_0f9_1uKVF-_LdPND2U3bpOb9xnrjioXQ3eBETAaUAjV6k0LELJIRqN7nCrmOQxLTfwoMDOxxp00KhvctEDGRCgxCyU0PMyyxH1MskbQDhWOa1eMyXQUy91_CyUe8SQrvLGOrryHJKJvb8am_4x2Bhs53mOkVov9fp2BluP1Li3F6fMf4XBVmPxyKklmz336JKt2Dhljy_MHrPDoRr_OiklasvKlHg8LaWfZv9rwFcAAAD__yOZXas) became the first of the thirteen colonies to renounce its allegiance to King George III. Ironically, Rhode Island would be the last state to ratify the new American Constitution more than 14 years later. A member of _The Flyover's_ team had a recent disagreement with his wife over when to run the dishwasher. He says only when it's full. His wife says to run it daily, full or not, and she thinks that _Flyover_ readers will agree with her. Help us settle the debate _Flyover Nation;_ answer our poll at the bottom! Have you signed up for _The Flyover_ yet? If not, you can fix that [with one click](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7turDAQANCvsbtF9nj8oHBxpRXVJW1KZGAMkxhYsc5G-fsoSpntT3Ne-6FPXHhfXtJGseZjSFPlBw32ghfAAeUcMxGQkRS11xjAKdRyjYDjaHz2wWVjyXokNH4MbTtpq1KaJUdQgMoqVME6qxsKzugWII9eGz8HgYpmrsfZvB2815Vy-ToedDbTsckS11pvd2H-CegEdH-JgK5PC0__eX__MaYjYa7z7ZNL4bvzAtWyJS6_1n3UTZgrKnnG50bWZ__vAAAA___v1Foj). This weekend, our sponsor is [GDR Labs.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz81q6zAUBOCnkXYx-jmW5IUWN1xEoTiEpFDIxsj2ka0ix8FW4_bti7vuega-mfe6qX1M8T6c_IQ2h7nxXY5PbMoDHAQ0QHsbEAVKipZrDkYoBpyOlhmDVR8YhqrS0KrSgwbU3kvfcS85jVYwAaxkwEypSl6gUZJXQoRWc6l7Q4BhH_O8FB9zvOcRQ_qen7gU3TzRZMecHyuR_4hwRLht24ovJcc1DHtOhHt9Od2ORDhZ307ny96Sbv1sOZH_j9drfX5zlx3fR9DF9o8tphRXpQmwYfIx_TL5r88_AQAA__8eDFN0) Check out their natural alternatives for pain relief in today's edition.
|
---
## Blue Collar Jobs in High Demand
Blue-collar workers in the U.S. labor market [are in higher demand](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLuO6yAUAL8Gd1hwAD8Kitu4y223tMAcYrIYLCCx8verbL31FDOar9t6MyGGdP9vDtTN59VsLbxwVVRSkKvsnPaIgKJDzUcuJxiY5N2umfJWsNlzyycr5LgNo2VKCuFmNw9u6oIGBpIpJtmkBsV7nAbBZwBvRy5GNxHJ0IWWS__IIbUdfXznF5Z-y0cX9d7aWYn4R2AhsFzX1Se7JbzqhxNY7LOGhLUSWHDLKR9vAos5S4j0I6bPSh_ZVlrwzKXRaGwu9DDlGxstWzJcMRBzV7Q7rxBjqMNIJLsfJsTfgvbXjp8AAAD__6kyYGw) than "knowledge-based" white-collar professionals, economists say. Employment data indicates a higher unemployment rate for professional and business services workers and a lower one for people who work in manufacturing. The U.S. isn't the only country experiencing the trend. Australia, Canada, and the U.K. are also struggling [to fill roles](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuwyAUheGngc0WXDDQgaGLt3TtaIG5xETYRIYG9e0rd852pE860v99W24u5XTcv9yOtsWyuLWlFy7TIAeQi6TBRkRAQdFyzaUBxSSnmw1ghFcStBIcA9NeeKej88qsjGFEmiwwkGxikplJTXxEowT_AIhec6GDIZJhSK2c46Oko20Y82954TmuZafZbq09KxGfBGYCc-99XH09sNfLCczXJDDvpbahojvXDcPwKL4OJ9afHS-kpw3PnnJOVWki2X13Kf__t3exfwEAAP__IflV-w) like mechanics, nurses, and electricians. According to Indeed, nurses, mechanics, sales, customer service, and retail are among the most searched-for job resumes in the U.S.
## Anti-Israel Arrests Eclipse 2,400
Anti-Israel demonstrations have led to [more than 2,400](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLmOIyEUAL-mO8OC15wBwSbOvOmGLY6HzYo-BM-25u9HnnjCUiWl-ndbb6G2ut__hg09lWMNieoLV8UkA7nKOfuCCLjM6IUR0oLmUswPn6BEqa1zRsccUUalrcKIMWkUAGmuHjhIrrjkVmklLmj1IhxAiUYsJttJcsyVjn75f9SdHlja1_HCfknHNjf_IDrHtPyZ4DrBNZw7vsdHfaBTTQ0nuNbRAzZ2hoaD6l7DzlLYzudgg54Zd2JnPwgHDfYOneWiiklFKGnCkoIt0SkXnYOsMaKIc_f5fNfW6tBmkvy-hdp-eui3Od8BAAD__1MsZqw) arrests since April 17, as 46 universities across the country continue to contend with encampments and building takeovers. Police presence is ongoing on multiple campuses, including NYU and The New School in New York. At least 30 were arrested at Portland State University, where protesters barricaded themselves inside a library. [International protests ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uwyAURp8Gb1j8-acDQxdv6drRusAlocLGgptYefsqUcduR99ZPp3vy3qBlNN-_YINLcWygqf0wHXghiuzmi7YiKhQd2jlJM2sRmFkd7POyMGNUTstNIjXqryA6CHE6J3HLlkllBGDMGIexkH2OI9afigV3ST1FGZmBIZEpfY_Je10w5if5YG192Xrsr0RHY3pT6YWppbzPPvd-R3P9vJMLS9kark3_kc5PZC7XK5MLR624974UQtho8bf7n4EIGz8KJUy7IE3AkKek6tQn9xnhIqBV7-DHMSgx67acJwp59TGiRlx3SDl9z36r9VvAAAA___6mW1e)have also been reported as demonstrators are organizing in London, Paris, Rome, Sydney, and Tokyo. The continued turmoil has caused several colleges [to hire extra security and staff](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1u9CAQAJ_G7jiZ9fJXUHzNdfe1KS0Mi02EjQXkTnn76FKnHE0zmo_H8nApp3P77w6yPZbF-Z6etAiGDHDBMdhIBDSPZLniqEFOyMfdImk9e-29UUYGbQAEKL1qzwkgKBqThQlwEhNOWkjBb6TlzA1AXBWfVdADThRSL_X2WdLZd4r5uzyp3nw5xmz33q82zP8GuA9wd9dJr_ZWb6g9-UwD3FOrjjLb3eEae7nKfMmZNmJbdeHL9VROdtXSqfXGhJnRR07rLARGMhoVoJRo4goCuByrDdcr5ZyaVANO2-FS_q3pf635CQAA__8rpmM9) to protect students and families during upcoming graduation ceremonies. Officials say disruptions won't be tolerated, and some have designated areas as protest zones.
## Air Force Flies AI-Piloted Jet
The Air Force demonstrated the capabilities of an artificial intelligence-controlled fighter jet Friday, sending Air Force Secretary Frank Kendall up in an experimental F-16 to simulate an aerial dogfight with a human pilot. [See footage of the flight here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7GOqzAQAL_G7kD27hpD4SJSRPOUd91diRyzBJ9MHIEDyt-fcvW1M9JI83UZLj6meL_99wu7MuXBhxJ3HkxFFdBAcnQTMzBKdtpqaqFRpOXsOquN8cqGYAjDBKQQFVrsyHMLHcnoQAEpo0i1pjG65rZB3QFMV6vRjq0gxWMsea2_c7yXmaf0yjuvdciLTG4u5bEJPAnoBfTHcdSv_CzPK7_9m_gSZoH9LvCc_4XP_QQfuQoCmiLwrDe5uvFxxJTi1lhB6rb4mH7b5a_RnwAAAP__ZoFRSw). The Air Force acknowledged that their AI technology was not fully developed, but it has [plans for 1,000 unmanned warplanes](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLluwzAQBb9G6mjwWB4qWKRx57QpBR5LaQ1aEijCRv4-cJAy3XuYZjBft_kWqNK2fIYH-l72OaROT5w1AyZhhjH7gihRjeiFFeCk4SDG1Ys8aVBRO6eig0lEzBGFRh1lBpPSSF5yCVxz4E4bLS7ojBKTlCVaoWx2A3DM1Pd2ue-09RVL_d6f2C5pf4zVr70f56A-Bnkd5DUcG77ON3qf1ilV_FuFEoXKaOtYKy24JWSFlrVjY3fsJwvUWNlbQmaCEJynyQSrUpiiLSBSzCZIq1XJYWw-Hy-qlU5jB-DLI1D99en_xfkJAAD__5aHZUM) operating by 2028. Called _Vista_ , the F-16 took Kendall on an hour-long flight above Edwards Air Force Base in California. While in the air, Vista "battled" with a second human-piloted F-16, maneuvering at more than 500 mph, passing within 1,000 feet of each other. Back on the ground, Kendall told reporters, "_[It's a security risk not to have it](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2y2yAQRp9G6lYDiD8XKtKou2lTarhisTZG4IGNNX77jFOn_r7inPPra_sKlKncf4YTF051CzvTCzcDGpTe9BiXhKhwHnGRTmqvrNByPBZl57CjNc6kKMM3Gn-zOOtozM0bh36kRQmlhRFaeGONnNDbWd6USt9Ozi76QQuMxLVNvysVPjDld31hm_Z6jnk5mJ99mH8Mah3Uel3XlOmFJxX-HAa1Frz6Z6ktx0GtfzoEapBq2xE67g05tDekFsoDHlhiyBlSJuxABQIc1Lk22iEQPClXxghJWuAKEc9aOrfACD0k5DfIj7wzTjrhZzsdfOaxLfF5Uc7UrRu0uJ-B8j94_l_JvwEAAP__VCB1vA). At this point, we have to have it_."

clean_body: Blue collar workers in the U.S. labor market than "knowledge-based" white collar professionals, economists say. | | | | | | SATURDAY, MAY 4, 2024 ---|--- Happy Saturday! On this date in 1776, became the first of the thirteen colonies to renounce its allegiance to King George III. Ironically, Rhode Island would be the last state to ratify the new American Constitution more than 14 years later. A member of The Flyover's team had a recent disagreement with his wife over when to run the dishwasher. He says only when it's full. His wife says to run it daily, full or not, and she thinks that Flyover readers will agree with her. Help us settle the debate Flyover Nation; answer our poll at the bottom! Have you signed up for The Flyover yet? If not, you can fix that . This weekend, our sponsor is Check out their natural alternatives for pain relief in today's edition. | Blue Collar Jobs in High Demand Blue-collar workers in the U.S. labor market than "knowledge-based" white-collar professionals, economists say. Employment data indicates a higher unemployment rate for professional and business services workers and a lower one for people who work in manufacturing. The U.S. isn't the only country experiencing the trend. Australia, Canada, and the U.K. are also struggling like mechanics, nurses, and electricians. According to Indeed, nurses, mechanics, sales, customer service, and retail are among the most searched-for job resumes in the U.S. Anti-Israel Arrests Eclipse 2,400 Anti-Israel demonstrations have led to arrests since April 17, as 46 universities across the country continue to contend with encampments and building takeovers. Police presence is ongoing on multiple campuses, including NYU and The New School in New York. At least 30 were arrested at Portland State University, where protesters barricaded themselves inside a library. also been reported as demonstrators are organizing in London, Paris, Rome, Sydney, and Tokyo. The continued turmoil has caused several colleges to protect students and families during upcoming graduation ceremonies. Officials say disruptions won't be tolerated, and some have designated areas as protest zones. Air Force Flies AI-Piloted Jet The Air Force demonstrated the capabilities of an artificial intelligence-controlled fighter jet Friday, sending Air Force Secretary Frank Kendall up in an experimental F-16 to simulate an aerial dogfight with a human pilot. . The Air Force acknowledged that their AI technology was not fully developed, but it has operating by 2028. Called Vista , the F-16 took Kendall on an hour-long flight above Edwards Air Force Base in California. While in the air, Vista "battled" with a second human-piloted F-16, maneuvering at more than 500 mph, passing within 1,000 feet of each other. Back on the ground, Kendall told reporters, ". At this point, we have to have it." name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: The key to Lincoln's rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1f625be90ebe4ae387e92379c6326a70&_e=-uSrHgMHApFKaOyYEfWCYI8CaU7WsFeifdOjpp6_A5iJ053Ipk7NqZU-7Yg1vzG5UdUncw55ybjE39hu81H8QmhKJRxuDa62_xjhafalwJ_5keUGc7e5ZIuDjWlNTuN6yRlOTkaQwAGwl6efah1E9xEjgnMJ-U-lo-kymryYmgXKsmFVnoFydLf2O7Db549Bqr35nrLsvmPbUWFE26YJfZzx8ORsrTxeN8FFluHjtw2Ou63luAUDXXkjSnksZppZOuZrX4rZagjUyo1-X7aZWTx32pIc8kiXQVANhFLHE2XEEqBrcFQQGoQZHf8AgKf8Iix-NQ6vxDMUth_iB0QMtE5G7bHOusMBkbTDj24Dc3KAzAeb1vqomYfj4Ib_yixTHkKDq6XvtVfDV4RJfFyG4ib3HtCak5ic55f1JdYbR4E%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1f625be90ebe4ae387e92379c6326a70&_e=-uSrHgMHApFKaOyYEfWCYI8CaU7WsFeifdOjpp6_A5iJ053Ipk7NqZU-7Yg1vzG5UdUncw55ybjE39hu81H8QmhKJRxuDa62_xjhafalwJ_5keUGc7e5ZIuDjWlNTuN6yRlOTkaQwAGwl6efah1E9xEjgnMJ-U-lo-kymryYmgXKsmFVnoFydLf2O7Db549Bqr35nrLsvmPbUWFE26YJfZzx8ORsrTxeN8FFluHjtw2Ou63luAUDXXkjSnksZppZHbUuMwgV77o-1FWxwBW7HkSq2hFzPBG65d56KRvNF-OJblGAT-d3kerm357rcU4Bd8YJ5hg8ErrX0GN-hTe3XU4T0NmSYcC0G7F6f6WiRHgiQonn9Wn4MZw8fERy-p9uLFTlGmKlb3E5yKmI-HPu3slYacqWaaPUdcwhP6cjunE%3D)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1f625be90ebe4ae387e92379c6326a70&_e=-uSrHgMHApFKaOyYEfWCYI8CaU7WsFeifdOjpp6_A5iJ053Ipk7NqZU-7Yg1vzG5UdUncw55ybjE39hu81H8QmhKJRxuDa62_xjhafalwJ_5keUGc7e5ZIuDjWlNTuN6yRlOTkaQwAGwl6efah1E9xEjgnMJ-U-lo-kymryYmgXKsmFVnoFydLf2O7Db549Bqr35nrLsvmPbUWFE26YJfZzx8ORsrTxeN8FFluHjtw2Ou63luAUDXXkjSnksZppZKWa4vKRtYdKtaFaQryyZULDZBUxSImOqS3f7ap3yGrR7OEOp_AI_OykVKo2LrlgMtNORyP2HvhZD7UawZpr7tDjy1oWGIgpL8lzeaSuOKTRi6dgbIoK01tbiyFRotZQi5Zw1T8szxOLmaH7WNndtjzaZSKdCcIo1cSYyWE9k39w%3D)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Reclaiming American Freedom

clean_body: Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic " Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." Through "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry," you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. | | | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Reclaiming American Freedom PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522

body:
Can you keep your family safe when the lights go out?

**FORMER CIA OFFICIAL WARNS:** **DEADLY STRIKE COMING TO AMERICA'S POWER GRID** _**Can you keep your family safe when the lights go out?**_ **Former CIA Director stunned listeners with a stern warning...** An attack on America's infrastructure would _"blackout the national grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse"._ In fact, attacks on just nine of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in coast-to-coast black-outs, plunging millions into darkness for up to 18 months. Terrifying. **OUR GOVERNMENT IS WOEFULLY UNPREPARED** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers? YOU and your family. Imagine a blackout lasting months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=18e84553e0c54b859ca1d42791afc5fd&_e=FVeemsTJ0XP7dd_nsftSElwrbWobsfF7jCAbc9RWPeLpb-pa7SJbMz15UmEPvrDfW7ihLvCsYthgoFlJvuJnJHuRRgT6hafYkybemlYQnejz7Wy7r_ncs8G87fYdbdln0-DhivfC77_f-XyLXQ-bCyLFS01WgBiBBMza3Uu4fpcJDRzRwUTPj3_oY1xEyKZDh1iUSjDnNYcyi14VwSHMAxzi8D9PooSDDq-NxI89ze_2GR_2x3Z16T6mcG9ajIlclZRwPyY7pK28bophKS-TQYh-CHt_ht0eBx7KJuzMmhITX_hZbpFJTy17KLmrfPkl). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out of generators.**_ Then a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=18e84553e0c54b859ca1d42791afc5fd&_e=FVeemsTJ0XP7dd_nsftSElwrbWobsfF7jCAbc9RWPeLpb-pa7SJbMz15UmEPvrDfW7ihLvCsYthgoFlJvuJnJHuRRgT6hafYkybemlYQnejz7Wy7r_ncs8G87fYdbdln0-DhivfC77_f-XyLXQ-bC7N_5lmG-7qKqXDocQ4SltcE9udCId9yJZwes7AUGNUQZxKZoPP4SWwiDbhqVkdcte84oAvAxkxk1nXHKXMCIA-3aaDlbjYQhj4flCkwHEjxM8lolxMdV3nu2BhQ41xUbXlTQm6lH8ejkw6Gl4t90i9wZppejXBo-W2JcRgFco9I) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. [**SEE THIS BREAKTHROUGH SOLAR GENERATOR IN ACTION!**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=18e84553e0c54b859ca1d42791afc5fd&_e=FVeemsTJ0XP7dd_nsftSElwrbWobsfF7jCAbc9RWPeLpb-pa7SJbMz15UmEPvrDfW7ihLvCsYthgoFlJvuJnJHuRRgT6hafYkybemlYQnejz7Wy7r_ncs8G87fYdbdln0-DhivfC77_f-XyLXQ-bCxj1taudjc6UbwyHscvQ8U5atBZ8ahDrt4fN8UHOwrUZN36WM2QcA5VVU-RQJYuepPzmm_s9nwQmgbIx42cZR6DEkmuEfU4w-0AKL6n2r7CJnYSYN8CI0vbR7GEePGn_VcHhRW3jgK5idWBKoneAznz4gTTz-Y-DRZOWi-syCXfa) [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=18e84553e0c54b859ca1d42791afc5fd&_e=FVeemsTJ0XP7dd_nsftSElwrbWobsfF7jCAbc9RWPeLpb-pa7SJbMz15UmEPvrDfW7ihLvCsYthgoFlJvuJnJHuRRgT6hafYkybemlYQnejz7Wy7r_ncs8G87fYdbdln0-DhivfC77_f-XyLXQ-bC42KRZPpOdaJn0pGk7rik8yjCU_Jhpsl3term9D8e9bpKRfM4mzguwIETGWnSlXQlqJG-bAEOn53kWx5IovwhBOnhd8qQwkCCja5cWavPsMROybDni8u5Ax2ixbkLVjjuMOeLVdt2S2EyDs3MsJ14SVA2TCrOMEMtoipwtAYkmEj) **YOUR LIFELINE: THE NEW & IMPROVED PATRIOT POWER GENERATOR 2000X** The Patriot Power Generator 2000X now has double the capacity, more power, and newly expandable than our previous best-selling model. It was designed to safely and dependably meet your power needs. And best of all, it harnesses the power of the sun to keep a state-of-the-art lithium-iron-phosphate battery charged, so it delivers life-saving power for FREE. **Unlike other generators, you'll never run out of gas.** You'll have a power supply that you can recharge endlessly. And its portability is a huge advancement over chunky gas generators, or home-installed systems. You can take the Patriot Power Generator 2000X with you if you are forced out of your home. You'll have an ample supply of AC electricity available to power your fridge, freezer, or medical devices. Even your coffee maker... power your cell phones, computers, radios... and so much more. You can even use it to power an electric blanket to keep you warm. **NO DEADLY FUMES, AND SILENTLY STEALTHY** The Patriot Power Generator 2000X is a completely self-contained system that silently provides up to 2,000 continuous watts of totally FREE, renewable power. name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=70dd38ac010148909f277ea0912ee867&_e=OXsAELmcZ2zK_S5pQ-2YUHe9Vmt16KXhORJQj4fehA5qd8x2nNHewbQDmeZ87jSd4w1fH-YL1FQyUQAj_HFk7pfuGCcDI08gVGdnNWDMFBwota-nGF5GiI8jOrJO-XDi1juim1HNmwye0f-0MMOD94z9_ycQr5tqgAhOFg18qCO6fCbefRTR1Dd2WYQ_ayOnXZ2eudqWgLUr-gOS-9X-NcjEtmlf9EA9LIP3uJcoVIkN2WlDs--IwYrtNPzatH3h6WreXfYUjDeYCgwWj4ydBkv9r31W7Y3OEyyXuNzzY-x7RzOeJpDCbr16gZhR8_H4Qwn1Ir-taLCeMlYF-jNF6KAhDtxWFFmdrtiFr1rmn1dH9BNJ1rP0lXm733UPY1e38P3b31b_R3IjHg6TgRSRDCCanPGxQlJh7eEmljfD6Fs%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." ** Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

My fellow Americans:

**This is Vivek Ramaswamy.** I hoped to email you on a lighter note but I didn't have another choice with everything happening right now.

The unholy alliance between Joe Biden, the corrupt Deep State, the DC Swamp, the Liberal Media, and the Radical Left Democrats is a national disgrace.

_I know this to be true. You know it too._ But when everything is on the line, moments like this separate the strong from the weak. And make no mistake - the future of our country hangs in the balance.

_**[That's why I'm partnering with Majority Leader Steve Scalise for the FIRST TIME. Together, we’re rallying the STRONGEST American Patriots from across the country and building the biggest surge of grassroots support this country has ever seen. ")**_

If you consider yourself a strong American Patriot - like the two of us do - I'm personally asking for your full commitment right here and right now.

The resources we collect today will help build the largest GOP voter turnout operation in history, deploy an army of volunteers in swing districts, run hard-hitting ads in battleground states, harvest ballots where it's legal, and help make this the most secure election EVER.

**THAT** is how Conservatives will win in a landslide...

**THAT** is how we take control of the White House, Senate, AND House...

**THAT** is how we stop the Radical Left Democrats from destroying America...

**THAT** is how we save our country as we know it...

**AND THAT** is how we send shockwaves through the heart of the Deep State, DC Swamp, and Liberal Media...

_**[I'm asking for 100% participation from every strong American Patriot reading this. If that's you, we need your help for the sake of the country. It's the only way we win. So what do you say? Can we count on you?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=24c470e655a94173a0380e09d3fec341&_e=DfLwwbeOLYxTRRfbC90ivfJXYV7N26prtZJ889-DIsZ-b5Qq6fXMaZpRnTV_VIODfL2J9_H62PkRCCVDHIBzUVj8Vh7dyBsP8GgP9fXwROt4UZX62yKzG-ZORBBk5aV6WUJbWhhkoa8JVBEg5QRzVlK--b4BdxHwuauHm_0e0z1a0OXJ3H0lVAXGfB1XdEwKJad-p21UsHG7f6JMF8yILOK1m_AKffV--812cX8ztswEmX3LZdjW2CXKmgsVYJLIa7x3w_EOvFEokJGnueirFIAYtuwsSgl_0Lw-GchFu0rZt2n-_MLG1l2Hh2aJlTQmCEippCgla-sZNoqmp8DSVnagXU_zTAO4kTFGzRVzRV9fAuqyA0P0h4w0ZQ99En4UQszapw52Jbus2NGAEjk-coTcbTDZFk-EE20ryTXWbYTFBt_h_HaXP42ZmBw6mrP_0b1G5hlxnoI8jBQ0eDVYkg%3D%3D "I’m asking for 100% participation from every strong American Patriot reading this. If that’s you, we need your help for the sake of the country. It’s the only way we win. So what do you say? Can we count on you? ")**_

No matter what, I'm honored to fight alongside you.

Vivek Ramaswamy

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: We need to fix our broken education system
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWiGwkRiBN

State of education

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWiGwkRiBN

From the
Desk of Dr. Ben Carson:
Hello,
I don't
believe the majority of the public really knows what is being
taught to our children and grandchildren.
They
assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing
up-that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone
has a chance at success.
From what
I've seen, this isn't always the case. However, I want to know
what you've seen.

Dr. Ben
Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute
I believe
that children as young as elementary age are being taught to
reject our American values.
They are
told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it
overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our
Constitution is "out of date" and needs to be "modernized."

Progressives are rewriting our nation's history and they are
doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let
this happen!
This year
I'm going to be meeting with political leaders and educational
"experts" across the country. I'm going to make sure people know
what is really happening in our schools.
I want to
be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest
to the issue. Specifically, I would like to include your
thoughts.
The
American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded,
has created a unique survey. We're trying to gauge the state of
America's Educational System by surveying people like you.
I'd like
to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better
understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You
can access the survey here...
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63132955:WiGwkRiBN:m:3:2532013465:ABB7C02DA2E400550FE2C5058D1E2A54:r
Thank you
for your consideration.
Regards,
Dr. Ben
Carson
Founder &
Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

Your
donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and
preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our
country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods
to decrease the federal government's role in society and to
improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Copyright
© 2021 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWiGwkRiBN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWiGwkRiBN

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Easier said than done
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Here's my final pitch to you:

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans:

**This is Vivek Ramaswamy again.** This could be my single most important update yet. Thanks for taking a moment out of your busy life to read this email.

I'm clocking thousands of miles flying across this country laser-focused on three key goals:
_**[GOAL #1:](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=639170aa5f3d46cc97462a07a98f0bc5&_e=ifXtyjw639g0p1e_30ytvPnusnJWUpQM6XSB03fhmyfflSXVCqKkVfpa554qxsa8X5UM3B_Zc0SSQW8brDdd7aatUDi9p1aXaNg4GeSMxxx2yJaBDX7dXf40EL0TtdCA0m9JcZIXg-TdfpFcWs4l1iN3cyR8AkyNLsQjbO6JNzSZjHQIpTZ_zD8rRCCToRaqF8BLY22QCEQWH5pg7_jnPlq25RO2jXOmcpHQRVCi2mVK6cCgPHgdNltGmvTXsR2pI4qoFRyYYaj_ubrLrkqcjWgeRAqc7uQldv_yjqDgg0Y4eOmgFzmCoGOezYh0kg9rZPfgdjV4hZDzEuNqBVC2llBMMe2FAIohW2Ge0x5eCC6I04vvkZh6awqax48MXIFkfqrptEaCKdfCDEOBNHHvPZ_2C7scHRBcStleNd0FOioNF7nFjA6s3K7kg4f-q6dO "GOAL #1:")**_ Reelect Donald J. Trump as President of the United States.
_**[GOAL #2:](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=639170aa5f3d46cc97462a07a98f0bc5&_e=ifXtyjw639g0p1e_30ytvPnusnJWUpQM6XSB03fhmyfflSXVCqKkVfpa554qxsa8X5UM3B_Zc0SSQW8brDdd7aatUDi9p1aXaNg4GeSMxxx2yJaBDX7dXf40EL0TtdCA0m9JcZIXg-TdfpFcWs4l1iN3cyR8AkyNLsQjbO6JNzSZjHQIpTZ_zD8rRCCToRaqF8BLY22QCEQWH5pg7_jnPlq25RO2jXOmcpHQRVCi2mVK6cCgPHgdNltGmvTXsR2pI4qoFRyYYaj_ubrLrkqcjWgeRAqc7uQldv_yjqDgg0bmH5On6EeWj__JM-h8EpfD-_zErX1f50_ssbj7UioWMc-SPodMaibuoWKhXfBySn9xpIjFn0x34VP-XlFk18tyio9JRxQqpiJndHw9nS9EBaA4M2IVpsJyuCVwBNoxs009AZyRe6S9fQ2oIYTQSaeU "GOAL #2:")**_ Save our Conservative Majority in the U.S. House of Representatives.
_**[GOAL #3:](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=639170aa5f3d46cc97462a07a98f0bc5&_e=ifXtyjw639g0p1e_30ytvPnusnJWUpQM6XSB03fhmyfflSXVCqKkVfpa554qxsa8X5UM3B_Zc0SSQW8brDdd7aatUDi9p1aXaNg4GeSMxxx2yJaBDX7dXf40EL0TtdCA0m9JcZIXg-TdfpFcWs4l1iN3cyR8AkyNLsQjbO6JNzSZjHQIpTZ_zD8rRCCToRaqF8BLY22QCEQWH5pg7_jnPlq25RO2jXOmcpHQRVCi2mVK6cCgPHgdNltGmvTXsR2pI4qoFRyYYaj_ubrLrkqcjWgeRAqc7uQldv_yjqDgg0bruhng_um83QPAwXDPehi3DkdOFr4xRdExflExM1JSqhzZAgvywoClBLj-ORXa3A0dlbbHa2Upb8QiH8TnhSWsh-_Isty-4es2ahvrXpBW_TJ8I2DnIcHGUxzKb92q-RvEyF4YeCQH2aRGtgDqjqFG "GOAL #3:")**_ Win a supermajority in the U.S. Senate.
Obviously, this is easier said than done. Especially when Joe Biden just raked in $25 million in a single fundraiser with Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and half of Hollywood.

The Radical Left Democrats may have enough in their warchest to annihilate our America First candidates up and down the ballot. That means our chances of accomplishing those three goals would be reduced to ZERO.

_**[So here's my final pitch to you. I'm partnering with Steve Scalise because the only way we can get back on track is with an emergency grassroots fundraising surge like we've NEVER SEEN BEFORE.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=639170aa5f3d46cc97462a07a98f0bc5&_e=ifXtyjw639g0p1e_30ytvPnusnJWUpQM6XSB03fhmyfflSXVCqKkVfpa554qxsa8X5UM3B_Zc0SSQW8brDdd7aatUDi9p1aXaNg4GeSMxxx2yJaBDX7dXf40EL0TtdCA0m9JcZIXg-TdfpFcWs4l1iN3cyR8AkyNLsQjbO6JNzSZjHQIpTZ_zD8rRCCToRaqF8BLY22QCEQWH5pg7_jnPlq25RO2jXOmcpHQRVCi2mVK6cCgPHgdNltGmvTXsR2pI4qoFRyYYaj_ubrLrkqcjWgeRAqc7uQldv_yjqDgg0bi2tbAUDYScge-TS-hEj4mdFKwNfSsEnS4DCzKyhI70mxOHAe-StkobOYiVVbokjU0uqnb3AAmxseSpz9UI4b_aHiqtLOweEiGXe2ik8yk0CUZCV_ds6liMz__wi7Uay-bLjtnOaezt4s0B-RdfwSu "So here’s my final pitch to you. I’m partnering with Steve Scalise because the only way we can get back on track is with an emergency grassroots fundraising surge like we’ve NEVER SEEN BEFORE. ")**_

The Radical Left Democrats have an army of Liberal megadonors on their side... But if EVERY America First Conservative pitches in JUST a few bucks - we'll surge ahead and shock the world.

PLEASE:

If the Radical Left Democrats keep outraising us and manage to win this election, we could face the very real possibility of a complete Liberal takeover of our country.

Trump as President of the United States. "GOAL #2:" Save our Conservative Majority in the U.S. House of Representatives. "GOAL #3:" Win a supermajority in the U.S. Senate. Obviously, this is easier said than done. Especially when Joe Biden just raked in $25 million in a single fundraiser with Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and half of Hollywood. The Radical Left Democrats may have enough in their warchest to annihilate our America First candidates up and down the ballot. That means our chances of accomplishing those three goals would be reduced to ZERO. "So here’s my final pitch to you. I’m partnering with Steve Scalise because the only way we can get back on track is with an emergency grassroots fundraising surge like we’ve NEVER SEEN BEFORE. name: Douglas Carswell
subject: A good week for education reform. Here’s why:
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/successsequence-11572387?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**This has been a good week for education reform in Mississippi. **Our lawmakers might not agree on much, but last Saturday, they finally voted to replace the old education funding formula with the new Mississippi Student Funding Formula.

Under the old funding formula, your tax dollars were spent in the interests of the education bureaucrats. Local administrators were guaranteed the same amount of revenue even when they lost students or under-performed.

**Mississippi will now fund students, not a system. **Every student will now get a base amount of $6,695, on top of which they will then receive additional amounts based on their own individual circumstances.

This is a major win for Speaker Jason White and Chairman of the House Education Committee, Rob Roberson, as well as for Jansen Owen and Kent McCarty. The bill would not have passed without a strong lead from the Governor, Tate Reeves, as well.

**Now that Mississippi will personalize the amount of funding each student gets, the money might just start to follow the student.**

Will this happen? Thanks to a ruling by the Mississippi Supreme Court on Thursday, one of the key objections against it happening has been removed.
---
|
---
_Mississippi Supreme Court Rules_
| **Lawmakers opposed to school choice in our state often suggest that while they personally might agree with school choice, sadly, you can’t put government money into private schools. **

**Thursday’s Supreme Court ruling shows this excuse to be bunkum.**

During Covid, when large sums of federal money were provided to Mississippi, our state legislature, in turn, authorized a state agency to distribute some of those funds to private schools for infrastructure improvement.

This prompted an activist group, _Parents for Public Schools_ , to challenge allocating public money to private schools as unconstitutional. Had _Parents for Public Schools_ been successful, we might have found ourselves in a situation now where public dollars could not follow a student into the private sector.

**Thursday’s ruling is in favor of educational freedom. It is a defeat not just for anti-school choice activists. It means that those in the legislature looking for a ready-made excuse not to support school choice can no longer hide behind the claim that school choice is unconstitutional.**

As our legal division, the Mississippi Justice Institute argued when we filed a ‘friend of the court’ brief, alongside the Institute for Justice, the Mississippi Constitution does not prevent school choice.

**You might have noticed that despite there being a supposedly conservative****majority in our state legislature, not a great deal of conservative legislation was passed this session.**

**A bill to tackle DEI (Diversity, Equity & Inclusion) dogma in our public universities was killed in committee.** Efforts to restore the Right of Initiative fizzled out, as did proposals to remove restrictive laws that intentionally limit the number of health care providers.

Our lawmakers weren’t even prepared to pass a law that might have allowed Mississippians to buy wine online.** They only just managed to pass the SAFER Act to protect women’s rights at the eleventh hour. **

**The forces of do-nothing intransigence are powerful.** But as the success of education funding reform shows, inertia can be overcome.

**When Speaker White played hardball and Governor Reeves gave a clear lead, the intransigent folded.** Maybe this is the way to achieve change?
---
|
---
_A big win for Speaker White_
| **Mississippi desperately needs change. Reformers need to be prepared to ruffle a few feathers in order to achieve it.**

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=a41cd79612&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=de85997fea) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=de85997fea).

# **FOX & Friends Features
Breakthrough Solar
Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans
Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxUjs1OwzAQhJ9mc0tk7_onOeRQiFIhBJw5Va5jt6YxSR2Xqm-PUgESx535tPOZOI_B31rQD4B4DMMCiEAbQDy_X2O6fMTnbbkV7lCe1WuUa4uPgJhvs_tDf75ULpowrqnuiqElPzBRuJZrLmokSaw4tmRrjY1VwhD3Wu29k0QCCblXttmbIrTIUDDJBOeSS1kNiEIYqlFrcsY0INh9pzLRpWANX_LVpDRNsbJTLMb2mPO83MV6wF7MOZ2Qrx1gb8dgT0B9Tl9hAOo4NqwBVJv-qVtP1khAZbzfLZf9GtTEyl8hQHXJcWdNnE04fAJ19PJW_kOK1A7zNYxjWJQGwQ53UzvF7wAAAP__lGxnLA) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxUjs1OwzAQhJ9mc0tk7_onOeRQiFIhBJw5Va5jt6YxSR2Xqm-PUgESx535tPOZOI_B31rQD4B4DMMCiEAbQDy_X2O6fMTnbbkV7lCe1WuUa4uPgJhvs_tDf75ULpowrqnuiqElPzBRuJZrLmokSaw4tmRrjY1VwhD3Wu29k0QCCblXttmbIrTIUDDJBOeSS1kNiEIYqlFrcsY0INh9pzLRpWANX_LVpDRNsbJTLMb2mPO83MV6wF7MOZ2Qrx1gb8dgT0B9Tl9hAOo4NqwBVJv-qVtP1khAZbzfLZf9GtTEyl8hQHXJcWdNnE04fAJ19PJW_kOK1A7zNYxjWJQGwQ53UzvF7wAAAP__lGxnLA) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts
Fear Imminent Threat To
Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** A former CIA Director warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government Is
Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer – spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most – and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxUjs1OwzAQhJ9mc0tk7_onOeRQiFIhBJw5Va5jt6YxSR2Xqm-PUgESx535tPOZOI_B31rQD4B4DMMCiEAbQDy_X2O6fMTnbbkV7lCe1WuUa4uPgJhvs_tDf75ULpowrqnuiqElPzBRuJZrLmokSaw4tmRrjY1VwhD3Wu29k0QCCblXttmbIrTIUDDJBOeSS1kNiEIYqlFrcsY0INh9pzLRpWANX_LVpDRNsbJTLMb2mPO83MV6wF7MOZ2Qrx1gb8dgT0B9Tl9hAOo4NqwBVJv-qVtP1khAZbzfLZf9GtTEyl8hQHXJcWdNnE04fAJ19PJW_kOK1A7zNYxjWJQGwQ53UzvF7wAAAP__lGxnLA). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000
Americans already have it
in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or – what's really cool – with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generator In Action!**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxUjs1OwzAQhJ9mc0tk7_onOeRQiFIhBJw5Va5jt6YxSR2Xqm-PUgESx535tPOZOI_B31rQD4B4DMMCiEAbQDy_X2O6fMTnbbkV7lCe1WuUa4uPgJhvs_tDf75ULpowrqnuiqElPzBRuJZrLmokSaw4tmRrjY1VwhD3Wu29k0QCCblXttmbIrTIUDDJBOeSS1kNiEIYqlFrcsY0INh9pzLRpWANX_LVpDRNsbJTLMb2mPO83MV6wF7MOZ2Qrx1gb8dgT0B9Tl9hAOo4NqwBVJv-qVtP1khAZbzfLZf9GtTEyl8hQHXJcWdNnE04fAJ19PJW_kOK1A7zNYxjWJQGwQ53UzvF7wAAAP__lGxnLA) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. **Customers Are
Raving About Their
Solar Generator** **Joe B.**
"My Patriot Power Generator arrived four days before Ian "the beast" hurricane hit my town. It was a lifesaver. After losing all power, we would have been in absolute darkness with no way to communicate to the outside world. If we needed aid or rescue, it would have been impossible with dead phone batteries. The Patriot Power Generator was everything you said it was and more. I say this with tears in my eyes: I'll never be without at least one. Great product, people! You should be proud!" **Bob A.**
"Could not be happier! Generator works flawlessly, solar works flawlessly, plus all the other goodies in the package are amazing! Would definitely recommend 4Patriots for all your generator and other survival needs! Just spoke with Sienna at customer service to say how much I love the products! Sienna was very courteous and professional!" **Carla U.**
"The ice storms in February left us without any type of electricity for a solid week. If it wasn't for the solar generator, my husband wouldn't have been able to sleep with his CPAP and we would have been in the dark for a week. It was very helpful and very convenient to be able to keep it charging continuously by day in the sun. It's well worth the money. Get off the fence and order this for the safety and security of your family!" **Bernice L.**
"Don't wait to add this vital piece of equipment to your preparedness arsenal! We were able to keep our lights on and our electronic equipment charged for 5 days when the power went out last year. As soon as we could, we purchased another generator!" **Patricia T.**
"This is great not just emergencies, but everyday help as well! I needed to repair my shed, but there's no power out there, and most of my tools are plug-in electric. I was unhappily thinking about running 150ft of extension cords, then remembered my 4Patriots Solar Generator! Worked like a charm. Utterly reliable and easy to use. There's no good reason to put off getting back-up power! Peace of mind and convenience, too! Love it!" **Angel H.**
"Just went through the winter storm. I absolutely love my generator. It is a life saver! We had three days of no power with below freezing temperatures. We have a 3-year old and a 75-year old to take care of, and their lives depend on my ability to provide. I hooked up TV and DVD players, and had small 250-watt heaters. I put the solar panels in the windows all day while our generator was in use. Even though there was no direct sunlight, the panels helped keep the generator charged. After three days, we still had a small charge on our generator while keeping my family entertained and warm enough not to shiver." **Sharon P.**
"Having this generator means I'm not stuck. 4Patriots is by far the best place to shop for your critical emergency needs! I have been a customer since 2017! It's better to be prepared than to start doing that crazy buying that people were doing, for instance, at the start of the pandemic." clean_body: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs... FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. And then BOOM! Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out. Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. But that's not why this generator is going viral... National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat To Our Power Grid Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months! A former CIA Director warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, "Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse." Despite this clear and present danger... Our Government Is Woefully Unprepared They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer – spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator. Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most – and without gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the . THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever. And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on Fox & Friends... And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now. Demand is surging... "It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or – what's really cool – with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE." To your survival, Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. Customers Are Raving About Their Solar Generator Joe B. "My Patriot Power Generator arrived four days before Ian "the beast" hurricane hit my town. It was a lifesaver. After losing all power, we would have been in absolute darkness with no way to communicate to the outside world. If we needed aid or rescue, it would have been impossible with dead phone batteries. The Patriot Power Generator was everything you said it was and more. I say this with tears in my eyes: I'll never be without at least one. Great product, people! You should be proud!" Bob A. "Could not be happier! Generator works flawlessly, solar works flawlessly, plus all the other goodies in the package are amazing! Would definitely recommend 4Patriots for all your generator and other survival needs! Just spoke with Sienna at customer service to say how much I love the products! Sienna was very courteous and professional!" Carla U. "The ice storms in February left us without any type of electricity for a solid week. If it wasn't for the solar generator, my husband wouldn't have been able to sleep with his CPAP and we would have been in the dark for a week. It was very helpful and very convenient to be able to keep it charging continuously by day in the sun. It's well worth the money. Get off the fence and order this for the safety and security of your family!" Bernice L. "Don't wait to add this vital piece of equipment to your preparedness arsenal! We were able to keep our lights on and our electronic equipment charged for 5 days when the power went out last year. As soon as we could, we purchased another generator!" Patricia T. "This is great not just emergencies, but everyday help as well! I needed to repair my shed, but there's no power out there, and most of my tools are plug-in electric. I was unhappily thinking about running 150ft of extension cords, then remembered my 4Patriots Solar Generator! Worked like a charm. Utterly reliable and easy to use. There's no good reason to put off getting back-up power! Peace of mind and convenience, too! Love it!" Angel H. "Just went through the winter storm. I absolutely love my generator. It is a life saver! We had three days of no power with below freezing temperatures. We have a 3-year old and a 75-year old to take care of, and their lives depend on my ability to provide. I hooked up TV and DVD players, and had small 250-watt heaters. I put the solar panels in the windows all day while our generator was in use. Even though there was no direct sunlight, the panels helped keep the generator charged. After three days, we still had a small charge on our generator while keeping my family entertained and warm enough not to shiver." Sharon P. "Having this generator means I'm not stuck. 4Patriots is by far the best place to shop for your critical emergency needs! I have been a customer since 2017! It's better to be prepared than to start doing that crazy buying that people were doing, for instance, at the start of the pandemic."

name: Mayra Flores
subject: Lost my Election

body:
This is probably the hardest email I've ever written.

| |
---
| | | This is probably the hardest email I've ever written. | | |
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=876b7018fa08457e88c52e4279b07d1e&_e=rGFqdX3TKbTNiQuztAGBVX9a92iboH3u3_S8G1hh7pqrKf_a0Uzvpoqs38LEiY0Y5qk_kmC0oPZUZ__pUhzJd729TZi02_gcdi6MXgsZi-l2rTY-gyGLI9zks8flhEtd2XbnhyURqX1qfTiQjckRYTWvIvxrDorWmESfmcuaPh7ZpGk_lgUHhu7S4_Yb-SMjs_EJL0GTocpcFJ85faZPMjYk11MLyQseGtjn9yStdChlCmppt7ShqiZkBpa6XY6wwfepTIf45KRyZkj3oilS56A4kb2VARvKxjg9zv_bd9ZF76wCayQ5UJap_gX21Yl8NbJZ_RqbbwGBBjXCIPHKaMFSjkovASrJJObitWzzGWj0zXVTRwQWLvdNH2oUyKgTF9F3qRz3jVQlUNP922WdmaV99dt9VVwoVB61epHpaf07yWWGGGW-lxObjUL4_n73whIjxZ2u1aOlhhmK2GhEzBVFo-pmyi_DlW45BASYvEw%3D)

Friend --

I wish things would have gone a different way...

This is probably the hardest email I've ever written.

**I 'm Mayra Flores, the America First Hispanic woman running in the biggest race in the nation.**

After we made history and flipped a blue seat red for the first time in 100 years, the Democrats threw the kitchen sink at me, **and I had to concede my race. ** | **Democrat Vicente Gonzalez holds back Republican surge, returns 34th Congressional District to Democratic control.**
---

Everyone expected me to just walk away - _but I 'm not someone who ever, ever gives up._

I'm taking a leap of faith here and have thrown my name on the ballot once again.

The Democrats overpowered us in this race before - _and now all indicators are pointing toward this election being a complete toss-up._

My stomach is in knots - **the Democrats have already raised an astonishing $30 MILLION, and Biden just raised $80 million bucks**(I know, I can't believe anyone would give him money either...but they do).

**That 's why I'm humbly asking for your help: _[Will you step up and chip in just a few bucks in the next hour to help us counter this massive Left-wing onslaught?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=876b7018fa08457e88c52e4279b07d1e&_e=rGFqdX3TKbTNiQuztAGBVX9a92iboH3u3_S8G1hh7pqrKf_a0Uzvpoqs38LEiY0Y5qk_kmC0oPZUZ__pUhzJd729TZi02_gcdi6MXgsZi-l2rTY-gyGLI9zks8flhEtd2XbnhyURqX1qfTiQjckRYTWvIvxrDorWmESfmcuaPh7ZpGk_lgUHhu7S4_Yb-SMjs_EJL0GTocpcFJ85faZPMjYk11MLyQseGtjn9yStdChlCmppt7ShqiZkBpa6XY6wwfepTIf45KRyZkj3oilS56A4kb2VARvKxjg9zv_bd9ZF76wCayQ5UJap_gX21Yl8NbJZ_RqbbwGBBjXCIPHKaAFTV5qJ0JafvQWKJ1RslQLM_h7HI1dvSgE2JB5LbCky4ir4uU4sU5tf3g4DJv6dukPTNM5x-i-w7d6N1mTwC5O5x7dd6GWJFqtbB38mEli0maN6PaijDyjGMfYpGMXXaUoA3Q76Mwi4UrRXNayejmU%3D "Will you step up and chip in just a few bucks in the next hour to help us counter this massive Left-wing onslaught?")_**

I'll just tell you: I'm afraid to see what happens if this email doesn't work.

**The Democrats & the media hacks are terrified of me - that's because as a young Hispanic female, I obliterate every woke narrative they push. So, they will truly do anything to destroy me.**

The Democrats know that if they lose the Hispanic vote, it's over for them. _Forever._

I'm opening my heart to you here: Please, please help out:
| | | [**CONTRIBUTE**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=876b7018fa08457e88c52e4279b07d1e&_e=rGFqdX3TKbTNiQuztAGBVX9a92iboH3u3_S8G1hh7pqrKf_a0Uzvpoqs38LEiY0Y5qk_kmC0oPZUZ__pUhzJd729TZi02_gcdi6MXgsZi-l2rTY-gyGLI9zks8flhEtd2XbnhyURqX1qfTiQjckRYTWvIvxrDorWmESfmcuaPh7ZpGk_lgUHhu7S4_Yb-SMjs_EJL0GTocpcFJ85faZPMjYk11MLyQseGtjn9yStdChlCmppt7ShqiZkBpa6XY6wwfepTIf45KRyZkj3oilS56A4kb2VARvKxjg9zv_bd9ZF76wCayQ5UJap_gX21Yl8NbJZ_RqbbwGBBjXCIPHKaMYa-jUzC6bng3dcYESytXeOrNr08RB_IvsDNIic2vH0PEm-TyE-bFngZoQIX9eALAGsVgwk0sQWwE3UnEqgq89oV1pa6doxi5hvoUkGwthBcXivmbYO3_dVsZ4UnXdZ1Kt96y5zMG-Yvspl8YRldDo%3D)
---
God bless you, and God bless America.

**Mayra Flores**
America First Candidate
Texas Congressional District 34

[Will you chip in a split $20 donation between Colin and Blue Amp Action right now to help him reach enough voters to finally take down Ted Cruz? →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5a474821-3dc9-4094-aab9-c19fc67d6005/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

| | | One thing's for certain: Ted and his extremist donors aren't going down without a fight – and now, FEC reports show that he's got more cash on hand than any other Republican Senate candidate in the country. **But here's the thing: this race is going to be EXPENSIVE, Peter.** If we want to send Ted Cruz on a permanent vacation, we need to build the largest grassroots team that Texas has ever seen, made up of passionate folks like you. **That's why Colin needs your help to reach his critical $500,000 fundraising deadline – and if we fall short, we might not have the resources to run the massive voter outreach operations we need to win.** [**Please: Will you rush $20 right now so that Colin and Blue Amp Action can hit this urgent goal, keep up with Ted Cruz's millions, and finally give Texans the leadership we deserve? If we can just reach enough voters before November, then we have a chance to stop Ted Cruz from getting six more disastrous years in the Senate.** →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0f94290b-7e41-4487-b538-3dce53a782a6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8d076390-6b00-4a4b-9695-24f9913b0e13/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

_– We know Mother’s Day can be difficult for some, so please feel free to disregard the message below. Thank you! –_ **Flowers?** Eh, they’ll die in a week or two. **Chocolates?** Not everyone’s got a sweet tooth. **A gift certificate for a massage?** It’s been done before! No, what your mom, motherly figure, or just yourself needs to celebrate Mother’s Day this year (coming up May 12) is a gift that will be long-lasting — and be a reminder that we’re all in this fight as a big fair maps family! | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84294879/471083528/792484209?refcode=don_ndrc_trddnrs_email_mayfun_email_20240504-NDRC-Red-MothersDay_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20240504-NDRC-Red-MothersDay_&utm_campaign=mayfun&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBkZjY1ZTQwLTE2MGEtZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wyLckGEPA5lALUXPMdFEg4lJN-9sR49_-LYaOTNhosE=&emci=79a49e66-6209-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=0df65e40-160a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=8431045)

And we think your mom or motherly figure knows that it’s _always_ the right time to invest in our fight for fair maps — and look good doing it!

clean_body: You know what they say... mother knows best! | – We know Mother’s Day can be difficult for some, so please feel free to disregard the message below. Thank you! – Flowers? Eh, they’ll die in a week or two. Chocolates? Not everyone’s got a sweet tooth. A gift certificate for a massage? It’s been done before! No, what your mom, motherly figure, or just yourself needs to celebrate Mother’s Day this year (coming up May 12) is a gift that will be long-lasting — and be a reminder that we’re all in this fight as a big fair maps family! | You know what they say: Mother Knows Best! And we think your mom or motherly figure knows that it’s always the right time to invest in our fight for fair maps — and look good doing it! – NDRC Store P.S. Mother’s Day can be the perfect excuse to snag some NDRC merch for yourself, too! = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

The November elections might seem far away, but they’re closer than you think. Here at the DLCC, we’ve already started laying the groundwork for victory.
We’re organizing, strategizing, mobilizing, and doing everything in our power to secure a WIN this fall. While $7 may seem small, at this pivotal moment, **_every single dollar pushes state Democrats forward._**
Your support _right now_ is crucial. Without donations from folks like you, it’ll be nearly impossible to provide our state Dems with the necessary resources to defeat extreme Republicans on Election Day.

Does this look right to you? | DEMOCRATIC SUPPORTER RECORD SUPPORTER: YOUR MAY DONATION: PENDING SUGGESTED DONATION: $7 We are only a few days into May, and we urgently need to make up for the shortfall so we can continue our work in the states. name: David Trone
subject: so grateful for your support this past year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Maryland
body:
It’s hard to believe that it’s already been a year since we launched this campaign. Over the course of the last year, I’ve met some exceptional people — people willing to give their time and talent to support this campaign.

| | Emails like these are an important aspect of our strategy to keep in touch with our supporters. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84295645/471086059/1122037525?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.05.04_B1_Launch_30op&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzMxNjRmMy0xNjBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pp7_LVYwYPmJEa4vcyyCG3H7cwWhOucS5RRHJdX6DLg=) Peter, It’s hard to believe that it’s already been a year since we launched this campaign. Over the course of the last year, I’ve met some exceptional people — people willing to give their time and talent to support this campaign. Why are they doing it? Because they believe in our cause. They believe that we absolutely must keep this Senate seat in Democratic hands — for the good of Maryland and for the good of the entire nation. And they believe that I’m the candidate to make it happen. I’m so grateful for all the support I’ve received from every corner of this state and beyond — and that includes you. No candidate can succeed without a strong grassroots network. You are the heart and soul of this campaign. You are who I’m fighting for every day. The consensus among Republicans is that Larry Hogan is the candidate to turn Maryland red. The consensus among Democrats is that I’m the candidate to beat Larry Hogan. **[On this special day, I’d like to ask you again for your support. I’d be so grateful if you could give whatever amount you can afford as we try to finish strong in this primary election. Thanks for everything that you’ve given to our campaign.
David

If you want to receive fewer emails, If you want to unsubscribe, = Peter, It’s hard to believe that it’s already been a year since we launched this campaign. Over the course of the last year, I’ve met some exceptional people — people willing to give their time and talent to support this campaign. Why are they doing it? Because they believe in our cause. They believe that we absolutely must keep this Senate seat in Democratic hands — for the good of Maryland and for the good of the entire nation. And they believe that I’m the candidate to make it happen. I’m so grateful for all the support I’ve received from every corner of this state and beyond — and that includes you. No candidate can succeed without a strong grassroots network. You are the heart and soul of this campaign. You are who I’m fighting for every day. The consensus among Republicans is that Larry Hogan is the candidate to turn Maryland red. The consensus among Democrats is that I’m the candidate to beat Larry Hogan. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = With your support today, Peter, I know we can win on May 14 and go on to defeat Larry Hogan in November. Thanks for everything that you’ve given to our campaign. David Mitch McConnell's super PAC is preparing to spend hundreds of millions to flip the Senate this year, and we need to be ready to fight back with everything we've got. David Trone knows that the path to holding our Democratic Senate majority runs right through Maryland – that's why he needs our support. | = = David Trone for Maryland P.O. name: Justice Democrats
subject: The #1 recipient of AIPAC money
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

A new report from Sludge shows the most complete, up-to-date view of the
AIPAC network’s donations to congressional candidates this cycle.

Can you guess who received the most from the Republican megadonor-funded
lobby group and its super PACs?

Rep. Jamaal Bowman’s so-called Democratic opponent, George Latimer.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240504-jb.wKEbTW&refcode=em20240504-34615&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1001&akid=34615%2E1203867%2ECNE3t8 ]Screenshot from Sludge report showing AIPAC Money Recipients, with the
top recipient being George Latimer for Congress receiving $1,317,454 from
AIPAC PAC from January 1, 2023 to March 31, 2024.

Latimer tops the list at a whopping $1,317,454 from the same super PAC
that supports anti-abortion and pro-insurrection Republicans. And his
rhetoric and positions reflect it: he’s staunchly anti-ceasefire, opposed
to peaceful pro-Palestinian protests, and has made racist, Islamophobic
claims about Jamaal and others.

He says he’s a Democrat who will take on MAGA, but his donations and
actions say otherwise. Meanwhile, Jamaal has a proven record of standing
up to far-right extremists and fighting for the people of NY-16 and our
country as a whole.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240504-jb.wKEbTW&refcode=em20240504-34615&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=34615%2E1203867%2ECNE3t8 ]We can’t lose a true progressive champion to this AIPAC shill in June.
Will you split $5 or whatever you can afford to Justice
Democrats and Jamaal’s campaign today to help him win his competitive
primary next month?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240504-jb.wKEbTW&refcode=em20240504-34615&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1021&akid=34615%2E1203867%2ECNE3t8 ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240504-34615-footer&t=1022&refcode2=34615_1203867_CNE3t8&akid=34615%2E1203867%2ECNE3t8

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=34615%2E1203867%2ECNE3t8

name: Harry Dunn
subject: not the news I wanted to give you, friend
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=21366%2E4449941%2EVOPm1d)
---
| _Our friend Harry Dunn is running for Congress in Maryland’s Third District.**_I hope you’ll read the message below from him and consider splitting a donation between Harry’s campaign and Fight for Reform._**_
---
Team – can we talk real quick? I need to show you something:

Here's a quick look at this race's TV ad spending:
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42901?t=7&akid=21366%2E4449941%2EVOPm1d)
[**We're being outspent, folks. There are less than two weeks left until Election Day, and a MAGA-super PAC is flooding the airwaves and I'm at risk of not being able to renew my ads. Can you please rush an emergency donation split between me to help save my ads and Fight for Reform to help them elect state and local Democrats?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42901?t=8&akid=21366%2E4449941%2EVOPm1d)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Fight for Reform and Harry Dunn will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42902?t=9&akid=21366%2E4449941%2EVOPm1d)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42903?t=10&akid=21366%2E4449941%2EVOPm1d)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42904?t=11&akid=21366%2E4449941%2EVOPm1d)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42905?t=12&akid=21366%2E4449941%2EVOPm1d)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42906?t=13&akid=21366%2E4449941%2EVOPm1d)
Here's the thing:

1️⃣ Public polling shows me and one of my opponents are neck-and-neck.

2️⃣ But that same opponent is being boosted by a PAC that backs election deniers and insurrection supporters – with more than a MILLION dollars in ad buys.

3️⃣ So now we're being outspent on ads, and that's a dangerous spot to be in less than 4 weeks out from the election.

Billionaires who donate to Donald Trump, Ron Desantis, Ted Cruz and Lauren Boebert are trying to influence this election, Folks. And if I can't raise $50,000 by tomorrow at midnight to renew my ads, they'll dominate the airwaves and crush our chance to defend democracy.

[**Can you chip in anything to Fight for Reform and me to help me win on May 14? Our election is in just 10 days, so there's no time to spare »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42901?t=14&akid=21366%2E4449941%2EVOPm1d)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Fight for Reform and Harry Dunn will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42902?t=15&akid=21366%2E4449941%2EVOPm1d)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42903?t=16&akid=21366%2E4449941%2EVOPm1d)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42904?t=17&akid=21366%2E4449941%2EVOPm1d)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42905?t=18&akid=21366%2E4449941%2EVOPm1d)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42906?t=19&akid=21366%2E4449941%2EVOPm1d)
Together,
Harry
Harry Dunn is only asking for contributions of up to $5,000 from individuals, federal PACs, and other federally permissible sources for End Citizens United-Nonfederal. Harry Dunn is not asking for contributions in excess of that amount or any contributions from corporations, unions, or other federally prohibited sources.

clean_body: | = = Hi, it's Jim Clyburn. I wanted to quickly reach out to you and let you know why I am supporting Harry Dunn for Congress. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Harry is a public servant at heart – that's how I first got to know him. But when his uniform came off, he was still devoted to serving and protecting people. His selflessness and good nature are what will make him an incredible representative for Maryland. He doesn't falter in his values and will always speak up for what is right. He's the right person for the moment our Democratic Caucus is facing. He knows how to combat the severe threat from MAGA-politicians. We have the chance to elect a genuine hero who will always put people above politics – we should not miss this opportunity. = = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for your support.
