name: Mark Hamill (via JoeBiden.com)
subject: This is our fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Joe and Kamala are counting on all of us to make sure that good prevails. | | |
---
Peter, it's Mark Hamill. You may know me from my role as Luke in Star Wars, but I’m reaching out to you on this May the Fourth as a concerned American -- because I know a little bit about what good can do, and what it looks like. Joe and Kamala have been fighting for good to protect our fundamental freedoms. They are defending democracy and ensuring that every American is able to make their voice heard. President Biden speaks often about how every generation has a moment in which they have to stand up and defend democracy, and that this is ours. **That’s why I’m so proud to support them in their fight to secure another four years in the White House -- and it’s why I’m asking you to join me.** [Please: If you are able, will you make your first $25 donation to power President Biden and Vice President Harris’s reelection campaign? Be part of the movement that will defeat Donald Trump and keep our country moving forward.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt0n_-PX9mL8yHKUav8QI_tF02SEYb775JbaVddBglvb5bATKUlRslVui8wRTD29VzFad9sFADsaNX9SFNpLluNEiFQ2jQth959qwv-tQ3OgTrSH6ARrhUTmLBNhAJ6qwljg6pK-qIgdfrfB4uji2agJn6tBTNp0b9B4vloymacXC0RsNtowS7Qg06GtIEQUNA-bSru5VAq6XIDsgyOgHON8uRGQ9JntR1N4D5suHty8waRZNGydyffv_9yO7A8Cpi_f_9Pyfy-gSa93SBZfI6uApBA4pjBev9PvR_9R2f1066i5B2OsLup9rToXMuuy7ITmFvWBuutNYID_Bwac6s29Pj_QPwl_UJ99BeGiVYnMW3sUnZM1k-EasZMw3ErGR5mp4mWiI4G_0pfZXUE_mWf6lDHY9G_HbpxErn78k4nr_au2BjRuzI89cOylVYzg7J4r7-y3SWtLmHcufOoJiHL/462/GLtd3FGXQ0aLZTgfWjqytA/h0/h001.Jb1MrrNdynL-xWrftFvwXMiEmJOHHf88ngITgsGzkRY) Peter, we know what far-Right extremists will do to our country if we let them. They’ve already put forward dangerous ideas like banning abortion nationwide, cutting Social Security and Medicare, and raising taxes for the middle class. Plus, they’re planning on undoing the progress Joe and Kamala have made on climate change, lowering costs, and more. Our fundamental freedoms are at stake in this election, and Joe and Kamala are fighting harder than ever to protect them. They can win this fight -- but only if we help _them_ by pitching in whatever we can at critical moments like these. [Join me in pitching in $25 today, because this is our fight for our fate. Joe and Kamala are our hope for the future, and they’re counting on us to keep the faith and support their campaign by pitching in $5, $10, or whatever you can afford today.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt0n_-PX9mL8yHKUav8QI_tF02SEYb775JbaVddBglvb5bATKUlRslVui8wRTD29VzFad9sFADsaNX9SFNpLluNEiFQ2jQth959qwv-tQ3OgYHF5QdtIRpimUV8cAEHFGaFi5IX_m9NNiZoPoW8QKkFgW1a-2eMCkhDcnxLNW9pWUXVZVRk2nDGJAxdfA5Fk-HDDd2S2hPkh9SyMLU32QVCEa9BJuSWbAjQ4-nktCwiV9PMmEcKx_GLH_xYSpPD9f9_Qx14KUtEsVZp0JsQnSOijT7lBYGBX-hglzyZMQ5mBQIAr_BKnmTpD6XzLX9_7zEDmP_H3qB5P1HGdngMSDXWCc3_ZshoFj04jWIy1ENtv4YwHR0wQWsZL8exVgzPcXtx6_GOwL9XuI1whjuV5fri0Fe_C00uruDnTpgeEYaOfob3YUfYntdWNARUwQ0kPXBxGfkIFMI9JdddOjfXA4f5/462/GLtd3FGXQ0aLZTgfWjqytA/h1/h001.4jLdRiSJIdKtgQT9yGiS20QEbcet0nN3xLWj5EOfGYA) | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: Joe and Kamala are counting on all of us to make sure that good prevails. | | | Peter, it's Mark Hamill. You may know me from my role as Luke in Star Wars, but I’m reaching out to you on this May the Fourth as a concerned American -- because I know a little bit about what good can do, and what it looks like. Joe and Kamala have been fighting for good to protect our fundamental freedoms. They are defending democracy and ensuring that every American is able to make their voice heard. President Biden speaks often about how every generation has a moment in which they have to stand up and defend democracy, and that this is ours. That’s why I’m so proud to support them in their fight to secure another four years in the White House -- and it’s why I’m asking you to join me. Peter, we know what far-Right extremists will do to our country if we let them. They’ve already put forward dangerous ideas like banning abortion nationwide, cutting Social Security and Medicare, and raising taxes for the middle class. Plus, they’re planning on undoing the progress Joe and Kamala have made on climate change, lowering costs, and more. Our fundamental freedoms are at stake in this election, and Joe and Kamala are fighting harder than ever to protect them. They can win this fight -- but only if we help them by pitching in whatever we can at critical moments like these. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you for all you're doing, Mark Hamill

name: No Dem Left Behind
subject: Remember the First Amendment?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC
body:
Our government doesn't...
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/maga-os?refcode=long)
---
|
---
|
# What First Amendment?
---
| [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/no-dem-left-behind-pac-1)
---
Here at No Dem Left Behind we have a team that travels all over America. We travel to DC to meet with our leaders and representatives, but we’re also in boonies of Wisconsin and the concrete canyon of New York. We know rural, and we know urban, and we see the way people become wrapped up in the perspective they see around them day to day. The common fight, the good fight, is always against hatred and violence. Most folks around the country agree, even if they don’t see eye to eye on how we get there. The trouble comes when there are baddies. Men like Vladimir Putin and Benjamin Netanyahu – groups like Hamas – have the capacity to unleash vast amounts of evil, and often we can’t help but fight fire with fire. Bad men must be stopped. That is why we are speaking out against the new house antisemitism bill, the Antisemitism Awareness Act. Far from preventing antisemitism, this bill would misidentify criticism of Israel with antisemitism. This is unthinkable. **Our government wishes to curb our free speech in service of a dictator,** in service of a foreign government. This is unthinkable, undemocratic, and as un-American as anything the House has ever passed. This bill would prevent Jewish people from criticising a state committing genocide in their name, curbing their right to autonomy and self expression. But don’t take it from us. **The ACLU has condemned the bill** , saying it “would likely chill free speech of students on college campuses by**incorrectly equating criticism of the Israeli government with antisemitism**.” The Jewish-led group, Americans for Peace Now, have said that **the lawmakers behind this bill “aren't interested in protecting Jews**. They are interested in supporting right-wing views and narratives on Israel and shutting down legitimate questions and criticisms by crying 'antisemite' at everyone, including Jews.” This bears out:**Mary E Miller (R-IL), who oversaw debate on the antisemitism bill** as pro tempore speaker, once said in a speech at the Capitol, **“Hitler was right on one thing.”** These people have no interest in stopping antisemitism. This bill is wrong, and presents a real threat to our freedom of speech. **How is it that we are allowed to be more critical of our own government than Israel?**

---

– No Dem Left Behind

name: Bernie Moreno
subject: Sherrod’s shameless flip-flop
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate
body:
We are not fooled by Sherrod Brown's empty words and spineless pandering. | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=0822ec289312469b813de5fca8dde8ce&_e=rD13rC5PCJPvkBGI9pm7uZT304lJcsquEchWFqUR6jdZgBbSKz1AVvMeMWUqJRWGb7sdcVukO22QbBqdzcZfBINd4Ds6zpE46_SD8rtBx--H8PLjdf0IJ8-93AVIF4nIkvWBaWhery_FEExIrqCRmeNfpYkD2fbLvy6oDiUr2F5fGJ06wp21we7edTYbIFxGVa3Nt8INSuTShKniK3_PAP2nbRM0cfMN1ZQBY3Zvu6IiHrnKc7G0ZN3EbzCagkI-KJ2Lu2Vpra2rmEZhXY4_T9vVExjpQXjAjk8vOFAZSa-xR2r77Yxcy3NCcynTvinzeWzkRczbqBcfsXce3geZIryU0Adfs0lIxcGcY0Ha1lnklX2F0K0zFJReYQkUcUsrTsIMq0OMQOpWUt2ef7P1oihKbGHufybv30Uu3-3XpLc%3D)
---
Fellow patriot,

My far-left opponent, Sherrod Brown has shown his true colors – and they’re not red, white, and blue. _**They’re stained with hypocrisy and weakness.**_

**First ➜** Brown sank to a new low by endorsing the despicable antisemitic, pro-Hamas protests and encampments spreading like wildfire across our college campuses.

**Then ➜** He refused to call these pro-Hamas terrorist sympathizers what they are: _They’re vile, violent, antisemitic radicals who spread chaos and division._

**Now ➜** Brown shamelessly flip-flopped his stance after facing a mountain of backlash from Patriots like you and me, conveniently forgetting his initial nod of approval of these despicable acts.

[ **FIRE HYPOCRITE SHERROD BROWN** ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=0822ec289312469b813de5fca8dde8ce&_e=rD13rC5PCJPvkBGI9pm7uZT304lJcsquEchWFqUR6jdZgBbSKz1AVvMeMWUqJRWGb7sdcVukO22QbBqdzcZfBINd4Ds6zpE46_SD8rtBx--H8PLjdf0IJ8-93AVIF4nIkvWBaWhery_FEExIrqCRmeNfpYkD2fbLvy6oDiUr2F5fGJ06wp21we7edTYbIFxGVa3Nt8INSuTShKniK3_PAP2nbRM0cfMN1ZQBY3Zvu6IiHrnKc7G0ZN3EbzCagkI-KJ2Lu2Vpra2rmEZhXY4_T1N-JanHZL5E-NLOEJkw_SBKeyzjQ6obmKUNHiySYZK9Hs11wISSk_QCIM9JhhaMSQZBBg3wsKsc0Xacfr1kpGKnLZwYwfHdBtN3jQKJsnXkMOoaN3B_2yY6sPR2FwAB_6UbYuEvFUBYFkmSUbxwxTQ%3D)
_**We are not fooled by Sherrod Brown's empty words and spineless pandering.**_

_Let’s be crystal clear_ : he’s shown that he’s willing to sacrifice principles for political gain, abandoning the rule of law in favor of appeasing the radical left. [**We can no longer allow anti-American politicians like this to represent us.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=0822ec289312469b813de5fca8dde8ce&_e=rD13rC5PCJPvkBGI9pm7uZT304lJcsquEchWFqUR6jdZgBbSKz1AVvMeMWUqJRWGb7sdcVukO22QbBqdzcZfBINd4Ds6zpE46_SD8rtBx--H8PLjdf0IJ8-93AVIF4nIkvWBaWhery_FEExIrqCRmeNfpYkD2fbLvy6oDiUr2F5fGJ06wp21we7edTYbIFxGVa3Nt8INSuTShKniK3_PAP2nbRM0cfMN1ZQBY3Zvu6IiHrnKc7G0ZN3EbzCagkI-KJ2Lu2Vpra2rmEZhXY4_TyY3RXsJbvmP6dSbWYj77Qa1RKFPdg2kmi2UqtXQYMlFLiNbW9HZH6Hc8vnEj3BXJMxC06T65WTSdXgFsIw3NWvdIXGvcpFF-fA0q8YQr3vLTs2cSVKCycQ0Kg2LK-We9OZgpW5wYLtMeSWfB3e6GOM%3D) Ohio deserves better. America deserves better.

We deserve a Senator who will unwaveringly stand for law and order, who will never waver in the face of leftist pressure, and who will _**ALWAYS**_ support American interests; not those of terrorist organizations keen on destroying our country.

I need you to stand with me, fellow patriot, because Sherrod Brown will continue kowtowing to the radical Left –[**can you chip in 10 bucks now to fire him?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=0822ec289312469b813de5fca8dde8ce&_e=rD13rC5PCJPvkBGI9pm7uZT304lJcsquEchWFqUR6jdZgBbSKz1AVvMeMWUqJRWGb7sdcVukO22QbBqdzcZfBINd4Ds6zpE46_SD8rtBx--H8PLjdf0IJ8-93AVIF4nIkvWBaWhery_FEExIrqCRmeNfpYkD2fbLvy6oDiUr2F5fGJ06wp21we7edTYbIFxGVa3Nt8INSuTShKniK3_PAP2nbRM0cfMN1ZQBY3Zvu6IiHrnKc7G0ZN3EbzCagkI-eS0OZeI9jrUGCl5EpIodTv1NkGK0YrIrEH9R5x1zWtTK_6rhb0HppTD5B3PbDK8gso4IpOjZhbgaPvY1cqIRKbDn-H8DH0XxB5Ot0JQIykCDKfHWnukxnU-aAO0Uj_RE1_5xdhMHa5zXZ1RFZ_JNzLPw7Fv2o5cYAGRNXqSJrQhGJDaXHRaEzi98ZtRmkLbm)

Thank you for your support.

For America,
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=0822ec289312469b813de5fca8dde8ce&_e=rD13rC5PCJPvkBGI9pm7uZT304lJcsquEchWFqUR6jdZgBbSKz1AVvMeMWUqJRWGb7sdcVukO22QbBqdzcZfBINd4Ds6zpE46_SD8rtBx--H8PLjdf0IJ8-93AVIF4nIkvWBaWhery_FEExIrqCRmeNfpYkD2fbLvy6oDiUr2F5fGJ06wp21we7edTYbIFxGVa3Nt8INSuTShKniK3_PAP2nbRM0cfMN1ZQBY3Zvu6IiHrnKc7G0ZN3EbzCagkI-KJ2Lu2Vpra2rmEZhXY4_T-sF8FTwnRNP2H2A-mHdFpqsmF5WGF3c6uX3VDxnS6GpqAIZbU-14RWgjJWnfIUQaX3XkC7kFmd5N872V4rul8sIWAhKkIZLym5bAGL9XsMQ9RPBuZ8WN8uiFsxEuw-EaZgqOWhDvyr3LEQazcJE_Ho%3D)
Bernie Moreno
GOP Nominee for Senate, Ohio

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=0822ec289312469b813de5fca8dde8ce&_e=rD13rC5PCJPvkBGI9pm7uZT304lJcsquEchWFqUR6jdZgBbSKz1AVvMeMWUqJRWGb7sdcVukO22QbBqdzcZfBINd4Ds6zpE46_SD8rtBx--H8PLjdf0IJ8-93AVIF4nIkvWBaWhery_FEExIrqCRmeNfpYkD2fbLvy6oDiUr2F5fGJ06wp21we7edTYbIFxGVa3Nt8INSuTShKniK3_PAP2nbRM0cfMN1ZQBY3Zvu6IiHrnKc7G0ZN3EbzCagkI-KJ2Lu2Vpra2rmEZhXY4_T9gdWgL1WJL7GfwpIBL1x-nalhVMM_bUl0DSizz9YVxeRO4qXNwML4AUJOJ06dpOkGOnEWxLzZdqmC9N85GHF4bbfHsVEVzxlkYCxEa8tTwFEmuwNcJMNYZ3RAIcvxGwukqt6k8hHTHadda0mA9tee4%3D) Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

[ ** Join Bernie ➞ **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=0822ec289312469b813de5fca8dde8ce&_e=rD13rC5PCJPvkBGI9pm7uZT304lJcsquEchWFqUR6jdZgBbSKz1AVvMeMWUqJRWGb7sdcVukO22QbBqdzcZfBINd4Ds6zpE46_SD8rtBx--H8PLjdf0IJ8-93AVIF4nIkvWBaWhery_FEExIrqCRmeNfpYkD2fbLvy6oDiUr2F5fGJ06wp21we7edTYbIFxGVa3Nt8INSuTShKniK3_PAP2nbRM0cfMN1ZQBY3Zvu6IiHrnKc7G0ZN3EbzCagkI-KJ2Lu2Vpra2rmEZhXY4_T3LzzrRx5H_pETrxOCf8MLAWLT-c1bPk7M6C4ltpSSFgAikAaXMQmoA1k-jqAo1tmR4bmqctu8MBmA0HtolxTs5YwmDNJKq-MB7-_Y9997B7_bb6MIMfluZSUHxXZLeEaD4ONAges2YNqqaMEhO1Jf4%3D)

clean_body: We are not fooled by Sherrod Brown's empty words and spineless pandering. | Fellow patriot, My far-left opponent, Sherrod Brown has shown his true colors – and they’re not red, white, and blue. They’re stained with hypocrisy and weakness. First ➜ Brown sank to a new low by endorsing the despicable antisemitic, pro-Hamas protests and encampments spreading like wildfire across our college campuses. Then ➜ He refused to call these pro-Hamas terrorist sympathizers what they are: They’re vile, violent, antisemitic radicals who spread chaos and division. Now ➜ Brown shamelessly flip-flopped his stance after facing a mountain of backlash from Patriots like you and me, conveniently forgetting his initial nod of approval of these despicable acts. We are not fooled by Sherrod Brown's empty words and spineless pandering. Let’s be crystal clear : he’s shown that he’s willing to sacrifice principles for political gain, abandoning the rule of law in favor of appeasing the radical left. Ohio deserves better. America deserves better. We deserve a Senator who will unwaveringly stand for law and order, who will never waver in the face of leftist pressure, and who will ALWAYS support American interests; not those of terrorist organizations keen on destroying our country. I need you to stand with me, fellow patriot, because Sherrod Brown will continue kowtowing to the radical Left – Thank you for your support. For America, Bernie Moreno GOP Nominee for Senate, Ohio Meet Bernie Moreno: | Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18. Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America. In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board. After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation. Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First. Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has. FOLLOW BERNIE ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

NEW YORK—The second week of witness testimony in former President
Donald Trump’s trial concluded Friday without clear evidence of the
crimes he allegedly committed. The jury has heard mentions of
salacious stories about celebrities, been introduced to the world of
tabloid magazines and peaked into the inner-workings of Trump’s
campaign, but witness testimony has not yet established key portions
of prosecutors’ claims.

body:
We’ve shown that we’re bringing a different kind of politics to New Jersey – we can do that now by showing that the grassroots is what drives Democratic politics in our state.

| | When we first launched our campaign, we seized the moment. [**We have strong momentum, and before I continue, I'm asking you to help keep our momentum going by pitching in today**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84300550/471099745/-1197072038?refcode=2024-05-04-nobody&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=ba0b2c8b-1c0a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTBiMmM4Yi0xYzBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDNccLUiFYUQ9vB7TTadaSUwhTlVHQ6jhNH2YJR1inE=) Bob Menendez has clearly betrayed the trust of New Jersey voters, and while his guilt will be decided in the courts, it's clear that he is not fit to remain as our Senator. The allegations we have seen against him are alarming; it's why I was the first in New Jersey to call on him to resign, and it's why I'm running in this race. We've shown that we're bringing a different kind of politics to New Jersey – we can do that now by showing that the grassroots is what drives Democratic politics in our state. Nobody saw our campaign coming, and nobody thought our grassroots campaign could win, but we're proving them wrong. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84300551/471099746/-1197072038?refcode=2024-05-04-nobody&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=ba0b2c8b-1c0a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTBiMmM4Yi0xYzBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDNccLUiFYUQ9vB7TTadaSUwhTlVHQ6jhNH2YJR1inE=) We started this campaign by saying we need to restore integrity and trust to our politics. We've built a grassroots movement to do that and that doesn't end because we've become the clear frontrunner in the Democratic primary. Right now, we need to build the biggest effort possible to win to help not only our campaign, but also support our Democratic candidates down ballot in November. We have Congressional seats we need to win and other elections that we need to show up for. **Mobilizing our grassroots army today will help keep New Jersey blue and showcase that a better kind of politics is possible.** We need to make sure that we have the resources to compete against a potential self-funding GOP opponent and a potential Independent Menendez candidacy in one of the most expensive states in the country to run in. **Every day, our campaign is growing stronger and our momentum is undeniable.** Now, I need your support to keep our campaign going strong. [**Your donation, no matter the amount, is a crucial investment in a better future for New Jersey and good governance as a whole. Can I count on you to pitch in whatever you can to help us get a strong start this month and help us grow our grassroots campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84300552/471099747/-1197072038?refcode=2024-05-04-nobody&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=ba0b2c8b-1c0a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTBiMmM4Yi0xYzBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDNccLUiFYUQ9vB7TTadaSUwhTlVHQ6jhNH2YJR1inE=) [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84300553/471099748/-1197072038?refcode=2024-05-04-nobody&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=ba0b2c8b-1c0a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTBiMmM4Yi0xYzBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wDNccLUiFYUQ9vB7TTadaSUwhTlVHQ6jhNH2YJR1inE=) More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: We’ve shown that we’re bringing a different kind of politics to New Jersey – we can do that now by showing that the grassroots is what drives Democratic politics in our state. | | | | When we first launched our campaign, we seized the moment. = Bob Menendez has clearly betrayed the trust of New Jersey voters, and while his guilt will be decided in the courts, it's clear that he is not fit to remain as our Senator. The allegations we have seen against him are alarming; it's why I was the first in New Jersey to call on him to resign, and it's why I'm running in this race. We've shown that we're bringing a different kind of politics to New Jersey – we can do that now by showing that the grassroots is what drives Democratic politics in our state. Nobody saw our campaign coming, and nobody thought our grassroots campaign could win, but we're proving them wrong. = We started this campaign by saying we need to restore integrity and trust to our politics. We've built a grassroots movement to do that and that doesn't end because we've become the clear frontrunner in the Democratic primary. Right now, we need to build the biggest effort possible to win to help not only our campaign, but also support our Democratic candidates down ballot in November. We have Congressional seats we need to win and other elections that we need to show up for. Mobilizing our grassroots army today will help keep New Jersey blue and showcase that a better kind of politics is possible. We need to make sure that we have the resources to compete against a potential self-funding GOP opponent and a potential Independent Menendez candidacy in one of the most expensive states in the country to run in. Every day, our campaign is growing stronger and our momentum is undeniable. Now, I need your support to keep our campaign going strong. = = More soon, Andy | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by . name: Ruben Gallego for Senate
subject: Your support is the lifeblood of our campaign for democracy in Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
You've put us on the path to victory this November, but we're just getting started.
#

Good morning, Peter.
[**With nothing less than control of the Senate, the White House and the future of American democracy on the line and on the ballot in Arizona this November, will you make a contribution to our campaign today?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-may24.hD4hyN&refcode=em240504-1-160&t=1&akid=2293%2E734936%2Ep3hglb)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-may24.hD4hyN&refcode=em240504-1-160&t=2&akid=2293%2E734936%2Ep3hglb)
**Your support is key to running a campaign of hope and unity that has already given us a head start in organizing and on television across all of Arizona.**
You've put us on the path to victory this November, **but we're just getting started.**
**In the coming months we must redouble and triple our efforts** as the attack ads ramp up against Ruben Gallego. They've already begun.
**All of you have earned the appreciation and admiration of future generations who want to live on a habitable planet where fundamental rights are guaranteed and democracy flourishes.**
But there is much more to do.
[**We cannot overstate the importance of your engagement. Please super-charge our campaign for victory in Arizona with a $3 contribution today.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-may24.hD4hyN&refcode=em240504-1-160&t=3&akid=2293%2E734936%2Ep3hglb)

subject: Join us to help put Jill on the Ballot!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024
body:
Join our May Series of Ballot Access Sessions

| | | [](http://www.jillstein2024.com?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ballot_access_series&n=1)
---
Peter**,** Join us as we continue our series of informative and action-based sessions, every Monday throughout May, on how to ensure Jill is on the ballot! **Your support is _crucial_ to bring our campaign to every voter!** Only through local and regional organizing can we put Jill and the Green Party on the ballot across the country. This full May Ballot Access Series includes:
May 6 - New York Intensive
May 13 - Planning Successful Petitioning Events
May 20 \- Petitioner Training
May 27 - End of Month State Reports
---
[ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/ba_0506?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ballot_access_series&n=2)
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/ba_0506?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ballot_access_series&n=3 "RSVP NOW") [RSVP NOW](https://www.jillstein2024.com/ba_0506?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ballot_access_series&n=3)
---
**BALLOT ACCESS: NEW YORK INTENSIVE
****May 6, 7PM EST / 4PM PST** Join Campaign Staff and others for a discussion of why these ballot access drives in New York are so important.

| | Dear Fellow American, If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you.
---
| | Having you and all of America's baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees... ...well, as they say, "Those were the days." But this email isn't about baseball. In fact, it's a email I never thought I'd be writing to you.
---
| [](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=0bc89d424fa347b894b7c7d09dc01b8c&_e=286a3BOb5lWVYjnWaw85AvhYLYHhWdSiaR7Iv8OBaiTCmoWHzUIHro7msICwwZ9jBD_Ff73_nxdVXLjlVKLFoQwhl2LuZrzcFJhNP-GQqCuzHaHAXhcflhtgmVwSr-4CvJ1qhz-IdH9IzNL70jC365qHQyBa6lPh1C-1Wbvq5_49HgKbo7qMtlWp1vwEQnKMDBcVC-AkSgx-IeLMcKvzE9ef07N5NPJ55jGzVMpNDA_YqX66yNdRVEjIbF04RYarN3i3j54Py11D2gJge_AnR4RQ3kBcXAkx9oWSPS9liEP7vMlmUMVifsd9sbZQSvA2ShLeDwLv6nRzip_yFKFy3f7GV6SNjxIzSK07a1aWGVfyk-Q0fYsCJ4ZhpxJqHO3YBaachOqxm-qXW7eCDidgqA%3D%3D)
---
| | **[Today, I'm asking you to help me defeat the radical Adam Schiff for a seat in the United States Senate.](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=0bc89d424fa347b894b7c7d09dc01b8c&_e=286a3BOb5lWVYjnWaw85AvhYLYHhWdSiaR7Iv8OBaiTCmoWHzUIHro7msICwwZ9jBD_Ff73_nxdVXLjlVKLFoQwhl2LuZrzcFJhNP-GQqCuzHaHAXhcflhtgmVwSr-4CvJ1qhz-IdH9IzNL70jC365qHQyBa6lPh1C-1Wbvq5_49HgKbo7qMtlWp1vwEQnKMDBcVC-AkSgx-IeLMcKvzE9ef07N5NPJ55jGzVMpNDA-eVVDEYVsHZ-nhmpoagbt7yX6yKSGrCVSU8KGeW1iMJ0Gdn5YZuDBKqpOq2saX5JuAhJvHOZARubSCZTrBf8RjW4Rr54aGSaAPGaggAzhLwsxyF_2OJhCoTcozRmq5ypkQRcqc6FeexB1CxM8iLpnqAOCtoyTCXKAi1un2KdrFdg%3D%3D)** As of March 5th, it's official. I'm going head-to-head with Adam Schiff in November. Democrat policies have brought America to its knees. There's fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California. Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. And that's why I'm running for Senate. **_We Republicans_ pulled our country out of the 1970's Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan.** And I believe we can do it again by putting classic conservative values at the heart of everything we do. But there is no way I can pull it off without you. **[**Will you rush a contribution to my campaign of $35 or more today?**](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=0bc89d424fa347b894b7c7d09dc01b8c&_e=286a3BOb5lWVYjnWaw85AvhYLYHhWdSiaR7Iv8OBaiTCmoWHzUIHro7msICwwZ9jBD_Ff73_nxdVXLjlVKLFoQwhl2LuZrzcFJhNP-GQqCuzHaHAXhcflhtgmVwSr-4CvJ1qhz-IdH9IzNL70jC365qHQyBa6lPh1C-1Wbvq5_49HgKbo7qMtlWp1vwEQnKMDBcVC-AkSgx-IeLMcKvzE9ef07N5NPJ55jGzVMpNDA-yLL7m4C32443wbUA9t031SFNYf0FK5HcWj-ZMrY5XXpv90KUkNWvCXhwwx1uHB7dUoXoWgKSpYbWdt4d11Ipo3qb4ySf4vaBsMmF81bKElG7J9DCzOFMt12reF0CrngC-L6NyxRvXWTwMEcT7xeQkllBrpMFZDVHZie1WDqh8Cg%3D%3D)** I've lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you -\- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I've never seen before. They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California... I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a _**Republican win**_. I'm fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I'm not just taking the field for Californians. clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Fellow American, If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you. | | Having you and all of America's baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees... ...well, as they say, "Those were the days." But this email isn't about baseball. In fact, it's a email I never thought I'd be writing to you. | | | As of March 5th, it's official. I'm going head-to-head with Adam Schiff in November. Democrat policies have brought America to its knees. There's fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California. Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. And that's why I'm running for Senate. We Republicans pulled our country out of the 1970's Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan. And I believe we can do it again by putting classic conservative values at the heart of everything we do. But there is no way I can pull it off without you. I've lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you -\- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I've never seen before. They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California... I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a Republican win. I'm fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I'm not just taking the field for Californians. When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff... ...we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs. Thank you and God Bless, | | Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE PO Box 532389 Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389 | | This Email was Sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com If you would like to stop recieving our emails **** |

But in case you need a brief refresher on AG James' work so far, here are some highlights: \+ Letitia James stood tall against some of the nation'swealthiest and most powerful men and did not let them scare her away from her fight to hold them accountable. \+ Letitia James successfully sued Big Pharma for their astronomically high prescription drug prices and their role in the opioid epidemic – ultimately winning BILLIONS for New Yorkers. \+ When Roe v. Wade was overturned, AG James sprung into action to make New York a safe haven for all those seeking an abortion. \+ And Letitia James went toe to toe with the gun lobby for their role in the gun violence epidemic, which claims the lives of tens of thousands of New Yorkers every year. And we could keep going. Peter, when Letitia James made history and became New York's first Black attorney general, she vowed to be a voice for the voiceless and fight for the powerless. And we think she's accomplished just that – but before the election year picks up steam, we urgently need to know what you think. This poll will only stay live until 11:59 p.m., so please take just a moment now to tell us: | | Do you approve of Attorney General Letitia James? | | | | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY 2026 PO Box 20656 Brooklyn, NY 11202 United States | | Paid for by James for NY 2026

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: As a mom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
I'm doing this for my kids
| | |
---
This is what keeps me up at night, friend: **My three kids are growing up in a state with fewer freedoms than I had at their age. **

You don't need to be a parent to experience the same sinking feeling I get when I think about that. But as a mother — and the daughter of a woman who sought out freedom for her family — it hits hard.
My family lived under a dictatorship in Ecuador where corrupt politicians prevented any true liberty. It's why my mom immigrated our family to the United States when I was just 14, why she worked double shifts as a home health care provider, and why I worked in a doughnut shop to help my family make ends meet. **It's because America was the promise of freedom. The promise of opportunity to _do_ anything and _be_ anything we set our minds to.**
But now, corrupt politicians like my opponent, Sen. Rick Scott, are taking away our freedoms instead of protecting them. He is directly responsible for confirming Supreme Court justices that eviscerated reproductive rights. Now, Florida has one of the most extreme abortion bans in the entire nation — a dangerous erosion of liberty my kids are forced to grow up under.
When corrupt politicians like Rick Scott attack one freedom, they never stop there. **That's why I'm running for Senate to stop him.**

I'm in this fight for my kids, for my state of Florida, and to preserve that same promise of liberty that called out to me when I was just a young girl living under a dictatorship. **With polling showing me _ahead_ of Rick Scott right now, I know we can win this — but I need your help to do it, friend.**
**[If you share my urgency for protecting our freedoms — and defeating corrupt politicians like Rick Scott — then please, make a donation of $5 or whatever you can to help me win in Florida. Rick Scott spent $64 million of his own fortune to win this seat last time around, so I can only compete and win with your grassroots support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84304329/471110201/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1166-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDQ3NTNmNmItMjEwYS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QncbGCrqiOsxtEYZ3CdJUwpYXhgTW6oUASQKuZ45024=)**

subject: It's looking very bad, friend

our campaign is hanging on by a thread

subject: May the 4th: Help Biden Defend Democracy Against Trump's Empire!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84304805/471111131/1124992383?refcode=EmailLogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUxNWIzN2I3LTIxMGEtZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ywP4b-acoJW3yX60Kj6Dm9nHS5OvBF5RXr2LrfnxrMY=)
---
This Star Wars Day, as the galaxy celebrates with the classic cheer "May the Fourth be with you," let's channel that energy into the real battle here on Earth—**the battle to keep Joe Biden in the White House and thwart Donald Trump's return.**

Like the epic struggle between the Light Side and the Dark Side, our fight is against those who threaten our democracy.

name: Rev. Darrius Butler
subject: Why we're here
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY REV BUTLER FOR GEORGIA
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/112497/images/butler%202024%20logo.png]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/112497/images/IMG_8377.jpg]
Friend,
For years, I have dedicated my life to serving our community as a minister. Through my work, I have witnessed firsthand the struggles and challenges faced by so many of our neighbors. I have listened to their stories, their hopes, and their fears. And I have come to realize that we are at a pivotal moment in our nation's history.
We are facing crises on multiple fronts – from economic inequality and healthcare disparities to racial injustice and climate change. These are not just political issues; they are moral imperatives that demand action.
As a person of faith, I believe that we are called to stand up for those who have been marginalized and oppressed. We are called to speak truth to power and to work towards a more just and equitable society. And that is why I have chosen to run for Congress [http://www.darriusbutler.com] . I believe that we need leaders who will prioritize the needs of the most vulnerable among us – who will fight for healthcare for all, for criminal justice reform, for economic opportunity, and for environmental justice.
But I also believe that we need leaders who are willing to listen, to collaborate, and to find common ground. Too often, our politics are characterized by division and partisanship. But I believe that we can do better. We can come together across party lines to find real solutions to the challenges we face.
So I am asking for your support as I embark on this journey. Together, I believe that we can build a brighter future for our community and for our country.
Thank you for your friendship, your support, and your prayers.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/112497/images/signature%20%281%29.png] Visit The Website [http://www.darriusbutler.com]
https://www.facebook.com/butlerforgeorgia [https://www.facebook.com/butlerforgeorgia] https://twitter.com/revdbutler [https://twitter.com/revdbutler] https://www.linkedin.com/darriusbutler [https://www.linkedin.com/darriusbutler]
PAID FOR BY REV BUTLER FOR GEORGIA
Reverend Butler For Congress
2929 Watson Blvd Suite 2 PMB 407
Warrner Robins, GA 31093
United States

subject: Donald Trump’s blockbuster interview
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
|
#

Team, A few days ago, Donald Trump once again reminded women across the country just how extreme he is on the issue of abortion. We already know he will ban abortion nationwide if he gets the chance, but get this: **in a recent blockbuster interview in _Time Magazine_ , he said that states should have the power to _punish women_ for having abortions, and that he’d allow states to _monitor women’s pregnancies._** **That is _despicable._** Since Donald Trump overturned _Roe v. Wade,_ women are being denied critical, life-saving, reproductive health care because they live in a state that banned abortion. Now, he stoops even lower. **[We cannot let Donald Trump live out his authoritarian fantasy. clean_body: | Team, A few days ago, Donald Trump once again reminded women across the country just how extreme he is on the issue of abortion. We already know he will ban abortion nationwide if he gets the chance, but get this: in a recent blockbuster interview in Time Magazine , he said that states should have the power to punish women for having abortions, and that he’d allow states to monitor women’s pregnancies. That is despicable. Since Donald Trump overturned Roe v. Wade, women are being denied critical, life-saving, reproductive health care because they live in a state that banned abortion. Now, he stoops even lower. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Trump knows that Michigan represents his best shot to return to the White House and pass a whole host of anti-choice measures. But here’s what he doesn’t know: women have proven over and over again that we will show up to the ballot box as many times as it takes to protect our fundamental freedoms. In 2024, we will show up again. = = When the stakes are this high, every bit helps. We’re grateful for whatever you’re able to give today. — Team Fight Like Hell PAC Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

I’m running for Congress in Virginia to fight back against Trump and the far-right Republicans who enable his abuse of power and attacks on our Democracy.
_[Click here to stop receiving emails about Eugene Vindman's campaign in Virginia from us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84306128/471114251/1557491702?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTNiZWFkMy0yMjBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o0x-w_XZjOZxAY3R6FR6q13A2KfPsq53lGHAa1GMnNI=&emci=3071dadf-5e09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=fa3bead3-220a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=19445147)_
Hello — give me just a moment to tell you the story of a phone call that changed everything.
I’m Eugene Vindman. My brother Alex and I used to serve on the White House National Security Council. I was the senior ethics official on the Council.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84306129/471114252/1582186816?refcode=em20240504am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=fa3bead3-220a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTNiZWFkMy0yMjBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o0x-w_XZjOZxAY3R6FR6q13A2KfPsq53lGHAa1GMnNI=)
In 2019, Alex overheard a phone call in which President Trump attempted to extort our allies in Ukraine. Trump threatened to withhold military aid unless President Zelenskyy investigated his political rival.
After Alex reported the call to me, we both blew the whistle on Trump. We reported Trump’s corrupt phone call up the chain of command, and it led to his impeachment.
Even though the decision to blow the whistle on Donald Trump was the right thing to do, it cost my brother and me our military careers after the former-president retaliated against us. But I am not done serving.
**I’m running for Congress in Virginia to fight back against Trump and the far-right Republicans who enable his abuse of power and attacks on our Democracy.**
And more than that, I’m running to push our country forward across the board. To restore abortion rights everywhere, act on climate change, and lower costs for working families.
So here’s the deal. If we win Virginia’s 7th district, we win a highly competitive swing district and we can begin to make progress on those issues while safeguarding against any Republican attempts to roll back our rights.
So, with Virginia’s Primary Election Day just around the corner, please:
**[Make a contribution to my campaign for Congress. Help us build a real grassroots movement in defense of democracy.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84306130/471114253/1582186816?refcode=em20240504am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=fa3bead3-220a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTNiZWFkMy0yMjBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o0x-w_XZjOZxAY3R6FR6q13A2KfPsq53lGHAa1GMnNI=)**

name: Bernie Moreno
subject: Sherrods recent flip-flop
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate
body:
He has shown that he’s willing to sacrifice principles for political gain, abandoning the rule of law in favor of appeasing the radical left. | [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=29028f44b9a74e20acc4fc7bd2165db7&_e=UMp08dMgnF_UKzQpKs3fs5T5TOIQq9Ly1M856gv6swhNu8QMHjTZA3XXY791dqKiEw9fpr6qdTY0W_bI0fwjkvnsznUvDY1rva7fFH0Npfrv4mx1x_P3WzbITPBiS-CKON_K2uI5sh5QO7FXltTJhoVyTMWdgUPyZLT8vaQQkBjvrB9rB_oik9_wwldEI9meXgPdncA5ISUaAKyX7d3y3oxJ2PwRDJcRqCfis-8V_9o2EGIkljhX_qkzLKbCT8sX-o9YvGVYbxj4BnTEOlF_DM8VxlXJoN4UL10Dv1RFiOEXY424eZOSKCoyhXM1HpFM0K3_6JwUKryCHbPmXGYWhZ2SjWfIIGIkWv_Jgyl6s-HpsFVZO6ViQW-WPfDCDgNpGwf1_W_iEeVym5oOAs7yfJZ4NFvFSFocHEGhb8t-tz8%3D)
---
Fellow patriot,

My far-left opponent, Sherrod Brown has shown his true colors – and they’re not red, white, and blue. _**They’re stained with hypocrisy and weakness.**_

**First ➜** Brown sank to a new low by endorsing the despicable antisemitic, pro-Hamas protests and encampments spreading like wildfire across our college campuses.

**Then ➜** He refused to call these pro-Hamas terrorist sympathizers what they are: _They’re vile, violent, antisemitic radicals who spread chaos and division._

**Now ➜** Brown shamelessly flip-flopped his stance after facing a mountain of backlash from Patriots like you and me, conveniently forgetting his initial nod of approval of these despicable acts.

[ **FIRE HYPOCRITE SHERROD BROWN** ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=29028f44b9a74e20acc4fc7bd2165db7&_e=UMp08dMgnF_UKzQpKs3fs5T5TOIQq9Ly1M856gv6swhNu8QMHjTZA3XXY791dqKiEw9fpr6qdTY0W_bI0fwjkvnsznUvDY1rva7fFH0Npfrv4mx1x_P3WzbITPBiS-CKON_K2uI5sh5QO7FXltTJhoVyTMWdgUPyZLT8vaQQkBjvrB9rB_oik9_wwldEI9meXgPdncA5ISUaAKyX7d3y3oxJ2PwRDJcRqCfis-8V_9o2EGIkljhX_qkzLKbCT8sX-o9YvGVYbxj4BnTEOlF_DGgEl4fHZqSZL5v5p0cZY-HZOfMgG6lCp7RwSg3H-0nFSrfqcG4afcycthUlDrr_f7-No_M7Pf_OvOdHm8MErNn9BMpEF0OmT-UeAb9-1gD2-8ZXfwN_EZnA5QHtzAgv4AnbQRrg5bIgvoSU3UnFY94%3D)
_**We are not fooled by Sherrod Brown's empty words and spineless pandering.**_

_Let’s be crystal clear_ : he’s shown that he’s willing to sacrifice principles for political gain, abandoning the rule of law in favor of appeasing the radical left. [**We can no longer allow anti-American politicians like this to represent us.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=29028f44b9a74e20acc4fc7bd2165db7&_e=UMp08dMgnF_UKzQpKs3fs5T5TOIQq9Ly1M856gv6swhNu8QMHjTZA3XXY791dqKiEw9fpr6qdTY0W_bI0fwjkvnsznUvDY1rva7fFH0Npfrv4mx1x_P3WzbITPBiS-CKON_K2uI5sh5QO7FXltTJhoVyTMWdgUPyZLT8vaQQkBjvrB9rB_oik9_wwldEI9meXgPdncA5ISUaAKyX7d3y3oxJ2PwRDJcRqCfis-8V_9o2EGIkljhX_qkzLKbCT8sX-o9YvGVYbxj4BnTEOlF_DCjCWevCOFhUG_OLdBPn4PyCpHXnxVXXFvusZKEWs4C-OmaY-HXk6uRWnyjStV5P3ebPrmkkw8l83uSVjijZOECS0vc2NSrvWxp0tG1m7GSVZslu0IPMzdeVwV-tYprNztpNe1SpRY42whWsFg_XawE%3D) Ohio deserves better. America deserves better.

We deserve a Senator who will unwaveringly stand for law and order, who will never waver in the face of leftist pressure, and who will _**ALWAYS**_ support American interests; not those of terrorist organizations keen on destroying our country.

I need you to stand with me, fellow patriot, because Sherrod Brown will continue kowtowing to the radical Left –[**can you chip in 10 bucks now to fire him?**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=29028f44b9a74e20acc4fc7bd2165db7&_e=UMp08dMgnF_UKzQpKs3fs5T5TOIQq9Ly1M856gv6swhNu8QMHjTZA3XXY791dqKiEw9fpr6qdTY0W_bI0fwjkvnsznUvDY1rva7fFH0Npfrv4mx1x_P3WzbITPBiS-CKON_K2uI5sh5QO7FXltTJhoVyTMWdgUPyZLT8vaQQkBjvrB9rB_oik9_wwldEI9meXgPdncA5ISUaAKyX7d3y3oxJ2PwRDJcRqCfis-8V_9o2EGIkljhX_qkzLKbCT8sX7z2E1KjMcLr2LtMjTwO5IwKki-fmONNfApmfEPhWRtaDHSOISTycrciP3Sl8xWs8mqmjZXHxa48v2Ujkhk_ipFcbJhrL9UQi569BmY1rkP3tbTi6IHiFMrqElOJGGbOR-HxG2nHs57T8t_cMbOAHeLfeSkp3DNF_xsGfSgejnk64sA-2EojzFdXVB8VUoJ1J)

Thank you for your support.

For America,
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=29028f44b9a74e20acc4fc7bd2165db7&_e=UMp08dMgnF_UKzQpKs3fs5T5TOIQq9Ly1M856gv6swhNu8QMHjTZA3XXY791dqKiEw9fpr6qdTY0W_bI0fwjkvnsznUvDY1rva7fFH0Npfrv4mx1x_P3WzbITPBiS-CKON_K2uI5sh5QO7FXltTJhoVyTMWdgUPyZLT8vaQQkBjvrB9rB_oik9_wwldEI9meXgPdncA5ISUaAKyX7d3y3oxJ2PwRDJcRqCfis-8V_9o2EGIkljhX_qkzLKbCT8sX-o9YvGVYbxj4BnTEOlF_DDDukXXui8UNA9xFWk6cpXqUpRueD7wKD8Luij6QG4b_mF26MnmUiLMbjV8MLborpKujv2hYNSgVQTy8b-6F3Z7vqNhHCr4-aJAtDT9s5NeIQotOHImy6nbMDA5uE-DKjtz0muoQrlOXVWHIULQJ0dQ%3D)
Bernie Moreno
GOP Nominee for Senate, Ohio

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=29028f44b9a74e20acc4fc7bd2165db7&_e=UMp08dMgnF_UKzQpKs3fs5T5TOIQq9Ly1M856gv6swhNu8QMHjTZA3XXY791dqKiEw9fpr6qdTY0W_bI0fwjkvnsznUvDY1rva7fFH0Npfrv4mx1x_P3WzbITPBiS-CKON_K2uI5sh5QO7FXltTJhoVyTMWdgUPyZLT8vaQQkBjvrB9rB_oik9_wwldEI9meXgPdncA5ISUaAKyX7d3y3oxJ2PwRDJcRqCfis-8V_9o2EGIkljhX_qkzLKbCT8sX-o9YvGVYbxj4BnTEOlF_DNcG-6njPR7_Rs3sGAAofa3Qy-O_QAvJNPnTutTdkqRCLWqkMo0fql4cYtJ8j8edvi_XTXLEdwQe9zaaD-Vdi8dVaPgB4QPMaV5_PJ0cIeDr8nL0MekPuMO-mKhn-K2eO4pcJ8ZxxUsGqa4NDWk_Ul0%3D) Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

clean_body: He has shown that he’s willing to sacrifice principles for political gain, abandoning the rule of law in favor of appeasing the radical left. | Fellow patriot, My far-left opponent, Sherrod Brown has shown his true colors – and they’re not red, white, and blue. They’re stained with hypocrisy and weakness. First ➜ Brown sank to a new low by endorsing the despicable antisemitic, pro-Hamas protests and encampments spreading like wildfire across our college campuses. Then ➜ He refused to call these pro-Hamas terrorist sympathizers what they are: They’re vile, violent, antisemitic radicals who spread chaos and division. Now ➜ Brown shamelessly flip-flopped his stance after facing a mountain of backlash from Patriots like you and me, conveniently forgetting his initial nod of approval of these despicable acts. We are not fooled by Sherrod Brown's empty words and spineless pandering. Let’s be crystal clear : he’s shown that he’s willing to sacrifice principles for political gain, abandoning the rule of law in favor of appeasing the radical left. Ohio deserves better. America deserves better. We deserve a Senator who will unwaveringly stand for law and order, who will never waver in the face of leftist pressure, and who will ALWAYS support American interests; not those of terrorist organizations keen on destroying our country. I need you to stand with me, fellow patriot, because Sherrod Brown will continue kowtowing to the radical Left – Thank you for your support. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I’m not willing to wait until January 2025 to try
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
I refuse to throw my hands up and wait until we have a different Congress.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2162%2E4032634%2ETMeUwx)
---
I’ve got a whole bunch of plans for what we can accomplish with a Democratic House, a Democratic Senate, and a Democratic White House in 2025. Plans like making Supreme Court justices follow a basic code of ethics, taxing wealthy billionaires, and abolishing the filibuster to pass abortion rights and gun safety laws. So I’ll fight my heart out to support Democrats up and down the ticket in 2024. But I’m not willing to wait until we have a different Congress to pass important bills and get things done for the American people. And even with Republicans controlling the House, there are still some places where the door is open to making real change. So I’ve been doing everything I can to get things done. I’ve teamed up with Republican colleagues in the Senate on reining in Big Tech. And on clawing back bonuses from executives who ran their big banks into the ground. I’m also working with the Biden-Harris administration to keep delivering student debt relief. To keep cracking down on junk fees. To bring home our fight to ban noncompete agreements and secure stronger overtime pay. To keep putting more money and power in the hands of working people. [**I refuse to throw my hands up and wait until January 2025 to try to make progress. We must keep fighting with what we have — and I’m running for re-election to keep making progress in 2024, 2025, and beyond. Will you chip in $28 or anything you can to make sure I can continue this work in the Senate?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2185?amount=28&t=8&akid=2162%2E4032634%2ETMeUwx)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2185?t=22&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=2162%2E4032634%2ETMeUwx)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2185?t=24&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=2162%2E4032634%2ETMeUwx)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2185?t=26&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=2162%2E4032634%2ETMeUwx)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2185?t=28&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=2162%2E4032634%2ETMeUwx)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2185?t=18&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=2162%2E4032634%2ETMeUwx)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2185?t=20&express_lane=true&akid=2162%2E4032634%2ETMeUwx)
---

---
We need to defend and expand our Senate majority, retake the House, and re-elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris in 2024 — because everything we’re fighting for would be a whole lot easier if we had more champions for working people in office. And if the GOP gains any more power in November, they’ll work to pass their extremist agenda and actively reverse all the progress we’ve made together. Democrats win when we go out there and fight for the bold action that families need. But winning majorities is not enough. We need to use those majorities to pass plans that truly transform the lives of working people in this country. So I’m fighting my heart out to get as much done as possible with the Congress we have now. And I’m working to elect more Democrats up and down the ballot so we can expand our majorities, end the filibuster, and get more on the table and passed. And I won’t be doing it alone. I’ll be fighting alongside a grassroots movement — this grassroots movement. I'm deeply grateful for your support in this fight — and powering our campaign from the grassroots level makes an important difference. [**So if you’re able to, will you pitch in $28 or whatever makes sense to support my re-election so we can continue making progress for working people? I would be incredibly grateful.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2185?amount=28&t=14&akid=2162%2E4032634%2ETMeUwx) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth
| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2185?t=12&akid=2162%2E4032634%2ETMeUwx)

name: Roy Cooper
subject: My budget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Show your support and urge Republicans to pass our plan.

|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84307602/471117075/823540626?refcode=ea.7380f9c0-250a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ms=ea.7380f9c0-250a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzgwZjljMC0yNTBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EYhJIJQbnYn1aMt_pUZnIh_GAP_KnuyH9OjoNkp5J4A=&emci=036d16b4-7b09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=7380f9c0-250a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=1049176)
Peter — Last month, I unveiled my proposed budget for the upcoming fiscal year — and I want to share some highlights with you. **One of my top priorities as Governor is to ensure the next generation of North Carolina’s leaders can receive a top-tier education right here in our public schools, just like I did.** That’s why our budget proposal gives public school teachers an 8.5% raise — elevating starting salaries to the highest in the Southeast. Teachers shouldn’t be forced into working extra jobs just to pay bills. We’ll also invest _over $1 billion_ in funding public schools and _$745 million_ to strengthen early childhood education and childcare programs. Republicans would rather take taxpayer money from the public schools and give it to the wealthy through private school vouchers. Instead, they should use those funds to give public school teachers the 8.5% raise I requested. **Peter, our budget sets _all_ North Carolinians up for success! clean_body: Show your support and urge Republicans to pass our plan. | Peter — Last month, I unveiled my proposed budget for the upcoming fiscal year — and I want to share some highlights with you. One of my top priorities as Governor is to ensure the next generation of North Carolina’s leaders can receive a top-tier education right here in our public schools, just like I did. That’s why our budget proposal gives public school teachers an 8.5% raise — elevating starting salaries to the highest in the Southeast. Teachers shouldn’t be forced into working extra jobs just to pay bills. We’ll also invest over $1 billion in funding public schools and $745 million to strengthen early childhood education and childcare programs. Republicans would rather take taxpayer money from the public schools and give it to the wealthy through private school vouchers. Instead, they should use those funds to give public school teachers the 8.5% raise I requested. Peter, our budget sets all North Carolinians up for success! both in our relationship with each other and with God.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=5044413ea5094b0eb404de2a01a43f89&_t=6IQzLrFAaghU6I9lh8tcK6hWjv7WkOt2lqVEuNbAk4N3gkVetNQOcjn4GTJU2P3d7D2KYvNU3MJBpIpfc5NX9Olhbr35S4qHfMYz1IVmh5c%3D)_

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5044413ea5094b0eb404de2a01a43f89&_e=K1r3_aGZpTus3WPS_EKPMXZfqWWJvqGH10AHe85olaFBfMQALseUd2yF2e9kVtz7zP9YpA4S113h9a-hgxYKOxc3j8kGH3OUk-iivjvCDQakUzvSEW79h6vdgp4lfk9JfHCUgomIwmi5xYYJ0Pxhr4Hn0bptGT8KdLhCjpd34SCpB4DvL9YNii4Qemd1WJmruTmy4dHbJI91cUzniOObIMjK6nNfU49uo3hXVUPUi5_RIHCPHgem4DjQ-lsZmN5b51qkpsQ1xjEZ3isbpGf6rHAbAm6QLJqhWdy_TvK5-7xYBCMfraWKJCGLK0fTot1bsTY__jRdqgmnHWT9oR5_NUCuydWgsFyruzVx8Q209XNn6BS9LPlLn2NALX6wvYCxaG6ReKvNfXZrBa4oOuTI2KyjQ88oO1cWEQ52wHDwUmc%3D)
| |
Dear Friend,

Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on the Western heritage in order to graduate. And every academic year, I'm reminded of the joy it is to pursue the answers to questions like "_Does God exist? Can we know God?_ " with my students.

These questions are at the core of what it means to be human - both in our relationship with each other and with God.
[ ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5044413ea5094b0eb404de2a01a43f89&_e=K1r3_aGZpTus3WPS_EKPMXZfqWWJvqGH10AHe85olaFBfMQALseUd2yF2e9kVtz7zP9YpA4S113h9a-hgxYKOxc3j8kGH3OUk-iivjvCDQakUzvSEW79h6vdgp4lfk9JfHCUgomIwmi5xYYJ0Pxhr4Hn0bptGT8KdLhCjpd34SCpB4DvL9YNii4Qemd1WJmruTmy4dHbJI91cUzniOObIMjK6nNfU49uo3hXVUPUi5_RIHCPHgem4DjQ-lsZmN5b51qkpsQ1xjEZ3isbpGf6rOmTsEdg1-iYeLZ3AE_R9TgkHuj9IFbV-OvSReexZt5CiOQYySYGSXaQr_W7gTrE8BT2tu55DIaM6oiyyjdX3wvwbLzP0-WlVUydnDLIJyLRrlE7acKR8uMZSVlSLJFmg11XsLIEEjzIF8djlqPzWH4%3D) Today, I want to offer you that same experience by sending you [**a limited-edition DVD box set of Hillsdale's popular online course, "Western Heritage - From the Book of Genesis to John Locke,"**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5044413ea5094b0eb404de2a01a43f89&_e=K1r3_aGZpTus3WPS_EKPMXZfqWWJvqGH10AHe85olaFBfMQALseUd2yF2e9kVtz7zP9YpA4S113h9a-hgxYKOxc3j8kGH3OUk-iivjvCDQakUzvSEW79h6vdgp4lfk9JfHCUgomIwmi5xYYJ0Pxhr4Hn0bptGT8KdLhCjpd34SCpB4DvL9YNii4Qemd1WJmruTmy4dHbJI91cUzniOObIMjK6nNfU49uo3hXVUPUi5_RIHCPHgem4DjQ-lsZmN5b51qkpsQ1xjEZ3isbpGf6rAs9HxtxNAPaEjLrcYuM-HYUI9dD2uI2heM3BaSpZnJKKZMjMb6pkfUsL8psY16ZMcucAHb5BQBLshcbwXBYyVFRNuqKaNqj5yu6XQv_yn4JpzHdUEa2jp1muZ3Dws7lJXUZ_xxOED5kTV2n57P0Ie8%3D) as a token of our thanks for a generous contribution in support of Hillsdale's efforts to educate America.

By learning about our Western roots, we add meaning and purpose to our lives and enhance our relationships with others.

I invite you to study the history of the "big questions" with my colleagues and me.

Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link: **[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-western-heritage-dvd](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5044413ea5094b0eb404de2a01a43f89&_e=K1r3_aGZpTus3WPS_EKPMXZfqWWJvqGH10AHe85olaFBfMQALseUd2yF2e9kVtz7zP9YpA4S113h9a-hgxYKOxc3j8kGH3OUk-iivjvCDQakUzvSEW79h6vdgp4lfk9JfHCUgomIwmi5xYYJ0Pxhr4Hn0bptGT8KdLhCjpd34SCpB4DvL9YNii4Qemd1WJmruTmy4dHbJI91cUzniOObIMjK6nNfU49uo3hXVUPUi5_RIHCPHgem4DjQ-lsZmN5b51qkpsQ1xjEZ3isbpGf6rE2pTrqiwA-tEj_nWhEwVLpOCgOBTbSQ_U2XKY12H9nnjlaEISC0UResTiXc3DY1EvgvSkCiYG-dB0KQrf3AbYc3zs9A6AdNHkpZJa7D8jVNLwDoV-4pBssDb37A3Jp0iNxiyNjnwH60HIZQoOXp7FI%3D)**

More than 2,000 people have already requested theirs, so make sure to get your set before they are all gone.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College

_“Seriously, just die.”_

_“We are coming for you b#!*h.”_

_“You better keep your doors locked and sleep with one eye open.”_

_“I can’t wait to find you and follow you to your house and expose your address.”_

Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters._ Please consider a donation to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda. | = = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-gP0Xd1LL-Lub7Gk22PHy9biRkT0ZFLBZo_8f8EnE7Jowo6A0R8oop8Rrw_kitS3sMwrJn2ozruxmkvaG936_l1duoWABImS72zia5WVvFdaeCnH2lDaJkKSbGYQlqPad8p_J12g3IwClbIjZJKMBNyBoCGKZIRPPqsTt4U52W3pf7LM6oSONgxB2nE8Aqi9SHROu5mwBdhvPAag423gvnfvehd_EUSwKMe9ljKQZvSa1kPjQuzmD26CB5k-69KlvRYFdRzMvqLxtaYlCarLOxD78VpBBzliEgm97UsCeySr_2IJmWakjI5vpm9D5Jlet55v-3ZucGV9w55rd0oHa-FHJYDG_rpV-RlRI-fOl5HqwaODt_-nC9VpPlz4-AsrYlDa2ocgMD-vt8yCJ5JB28/462/hdWZC3ehSeixfbMmhfv3Mg/h0/h001.4OV1lQNZQ9gOrv0gmalhUIFJJIZkZx8BtvYTurYDNdU) | | [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqskv9NQB2VWDB7dxl6GOAMoQ8QSK-cusxzfDRo34i8XZMY3hJOiEHsnqfFUZGZyp564f9GlkVGWGNlyZmGpocWlbdQXy4g0NuwwDmmutZb2IJTVq4KoyvRFQOHJKZzKXrhj3xMh42TcqIbQQPrG9av6PYm-fQKRkRmebIcLxHDL8cXS8OtAw8NeP7F4vNZHG1VWWGA0gOp-8P9Vwh52P4CG5i-DLmgY58gV5yVDge2w-19_XaQVqSa4LxlTJn4imFy0o0IPwgQSIkuvBs8DYUuYw5ctZmWzHP8zCruh_dqBcUy_88f8YIq0Oylf7iI7hwYI1k3O31_pEdeIUcLL5zBeL3iho3sLE1AT6LLekuQpnOVXp_EtuqxvsTUvr3-ZGVQ/462/hdWZC3ehSeixfbMmhfv3Mg/h1/h001.VvkGJOzskpcvygnRMLx2j1hEnpog91-r2cD-gjFh-rk) When Larry Hogan jumped into Maryland’s open Senate race, it shifted the entire Senate landscape and shifted Maryland from safely blue to a battleground state.

A lot of Hogan’s momentum comes from the perception that he’s a moderate voice in an otherwise extremist, out-of-touch GOP.

**_But Hogan’s veto record tells a very different story, Peter._**

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | When Larry Hogan jumped into Maryland’s open Senate race, it shifted the entire Senate landscape and shifted Maryland from safely blue to a battleground state. A lot of Hogan’s momentum comes from the perception that he’s a moderate voice in an otherwise extremist, out-of-touch GOP. But Hogan’s veto record tells a very different story, Peter. In fact, we’re about to give you 5 clear examples proving that Larry Hogan would be just one more rubber stamp for the GOP’s agenda in the Senate, but before we do that: | | | Here are 5 examples proving that Marylanders deserve better than Larry Hogan: He vetoed a $15 minimum wage. He undercut workers by vetoing legislation that would have allowed them to deduct union dues from state income taxes. He vetoed a bill to restore voting rights to more than 44,000 previously incarcerated Marylanders. He vetoed common sense gun legislation mandating background checks. He vetoed legislation to increase access to reproductive care by increasing the number of abortion providers in Maryland. Larry Hogan isn’t fooling anyone, Peter, and we can’t afford to let him represent Maryland in the U.S. Senate. name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Born and Raised
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=4c4054a9fe2b4ec68455357a64e2fa46&_e=xeWVVgsjd1dA1vLcrmL4tCWTbiFz6eJobe1DCkpUXjuNomLHz9WStrlrBVVcnisOUxvHp87rVrIy-bPrF4ef-C1sYRxNaCmol-za7yF62HqIlC_JRRLPPjA0gScavpm3DIsLrk8fSZaWRCRnzRpH8IayCzSrtgRqtxtPysMwQV7fX0jOxDoLYLWCKm3MnFGktLNINfMRMn515Nn4F8xvYw2NcGgOMrRnJ7Pvli5hZFyg0_dEGf0Dc4mrfX-GUPfTk0qdLmrrqtNDFMYYChORJOvcUcLuhYg4YyJJw8QmyGkuZaW6dvanDyHzuynW3jGu3ipm4q5v56QcGwow7b12Wecqzr_uYN4P2aXS8wYfYwnlnEEByXJmBxqGHlHrmWoJ3hJmhZFXTbyM67r0IxK7Yg%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American, I am a **PROUD** Texan, born and raised. I served honorably defending our freedoms for eight years in the Army as an Aviation Branch Officer and AG-64D Apache Longbow helicopter pilot.

I was proudly elected in 2022 to serve Texas in Congress.

I wake up and look at my beautiful wife and children, and this selflessness and dedication instilled in me gives me the burning desire to better our country and the next generation.

2024 will by far be the most consequential election year we face.

For our future, for our children's future, **[please stand with me proudly as I represent YOU.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=4c4054a9fe2b4ec68455357a64e2fa46&_e=xeWVVgsjd1dA1vLcrmL4tCWTbiFz6eJobe1DCkpUXjuNomLHz9WStrlrBVVcnisOUxvHp87rVrIy-bPrF4ef-C1sYRxNaCmol-za7yF62HqIlC_JRRLPPjA0gScavpm3DIsLrk8fSZaWRCRnzRpH8IayCzSrtgRqtxtPysMwQV7fX0jOxDoLYLWCKm3MnFGktLNINfMRMn515Nn4F8xvYw2NcGgOMrRnJ7Pvli5hZFyg0_dEGf0Dc4mrfX-GUPfTdMpaeXW8XnpkMpH_12S0mp5AglgxGmGtccaHbUEzeDQszboPUtkdqbnIsM-JvmiTnlyDilXvvus5U6NKeRyOwgYpVat4rM-GEp2WcGJ5tENRKACY-jq0pHnZclZkuKSMluoQPuRAvvLMlVM3bHLLgg%3D%3D)**

| [**SUPPORT TEAM HUNT - DONATE NOW**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=4c4054a9fe2b4ec68455357a64e2fa46&_e=xeWVVgsjd1dA1vLcrmL4tCWTbiFz6eJobe1DCkpUXjuNomLHz9WStrlrBVVcnisOUxvHp87rVrIy-bPrF4ef-C1sYRxNaCmol-za7yF62HqIlC_JRRLPPjA0gScavpm3DIsLrk8fSZaWRCRnzRpH8IayCzSrtgRqtxtPysMwQV7fX0jOxDoLYLWCKm3MnFGktLNINfMRMn515Nn4F8xvYw2NcGgOMrRnJ7Pvli5hZFyg0_dEGf0Dc4mrfX-GUPfTb7wtrdgCQFQBklSjhpD2fOCNOuHPEoPHgO9cslCnuz437wWeuYakM12kOcJwmEOjLyi6Ru5uv4HeilWnxkK1EisJWG2RxycQqKKkmslyBqND7Zn1W34AVXhSVycZ8Um3m-mGfr29HbAAdcdzIKLoVg%3D%3D)
---

Wesley Hunt
[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=4c4054a9fe2b4ec68455357a64e2fa46&_e=xeWVVgsjd1dA1vLcrmL4tCWTbiFz6eJobe1DCkpUXjuNomLHz9WStrlrBVVcnisOUxvHp87rVrIy-bPrF4ef-C1sYRxNaCmol-za7yF62HqIlC_JRRLPPjA0gScavpm3DIsLrk8fSZaWRCRnzRpH8IayCzSrtgRqtxtPysMwQV7fX0jOxDoLYLWCKm3MnFGkJJ1wVD1maN4F_DjrqhLI0SGbrFAn8rwVa_nU1BQ3uDZA5Af3SyAcINS4VFsZBrZxHRXZIgtGcDy8YJqMgMLSAmZBlNs6uwIeu4n7LyKsIxScJo2ES59E-oImbI_0d9RXqaCGQxZCsEMYs2xIf0ODnv7B-2nSOb_hjAPW42V-82Hg63Dn9SUmaJ8gQ88MPoxJ)

**_Changing Washington won't be easy, but graduating from West Point and serving in the United States Army, being deployed to combat zones, and flying Apache helicopters over Iraq has prepared me for tough fights and big challenges.

I truly believe nothing is more worth fighting for than our great country and our way of life in the Houston area._**********

**** Paid for by Hunt for Congress.

# Disaster Briefs
Disaster Briefs are your weekly (or more often, if needed) summaries and headlines from around the world about natural and man-made disasters, climate change, and international conflict.
#### Meteorological/Climatological:
The tropical system we were monitoring in the South Indian Ocean last week has developed into [Tropical Cyclone Hidaya](https://substack.com/redirect/bc42c82c-b591-4c18-9047-2cb409eb2645?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and will[ make landfall in Tanzania](https://substack.com/redirect/50ca8cc7-53b0-4680-a295-1ee9e2d5fa1c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) today as a category two hurricane on the Saffir-Simpson scale. Heavy rains in neighboring Kenya have already claimed 350 lives this week. **The country is now bracing for[its first-ever tropical cyclone](https://substack.com/redirect/68978ac3-6d1c-41ea-9601-0309aa94c125?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).**
Canadian officials issued warnings at the start of wildfire season this week, noting ongoing drought across the country and expected higher-than-average temperatures going into the summer. Record-breaking wildfires in 2023 burned an area the size of North Dakota, according to satellite data.
The US plains state face another weekend of severe storms following last weekend's deadly tornado outbreak. Houston, Texas is reporting "catastrophic" flooding...

Meteorological/Climatological: The tropical system we were monitoring in the South Indian Ocean last week has developed into and will today as a category two hurricane on the Saffir-Simpson scale. Heavy rains in neighboring Kenya have already claimed 350 lives this week. The country is now bracing for. Canadian officials issued warnings at the start of wildfire season this week, noting ongoing drought across the country and expected higher-than-average temperatures going into the summer. Record-breaking wildfires in 2023 burned an area the size of North Dakota, according to satellite data. The US plains state face another weekend of severe storms following last weekend's deadly tornado outbreak. Houston, Texas is reporting "catastrophic" flooding... Do Republicans have any clue what an insurrection _actually_ is? | | **Members of the Arizona Freedom Caucus filed an ethics complaint after Democrats’ vocal push to repeal the ban sparks change.**
_— Copper Courier, April 26, 2024_
* * *
_The complaint claims [Reps.] Ortiz and De Los Santos “attempted insurrection,” and “incited a riot.” The language resembles that surrounding the Jan. 6 attack on the US Capitol, an incident that several in the Republican caucus have publicly voiced support for, been directly linked to, or were present at. _ | [PITCH IN TO FIGHT BACK](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84312012/471129230/1510686721?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240504_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjE4ZTIxNWYtMmEwYS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5fm9i3VpeK04ag9_sU4alVVkoDbu4-BKgFhPUGuqW-M=)

**❌ What an insurrection is not:** Using your elected office to uphold the will of Arizonans and overturning a total abortion ban that predates our statehood.

I’m a walking rebuttal to the Left’s phony race-baiting narrative about Republicans. And in an election year where Joe Biden is bleeding a historic number of black voters to President Trump, I’m the Democrats WORST NIGHTMARE to appear on the ballot! So, I only have one question for you: Thank you, Kim Klacik Republican for Congress (MD-2) | Paid for by Kim Klacik for Congress

name: Sheldon Whitehouse
subject: my work at the Supreme Court
body:
It’s been clear for a long time that the Supreme Court has a corruption problem
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb3dfeae5-1406-4d77-9baa-050cb3bd62f6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| | | Peter, I’m running for re-election in Rhode Island for the United States Senate. [I’m hoping you’ll split a $10 donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9d76f1d6-daaa-4f30-88b9-c025ac082123/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) – and here’s why. It’s been clear for a long time that the Supreme Court has a corruption problem. I recently published a law review article highlighting how this captured Supreme Court often simply makes up false facts to arrive at decisions that ultimately benefit partisan Republican special interests. Take Citizens United v. FEC as an example. Remember when the Federalist Society justices said that all the unlimited political spending they were unleashing would be “transparent”? Well, we’ve seen dark money in politics prove them wrong several billion times over. Our system is designed to leave fact-finding to the lower courts that hear testimony, make credibility determinations, and review evidence. The Supreme Court is then supposed to defer to – and not alter – factual records in its decisions. Think about it: if the Highest Court in the Land makes up phony facts, there is nowhere else the parties can appeal to. The captured Roberts Court has done a lot of this phony fact-finding in big decisions that have fundamentally changed life in America. The Dobbs decision that ended a fundamental freedom for women is another one that was built on made-up history. How are the American people supposed to trust a Court that makes up its own rules to concoct decisions that suit right-wing special interests? [I won’t give up my fight to improve transparency and accountability at the Supreme Court, but I need your help. Split a contribution today to send me back to the Senate so I can protect American democracy and make sure our Court is giving Americans the fair shake they deserve.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbfcd1137-7679-4388-bb70-e78cd348f095/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| Americans deserve a Court that plays by the rules. \- Sheldon Whitehouse

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tca706986-299a-42bb-b41b-de9cc38ecb0f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| |

Where else can Jordan spread his lies and propaganda if not Faux News? | [View in browser](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/td/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMjA0MTQ5MDgzNDcwNTc3NDcsXCJyXCI6MTIwNDE1MDYxODc0MzEyNDY2fSIsInMiOiI3MThkYWVjMDc3ZWNhYzFjIn0)
