Friend,

If you’re a MAGA conservative who gets fame and money from gaslighting folks on Fox News, losing Rupert Murdoch’s support is a political death sentence.

Yet that is what seems to be happening to Jim Jordan, in the wake of his many failures to deliver for Trump and for his right wing billionaire backers in his post as Judiciary Committee Chairman.

Fox News talking head Maria Bartiromo recently dressed Jim Jordan down on a Sunday appearance: “With all due respect, **_people are sick and tired of congressional investigations that go nowhere_** ," she said.**
**[](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/td/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMjA0MTQ5MDgzNTU0NDYzNTcsXCJyXCI6MTIwNDE1MDYxODc0MzEyNDY2fSIsInMiOiJhZDM5M2Y3MDkyM2YwZGQyIn0)

---
|
---
_Amen!_

Bartiromo was referring to the pointless impeachment inquiry into President Joe Biden launched by Jordan and Oversight Chair James Comer—a baseless witch hunt that never had or discovered any evidence of wrongdoing of any kind.

And now the chickens are coming home to roost for Jordan, with his own base turning on him and with nothing to show for his time as Chairman (much less his entire time in Congress).

It’s time to put an end to the disaster that is Jim Jordan. I am running to fire Jim Jordan and to win this crucial race for ALL OF US. **Kicking Jim Jordan out of Congress is so urgent, and so important, and I cannot do it alone. Simply put: we need you with us, Friend.****[

Will you help us make history as we unseat one of the worst MAGA bullies Congress has ever seen? We are at a turning point in our campaign to defeat Jim Jordan, so please contribute $25, $50, $100 or more today if you can:](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/td/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMjA0MTQ5MDgzNjM4MzQ5NjcsXCJyXCI6MTIwNDE1MDYxODc0MzEyNDY2fSIsInMiOiI2ZTVlZDZmNjQ1ZTNmOWI5In0)****

name: Bernie Moreno
subject: Shameless Sherrod’s flip-flop
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate
body:
He has shown that he’s willing to sacrifice principles for political gain, abandoning the rule of law in favor of appeasing the radical left. | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c913d529c2b24dc7832aa725672b07fe&_e=JbzBZYAfA6oCUZcgMl1rekFT2NK4r6d_j1vjTIeiRXipSJG1IM5xCEWg6jCYixiOXeEkMiWYZA3sQNunTs11CD4K8W9yJSjVqCsNlbc-HufpzZbeiGN6pxC74pSf2KjJRo4qJk89ABYTDBffL5u3geE4qRAzc13mhot_JgXGFNoU4PluZiOmNnlRhbKifafBQcPANiTiGyInBPof6saUS_JM2SS-seBVKFV5tas91tUcKksKfBFDYE_9WqNBLiIh7CsT8YK4bvmH_gHbU8g7dijag0Zff4UJchNMz5GbQTJkOViDlhl4oBO1Mb_XF0aiH8fPWDub5AOWxSSKnkwddeX4qtqH-eU-xanvGwasP6AC7QdWlJXuqjkYvwtJezz1msGLAIroUNWULGHyWD2YmMTFifX9zRmkqJulFth9jck%3D)
---
Peter,

My far-left opponent, Sherrod Brown has shown his true colors – and they’re not red, white, and blue. _**They’re stained with hypocrisy and weakness.**_

**First ➜** Brown sank to a new low by endorsing the despicable antisemitic, pro-Hamas protests and encampments spreading like wildfire across our college campuses.

**Then ➜** He refused to call these pro-Hamas terrorist sympathizers what they are: _They’re vile, violent, antisemitic radicals who spread chaos and division._

**Now ➜** Brown shamelessly flip-flopped his stance after facing a mountain of backlash from Patriots like you and me, conveniently forgetting his initial nod of approval of these despicable acts.

[ **FIRE HYPOCRITE SHERROD BROWN** ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c913d529c2b24dc7832aa725672b07fe&_e=JbzBZYAfA6oCUZcgMl1rekFT2NK4r6d_j1vjTIeiRXipSJG1IM5xCEWg6jCYixiOXeEkMiWYZA3sQNunTs11CD4K8W9yJSjVqCsNlbc-HufpzZbeiGN6pxC74pSf2KjJRo4qJk89ABYTDBffL5u3geE4qRAzc13mhot_JgXGFNoU4PluZiOmNnlRhbKifafBQcPANiTiGyInBPof6saUS_JM2SS-seBVKFV5tas91tUcKksKfBFDYE_9WqNBLiIh7CsT8YK4bvmH_gHbU8g7dpJe_jXnBGKPqDP2kd0lBFgqmkrgL2srU1v_2V09SyB2IkMgpEGNTTDBHPNxrFIMhi58B6929LdNezwZz-HY8ovTCmVh0upor-R5px_p_Bb99zIljRzc6BhBX7KjxeQKRSjDvhGmbjb9gCOriOqpvmI%3D)
_**We are not fooled by Sherrod Brown's empty words and spineless pandering.**_

_Let’s be crystal clear_ : he’s shown that he’s willing to sacrifice principles for political gain, abandoning the rule of law in favor of appeasing the radical left. [**We can no longer allow anti-American politicians like this to represent us.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c913d529c2b24dc7832aa725672b07fe&_e=JbzBZYAfA6oCUZcgMl1rekFT2NK4r6d_j1vjTIeiRXipSJG1IM5xCEWg6jCYixiOXeEkMiWYZA3sQNunTs11CD4K8W9yJSjVqCsNlbc-HufpzZbeiGN6pxC74pSf2KjJRo4qJk89ABYTDBffL5u3geE4qRAzc13mhot_JgXGFNoU4PluZiOmNnlRhbKifafBQcPANiTiGyInBPof6saUS_JM2SS-seBVKFV5tas91tUcKksKfBFDYE_9WqNBLiIh7CsT8YK4bvmH_gHbU8g7dp7KlbtFiI8A4HD0Imxc9Igy1mOoXtfhGrCYBJ1ASOjmzfTXTo5RUvYOGwzSaDLqhmnen0Vnm2Ll8sV_vll0vkyZIICDFoAxVYVLuY0aonC9aPWXiXUjWbxzF2ad454LaQxk-69-FIzljZFx_ECmuOY%3D) Ohio deserves better. America deserves better.

We deserve a Senator who will unwaveringly stand for law and order, who will never waver in the face of leftist pressure, and who will _**ALWAYS**_ support American interests; not those of terrorist organizations keen on destroying our country.

I need you to stand with me, Peter, because Sherrod Brown will continue kowtowing to the radical Left –[**can you chip in 10 bucks now to fire him?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c913d529c2b24dc7832aa725672b07fe&_e=JbzBZYAfA6oCUZcgMl1rekFT2NK4r6d_j1vjTIeiRXipSJG1IM5xCEWg6jCYixiOXeEkMiWYZA3sQNunTs11CD4K8W9yJSjVqCsNlbc-HufpzZbeiGN6pxC74pSf2KjJRo4qJk89ABYTDBffL5u3geE4qRAzc13mhot_JgXGFNoU4PluZiOmNnlRhbKifafBQcPANiTiGyInBPof6saUS_JM2SS-seBVKFV5tas91tUcKksKfBFDYE_9WqNBLiIhFIgtGCy51UpqMYoEbDm39o6UwiKGyk4Py0_AUdexLgspxBwu5iN-2N7bAQahinXlvtZkt5hBvGrzEjd4rALUPp2dc52gUg9p8LSb4Wh-wDy1G5phOCBkpfC0HWKrsAuK8PMZqYxZ5mmoU8DnctGXy7iE5f5ZbhZZTTcqFO2MkF0ucnduxcN0MrPyTlaDpP4l)

Thank you for your support.

For America,

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

clean_body: He has shown that he’s willing to sacrifice principles for political gain, abandoning the rule of law in favor of appeasing the radical left. | Peter, My far-left opponent, Sherrod Brown has shown his true colors – and they’re not red, white, and blue. They’re stained with hypocrisy and weakness. First ➜ Brown sank to a new low by endorsing the despicable antisemitic, pro-Hamas protests and encampments spreading like wildfire across our college campuses. Then ➜ He refused to call these pro-Hamas terrorist sympathizers what they are: They’re vile, violent, antisemitic radicals who spread chaos and division. Now ➜ Brown shamelessly flip-flopped his stance after facing a mountain of backlash from Patriots like you and me, conveniently forgetting his initial nod of approval of these despicable acts. We are not fooled by Sherrod Brown's empty words and spineless pandering. Let’s be crystal clear : he’s shown that he’s willing to sacrifice principles for political gain, abandoning the rule of law in favor of appeasing the radical left. Ohio deserves better. America deserves better. We deserve a Senator who will unwaveringly stand for law and order, who will never waver in the face of leftist pressure, and who will ALWAYS support American interests; not those of terrorist organizations keen on destroying our country. body:
Peter — I wanted to personally reach out and ask you to [**chip in $5, or whatever you can, to help me build a winning campaign ahead of Election Day.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84313928/471134198/1027042714?refcode=em24_240504_eom2RS_fndd_gq_nopn___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240504_eom2RS_fndd_gq_nopn___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=66505e9b-2c0a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjY1MDVlOWItMmMwYS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Pypu29d_jjOu-7gGml0lt35im5y-lCyQbRVg3cQsSk4=) _But first, I want to share what this campaign means to me and how your support can make a real difference._

I've dedicated my life to finding real solutions to the challenges faced by everyday Missourians.

I’m the proud son of a police officer and county civil servant, who was raised right here in North St. Louis. Public service isn't just a career for me — **it's embedded in my DNA.**

Throughout my career, I have never been one for making false promises. While extremist House Republicans continue playing their divisive political games, I'm staying focused on bridging gaps and finding solutions for all.

**That’s why I decided to run for Congress.** I’m more ready than ever before to fight tooth and nail for the community I love — because St. Louisans deserve a representative who will put people above politics. But if we’re going to build a winning campaign ahead of November, it’s going to take all of us.

If you’re ready to bring real leadership back to MO-01, chip in $5, or whatever you can, to help me build a winning grassroots campaign >> [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bell-q2-2024-email?refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84313930/471134203/1027042714?refcode=em24_240504_eom2RS_fndd_gq_nopn___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240504_eom2RS_fndd_gq_nopn___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=66505e9b-2c0a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjY1MDVlOWItMmMwYS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Pypu29d_jjOu-7gGml0lt35im5y-lCyQbRVg3cQsSk4=)

Onward,

Wesley
_Sent from my iPhone_

body:
Recently, there’s been a fierce debate among Rhode Island history watchers on what we should call today: Royal Renunciation Day or Rhode Island Independence Day.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84315232/471137682/-1283252511?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0NTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDExNjRiYzMtMmUwYS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_x9pDpo4w9KPdsuxAuFgie2haf0LspWfErDf8MZQXQk=&emci=a95726f2-2c0a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=41164bc3-2e0a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=12466492)
---
| | Friend,
---
Recently, there’s been a fierce debate among Rhode Island history watchers on what we should call today: Royal Renunciation Day or Rhode Island Independence Day.
---
Some may think Rhode Islanders might be acknowledging our freedom from the Crown early, but in my heart, we should celebrate our independence today — and every day!
---
As the smallest state, we know our courage far exceeds our size. Over 248 years ago, Rhode Island’s lively experiment advanced the profound belief that the government derives its powers from the consent of the governed.
---
All these years later, the promise embedded in our declaration may apply to every American, but I know it might not always feel so. It is not just important to know our history and our founding documents, but that we can work towards a better tomorrow for all.
---
With your support, together we can make these beliefs a reality, both in Rhode Island and in the halls of Congress.
---

Best,Gabe

clean_body: Recently, there’s been a fierce debate among Rhode Island history watchers on what we should call today: Royal Renunciation Day or Rhode Island Independence Day.| | | | | Friend, Recently, there’s been a fierce debate among Rhode Island history watchers on what we should call today: Royal Renunciation Day or Rhode Island Independence Day. Some may think Rhode Islanders might be acknowledging our freedom from the Crown early, but in my heart, we should celebrate our independence today — and every day! As the smallest state, we know our courage far exceeds our size. Over 248 years ago, Rhode Island’s lively experiment advanced the profound belief that the government derives its powers from the consent of the governed. All these years later, the promise embedded in our declaration may apply to every American, but I know it might not always feel so. It is not just important to know our history and our founding documents, but that we can work towards a better tomorrow for all. With your support, together we can make these beliefs a reality, both in Rhode Island and in the halls of Congress. | | = | | Join me in celebrating our collective pursuit of life, liberty, and happiness this May 4th! Best,Gabe | | = | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | Gabe Amo for Congress P.O. Box 40457 Providence, RI 02940 United States | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

clean_body: To all the padawans and jedi across the galaxy... | = To all the padawans and jedi across the galaxy, May the Fourth be with you and Happy Star Wars Day! It takes everyone coming together in the Rebel Alliance to overcome the Empire. In a campaign there are no roles too big or too small — it’s truly a coalitional effort to win on Election Day. Now that we’re in May, the primary is just around the corner and we need your help, friend. You’re our only hope! = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = We all know if he could, Chewbacca would vote for Mark! — Team Mullet P.S. Yes, we know parsecs is a unit of distance and not time. Either way, our primary is only a few weeks away and we’re putting out all the stops to close the gap between us and victory! = * = | = = | Paid for by Mullet for Governor (D) Mullet for Governor (D) PO Box 2072 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

| | Fellow Conservative, I've played in lots of double-headers. And that's exactly what you and I have on our hands here. A one-on-one matchup with Adam Schiff on November 5th. **[**Can I count on your contribution of $6 to help defeat Adam Schiff today?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=0020c7043fec43809a5e139ad73b4ac8&_e=ZHBFhpscreFDkAcGNZWZQiUVDHCd5xsok2MXe9kYLIeXM-F3WXvl-n5iE2656zFcaR5B1Hf8SE5t8hmPLQe_-UoMIXgnfJ-0i1XsOThAk1GDwShMl5dIBnGA6nXcWwjeAip-DT3JGmpq280PZga7S_hvkO-yIHK-8AWVM-6QcGHQZ1uXj0OHtI9oH-UKPlguIOMk2DW9TEs42K6UrjfHULu49YHG32wwB_3FPOhoyl3ciBheaUOeIrclmNAZ34iohUpJbTlORX9jKW8EtY4cA75JmWePYx54xcuW-aRnS2RSTILh91WVA8tztYE5G5GnlgbQitsKB9pTKJ-5eRSSRzxpQZSHZH8q2EWVo78XhfCCKHIDZl_ZAfU2OtuhHD8NZTgonyYEkfw1_7xzhoflfpp84RskFlJgsYPmBUEtKOPBgY5eHMwnfYUq9m6Vf-NnjyRF_bYbklmfTGed3Fu3njfUYEOzBmlWUdpB6eQBCSo5lEx4gC984iqnjUWd2Hbz)** You see, Adam Schiff's enablers in the corporate media are already spreading the lie that this race is over. They're saying you and I don't have a chance (just like they did when I entered the race back in October). They're saying that Adam Schiff notched a double victory by advancing to the General Election and drawing me as his opponent. In other words, they're ready, willing and able to cut California voters entirely out of the picture again. My response to Schiff's allies saying they’d rather face me: **_Be careful what you wish for._** I'd liken this to my playing days when a cocky opposing pitcher throws a 94mph fastball right over the plate. I'll tell you, the ball would look as big as a grapefruit before I'd smash it over the fence and touch all the bases on the way home. And look how far we've already made it. I'm in first place in the primary and gaining momentum headed towards the November election. Look, I'm not saying this will be easy. Quite the opposite. It's going to be a nonstop, 58-county fight between now and November 5th. **[That said, I must ask: will you rush a contribution to my senate campaign today?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=0020c7043fec43809a5e139ad73b4ac8&_e=ZHBFhpscreFDkAcGNZWZQiUVDHCd5xsok2MXe9kYLIeXM-F3WXvl-n5iE2656zFcaR5B1Hf8SE5t8hmPLQe_-UoMIXgnfJ-0i1XsOThAk1GDwShMl5dIBnGA6nXcWwjeAip-DT3JGmpq280PZga7S_hvkO-yIHK-8AWVM-6QcGHQZ1uXj0OHtI9oH-UKPlguIOMk2DW9TEs42K6UrjfHULu49YHG32wwB_3FPOhoyl3ciBheaUOeIrclmNAZ34iohUpJbTlORX9jKW8EtY4cA75JmWePYx54xcuW-aRnS2RSTILh91WVA8tztYE5G5GnlgbQitsKB9pTKJ-5eRSSR3Mv6kkRDqCB1sEJARmgOKzBkpEluPE_Dn2EG7Izak7QnfGDMiqDjWjTigvu5yEC5xUWPaWZkMHewBumsykxd0EDqQwwTvVcWfpoVGZ2Q8zHKR9uYGfBHl7HsJakDuyVPoBaDoZAcQYji5vSg2Fu5u8aT2XZ9kKckAa9irQvjFhc) ** This is going to be an expensive fight. Hiring staff, recruiting and training volunteers, equipping them with the very best technology to identify our voter and secure their vote by November 5th. There’s no time to lose. In closing, I can't help but think how Adam Schiff and his team of high-priced DC consultants thought they were being savvy in trying to make sure I became their opponent in General Election. Reports are they even spent money running ads promoting me. But what they've really done is awaken a sleeping giant here. Remember, before it became a wasteland of crime, homelessness, and sky-high taxes, California was a land of dreamers, a land of opportunity. It was a place where a scrawny little kid could start as a bat boy for his heroes, work hard, win a World Series, and land on a Topps baseball card. California can be that place again. America can be that place again. And it starts with throwing out political liars and connivers like Adam Schiff and reclaiming our freedom roots. Time is the most important factor. Thank you!

P.S. Adam Schiff had $35 million in the bank. Well, reports are now coming out that he spent upwards of _**$25 million**_ in the primary and is down to $10 million in the bank. Make no mistake, while his cash advantage is greatly diminished, as I write these words, Adam Schiff, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer are quickly reloading. The ActBlue political machine has the capacity to pump millions into his race in the blink of an eye. You and I cannot give them any daylight. **[**Your prompt support is critical.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=0020c7043fec43809a5e139ad73b4ac8&_e=ZHBFhpscreFDkAcGNZWZQiUVDHCd5xsok2MXe9kYLIeXM-F3WXvl-n5iE2656zFcaR5B1Hf8SE5t8hmPLQe_-UoMIXgnfJ-0i1XsOThAk1GDwShMl5dIBnGA6nXcWwjeAip-DT3JGmpq280PZga7S_hvkO-yIHK-8AWVM-6QcGHQZ1uXj0OHtI9oH-UKPlguIOMk2DW9TEs42K6UrjfHULu49YHG32wwB_3FPOhoyl3ciBheaUOeIrclmNAZ34iohUpJbTlORX9jKW8EtY4cA75JmWePYx54xcuW-aRnS2RSTILh91WVA8tztYE5G5GnlgbQitsKB9pTKJ-5eRSSRxzNenIfDM9sRcuKjFs70IXEsWJzwLY84rmGw-rJvwXbrSNrmOMIzOvLeWMxQ9L-zDfx2dMAqOx238DIJOb7IOgmY_g6Znaf5eHKuepbXCa8m_K62XqIDuBmmMLXN0hoG6aEXeVtqpvzNs_fRFxD37rYKpDOiRyOWeej9wYDg57m)** Please don’t delay.

**Some fast facts about this race:** 1️⃣ **Gloria Johnson isn't one to back down from a challenge.** In 2012, when no other Democrats were willing to run in her district — a stronghold the Tennessee GOP considered safely Republican — Gloria stepped up. _She won that race by just 288 votes._ 2️⃣ **Now, Gloria is up against one of the most self-serving and extreme figures in politics: Marsha Blackburn.** She’s perpetuated the Big Lie of election fraud, aggressively pushed for a nationwide abortion ban, and consistently votes for tax cuts that benefit the wealthy. Marsha is heavily backed by corporate PACs and special interests that define her political agenda. 3️⃣ **Gloria runs a clean campaign.** She refuses to accept a cent of corporate PAC money. She is building a people-powered campaign where grassroots supporters are in control, not unaccountable special interests. **_[Gloria is ready to defeat Marsha and bring real representation back to Tennessee, but she can't do it without your support. Every contribution helps us fight against the flood of corporate money in this critical race. body:
Woof! Err.. I mean HI! It's your friend Obi, your favorite four-legged pal, here. May the 4th be with you, by the way. Emails like these are an important aspect of our strategy to keep in touch with our supporters. If you want to receive fewer emails, click **[here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84316501/471141141/29580466?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.05.04_B1_Obi_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWU5NjQ2MC0zMDBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UJz64f5yC6lQXGgbRCchwky-4z2qwRRXSzMh5hQ5XF0=&emci=e2d6c59b-4e09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=b5e96460-300a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=6576167)** If you want to unsubscribe, click **[here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/xijQj8Ub_ESyHtRt33sKYA2?unsubscribedata=EMi01eYLOBmMYmD2Vw%2FOZ7rYgKdySd9szbIIm7qdNDJ1HKp0xK7tUV6PbAF2TN%2F5oGJykmaSFPVhtNW6LHZNxg%2BZxrKend%2BPtu%2BJq2GO5L3%2FAuYQdD6EmcVQPTpxvd3R8q3mhCp%2B8av1ru01nOK%2BCpQ%2BRcBR43dVr17Ea3cRnupg4mo15EW4MXvtvwItIy7FKDJ88sHenodDEl7yGAuhHbdxcXTdqugEC9fQbEp4KOuFODT1VKX2gm9vG5GioHckikA4%2FFJfbd6VvI9YnoTjA0Dcf9Be3RNvbJYiOIxv8PcLmkF4JfZlvHsiODmtvtSKIuhY6W44eaZ1ZJnJoQV7p9S316s6zggtz4k%2F8wTsQHB9lH1zWvfW4rWYi7hv5cVtj1Sp5NXysmQNjUsD19RSn3aFOJyoxB3X4s6LVGS21wA%3D)**

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84316502/471141142/569902138?amount=5&source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.05.04_B1_Obi_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWU5NjQ2MC0zMDBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UJz64f5yC6lQXGgbRCchwky-4z2qwRRXSzMh5hQ5XF0=) Woof! Err.. I mean HI! It's your friend Obi, your favorite four-legged pal, here. May the 4th be with you, by the way. I'm taking a quick break from playing fetch to bring you some very im-paw-tant news. My favorite human in the whoooooole world just launched the Congressional Dog Lovers Caucus. I think we can all agree that dogs are just the absolute best. Jared does so much for me – just like he does the people of Florida. That's why I wanted to throw him a bone by announcing this news. The Electoral College is a scam that makes YOUR vote worth less – it’s SO UNFAIR and COMPLETELY undemocratic!! That’s why we’re rushing to raise $3,941 to make our next ad payment by midnight on Monday and keep our ads running! name: Gallego for Arizona via Fetterman HQ
subject: Pummeled…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
With Sinema out, that means Republicans can focus their negative attack ads on just one candidate.
One $5 donation, Derek.
That is the donation we are asking you to make to Ruben Gallego's campaign for Senate now that Kyrsten Sinema has officially said she's not running.
If that's all you need to hear, use this button:
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240504?amount=5&refcode=em20240504-8971&refcode2=8971_434096_zbw-Im&akid=8971%2E434096%2Ezbw-Im)**
Otherwise, here's the deal:
With Sinema out, that means Republicans can focus their negative attack ads on just one candidate. They don't have to attack Sinema any more, they can just hammer Ruben.
That means we are likely to get pummeled on the airwaves, and it will likely happen soon.
So this request is important:
Arizona is going to be one of the most contested and expensive Senate races in the country.
What happens here will determine who controls the Senate, and probably the White House, too.
Republicans know this as well, so the attack ads are coming. And Ruben can't fight back without your help. So please:
**[Can Ruben Gallego count on you to split $5, or whatever you can afford today, between his campaign and John Fetterman? We will put your support right to work holding on to this Senate seat and winning Arizona.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240504?refcode=em20240504-8971&refcode2=8971_434096_zbw-Im&akid=8971%2E434096%2Ezbw-Im)**

Ruben Gallego for Arizona

name: David Hogg
subject: This awesome ER nurse needs our help in Texas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Molly Cook is an ER nurse and community organizer who’s running for Texas Senate District 15 in Houston.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20240504-1&t=1&akid=649%2E587540%2EsPOQ--)
Hey Peter, I have an urgent update about one of our recently endorsed candidates, **Molly Cook.**
Molly is an ER nurse and community organizer who’s running for Texas Senate District 15 in Houston, but first, **she’s facing a special election TODAY!**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240504-1?refcode=em20240504-1&amount=5&refcode2=649_587540_sPOQ--&akid=649%2E587540%2EsPOQ--)
[**Will you rush a donation to be split between Molly’s campaign and Leaders We Deserve right now? We’re doing everything we can to make sure Molly wins the special election and the general election in November.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240504-1?refcode=em20240504-1&amount=5&refcode2=649_587540_sPOQ--&akid=649%2E587540%2EsPOQ--)
**Molly will be on the ballot again after today – the Democratic primary runoff is on May 28. When we help Molly win, she’ll be on the ballot for the November election. But a win today in the special election will make her the incumbent in the interim – a strong signal of her support for winning this seat!**
As an ER nurse with a Master’s in Public Health, and as someone who had an abortion in Texas in 2014, Molly knows firsthand how Republicans are failing Texans in the legislature.
**She’ll fight like hell to restore abortion rights and make sure everyone has access to the health and reproductive care they need.**
And as a young person herself, Molly doesn’t see school shootings as an abstract issue to be politicized. She knows what it’s like to go through active shooter drills, has treated gunshot wounds in the ER herself, and **is committed to passing common-sense firearm safety regulations to keep our schools and our communities safe.**
Molly’s election is a fantastic opportunity to elect another incredible young leader in Texas, which is why Leaders We Deserve is 100% behind her. We’re going all out to make sure she wins the special election, the primary runoff, AND the general election this November, but we need your support to stay on track.
[**Peter, with the special election today, please don’t wait until it’s too late! Split a $5 donation right between Leaders We Deserve and Molly’s campaign right now to help her win:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240504-1?refcode=em20240504-1&amount=5&refcode2=649_587540_sPOQ--&akid=649%2E587540%2EsPOQ--)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240504-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240504-1-649&refcode2=649_587540_sPOQ--&akid=649%2E587540%2EsPOQ--)**
Thanks. More soon,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20240504-1&t=2&refcode2=649_587540_sPOQ--&akid=649%2E587540%2EsPOQ--)**

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: Reaching out to you personally about reproductive freedom in Florida
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, I've got some great news for you: The Florida Supreme Court just ruled to keep abortion rights on the ballot this November!
But we can’t celebrate just yet — the court also UPHELD Ron DeSantis' unconstitutional 15-week abortion ban, which means his even more extreme six-week ban will take effect in 30 days.
Now, we finally have the chance to overturn Ron DeSantis' extreme ban and restore our reproductive freedom at the polls.
The tides are changing in Florida. And this ballot initiative has a very good chance of passing. Recent polling shows that 62% of voters, including a majority of Republicans, support passing it. And a massive 75% of voters oppose the extreme six-week ban that could take effect in a matter of weeks.
This is what a powerful grassroots movement can accomplish. And that's exactly what we need to defeat Rick Scott and stop him from passing a nationwide ban on abortions.
Listen, Rick Scott wants you to believe that our home is a red state. But that couldn't be further from the truth. More and more of us are rejecting his far-right agenda every day. And polling data shows that this race is neck and neck.
But now, he’s spending millions to lie about his record and launch baseless attacks against me — and I can’t overcome his self-funded ads without the crucial resources to fight back. So please, will you please chip in $15 or more — split between my campaign and Serve America — before 11:59 p.m. tonight to help me reach my rapid- response goal? With all eyes on Florida, we can’t stumble now. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-dmp]
Together, we will win a better future for our state and our families.
Thank you for all that you do,
Debbie

name: Carolina at United We Dream Action
body:
Almost every single DACA recipient is worried about the dangers of deportation. | | | Peter, We have the results from the latest annual survey of DACA recipients, and one statistic was particularly striking: Nearly **9 in 10 respondents (88.4%)** reported concerns about their own or their family’s physical safety, ability to access health care or education, the risk of food insecurity, or the risk of homelessness if deported. The threat of deportation and the risks associated with it are looming over DACA recipients’ heads. **We don’t feel secure in the country we live and work in, as DACA protections may be ripped away at any moment.** DACA has allowed hundreds of thousands of immigrant youth to work and attend school without the threat of deportation — and the benefits have been immeasurable. But currently, DACA is hanging by a thread with new attacks coming every day. If we lose DACA, the risk of deportation is back on the table. **DACA was always meant to be a temporary band-aid fix, but with so much on the line, now is the time for Congress and President Biden to deliver a permanent solution.** **Will you donate now to support our fight for permanent protections?****** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplraXFK6i8Z88BjgFo5RCwd2Q8wWmPfBcAW0n4WCzSbW-q_lqsAg9uJ5EQL0D2WZ5wsKulYzL3E2dqUWo6WWnfyGM4wWuquBe91080j8IqXEENb0S88-YIdPKNDVFFBxAcx148YzRlKEt9d60NJ7NwSwwnBMXunPikzmR3QShDbRAcjyi4TO-2te31hNL8L0qHR4pOhuGB0nTPrjx16g5m2ApBAoadWNUuQJwAeLmgiiCGk-DAZX5ki_z6yH_nFvQrbAxmWCsM9VoNoKUilQPEQFFBmK6AL868rDaxlwZo-FdLEZANSZcX5_kwwdljjEiJp0NFgTEIv7_Zpt5-p4P3Dm9e9TFj3j2YfC_1TswgzPEYnKRAAUSkczwrqliT_x3wa/462/EbAyp5xNRSqa5EWXz-6aVw/h0/h001.VoLfxHd3kSNRyaNyBLoH6TjP6H8PJNjIaDGC1Dsn_to)

clean_body: Almost every single DACA recipient is worried about the dangers of deportation. | | | Peter, We have the results from the latest annual survey of DACA recipients, and one statistic was particularly striking: Nearly 9 in 10 respondents (88.4%) reported concerns about their own or their family’s physical safety, ability to access health care or education, the risk of food insecurity, or the risk of homelessness if deported. The threat of deportation and the risks associated with it are looming over DACA recipients’ heads. We don’t feel secure in the country we live and work in, as DACA protections may be ripped away at any moment. DACA has allowed hundreds of thousands of immigrant youth to work and attend school without the threat of deportation — and the benefits have been immeasurable. But currently, DACA is hanging by a thread with new attacks coming every day. If we lose DACA, the risk of deportation is back on the table. DACA was always meant to be a temporary band-aid fix, but with so much on the line, now is the time for Congress and President Biden to deliver a permanent solution. Will you donate now to support our fight for permanent protections?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for standing with us, Carolina, United We Dream Action | Our most dedicated supporters are chipping in monthly to sustain our fight to secure a pathway to citizenship. Join them and help us win permanent protections in Congress by starting a recurring donation today:** | |

name: Team McBride
subject: These folks have endorsed Sarah
body:
These awesome leaders and activists have endorsed Sarah because they’ve seen her deliver results in the State Senate.
#
The whole team here at McBride HQ is _so proud_ of how much this campaign has grown since we launched last summer.
So many awesome groups and elected officials have endorsed Sarah by now that it can be hard to keep track — so we wanted to send a quick email recapping all the endorsements we’ve earned so far!
**[Pitch in to show your support too »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20240504?refcode=em20240504-1-266&refcode2=266_21716_TIQ7b7&akid=266%2E21716%2ETIQ7b7)**
Sarah has been endorsed by **42 organizations and 31 state and local officials** , including:
* Planned Parenthood Action Fund
* End Citizens United
* Moms Demand Action
* More than 20 unions
* 22 legislators and counting
* 6 current and former statewide elected officials
* And more!

**These awesome leaders and activists have endorsed Sarah because they’ve seen her deliver results in the State Senate.** From health care and paid leave to gun safety and public schools, Sarah has played a critical role in passing bold policies that make government work better for all of us.
They know that Sarah is the person best equipped to continue delivering results for Delaware in Congress — but it’s going to take a BIG statewide coalition to make sure she gets there!
As a grassroots campaign, we’re counting on your support to make sure we have the resources to put our plans into action between now and November.
[**Will you pitch in $5 or any amount that works for you right now to help us continue building the support Sarah needs to win this historic race for Congress?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20240504?refcode=em20240504-1-266&amount=5&refcode2=266_21716_TIQ7b7&akid=266%2E21716%2ETIQ7b7)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20240504?amount=5&refcode=em20240504-1-266&refcode2=266_21716_TIQ7b7&akid=266%2E21716%2ETIQ7b7)**
Thanks!
Team McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20240504-1&t=1&refcode2=266_21716_TIQ7b7&akid=266%2E21716%2ETIQ7b7)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=266%2E21716%2ETIQ7b7)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=266%2E21716%2ETIQ7b7)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=266%2E21716%2ETIQ7b7)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Did you get this?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I have a different request today.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2549%2E35263%2Erl2_qz)
Peter — I have a different request today. **[I’m not asking you to donate. Or even sign a petition. I’m just asking you to click this link — it’ll take you to a page where you can watch one of our latest campaign ads! Promise I’ll explain more in just a moment.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-240504.JYDrgT&refcode=AU_STB_CL_GEN_NOA_AT_20240504_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2549%2E35263%2Erl2_qz)** | | [CLICK HERE](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-240504.JYDrgT&refcode=AU_STB_CL_GEN_NOA_AT_20240504_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2549%2E35263%2Erl2_qz)
---
It’s a strange request, I know, so let me pull back the curtain to explain:
As you may know, email is one of the most powerful tools a grassroots-powered campaign like ours has.
Through emails like this one, we can reach folks across the country in an instant with important updates on our campaign and breaking news in this Senate race. We can organize volunteers, reach out about upcoming events, and get your input through surveys. And of course, we can ask for support when we need it so we can build the resources it’ll take to protect this Senate seat and keep Wisconsin blue.
It’s a powerful tool, and it’s not one that I take for granted.
But lately, email providers have made it more difficult for campaigns like ours to land in your inbox. _They’ve even made it more difficult to determine if you’re even reading our emails!_
With all these changes, it’s forced our campaign to get creative.
My team tells me that by just clicking this email, it will go a long way towards making sure these important campaign updates continue going straight to your inbox — poll updates, major endorsements, updates and photos from the campaign trail, and more!
**[So today, that’s all I’m asking: Will you click this link to make sure you can continue getting all the latest updates from my campaign about Wisconsin’s battleground Senate race? This link will bring you to a page where you can watch one of our latest TV ads — an ad that was made possible thanks to your support.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-240504.JYDrgT&refcode=AU_STB_CL_GEN_NOA_AT_20240504_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=2549%2E35263%2Erl2_qz)**
| [RESTORE ROE](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-240504.JYDrgT&refcode=AU_STB_CL_GEN_NOA_AT_20240504_PM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=2549%2E35263%2Erl2_qz)
---
Thanks for engaging with this campaign and being such a valuable part of our team.
— Tammy
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=2549%2E35263%2Erl2_qz) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=2549%2E35263%2Erl2_qz)**
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
---
If you would like to receive fewer emails, update your subscription preferences [here.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=8&akid=2549%2E35263%2Erl2_qz) If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=2549%2E35263%2Erl2_qz)

clean_body: we're counting on your help to protect this must-win seat before it's too late | | | Friend, we just had to reach out because the facts are sobering: FIRST , Sherrod's millionaire GOP opponent began writing himself massive checks to buy this seat – and even held a massive Mar-a-Lago fundraiser to fill his campaign war chest. THEN , Mitch McConnell-aligned super PACs dropped a record-breaking amount on TV ads to flip this seat and the Senate red. NOW , the latest polls show us losing ground in the race experts say could decide Senate control – and we're falling short of the resources we need to fight back against GOP attacks and pull ahead. Friend, with our midnight deadline quickly approaching, we're counting on your help to protect this must-win seat before it's too late. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sherrod Brown and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = This is mission critical, friend. Thank you for your support. – Team Sherrod | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: We must reform the filibuster
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
Broadly supported policy bills take two weeks (one week to get the bill to the floor and another to get to a final vote).
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84322867/471155238/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzE2NTgzOS0zNzBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hJBRzYe0xQ6ZvOSkeMv_shjlzLkSKFafEdGYMWmCKCE=&emci=1f165839-370a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=2c165839-370a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=7731215)

| | **Mitch McConnell's abuse of the "no-effort" filibuster is paralyzing the Senate.** This inflicts damage on our ability to deliver for Americans in two critical ways. First, McConnell deploys the no-effort filibuster to waste the Senate's time. A non-controversial nomination takes a week. Broadly supported policy bills take two weeks (one week to get the bill to the floor and another to get to a final vote). Second, he wields the no-effort filibuster to stop bold progressive policies: Gun safety bills? Dead. Voting rights? Dead. Labor protections? Dead. Dark money reforms? Dead. Reproductive rights? Dead. Immigration reform? Dead. Mitch McConnell has already eliminated the filibuster for priorities that benefit the privileged: increasing corporate power, stacking the courts, and tax cuts for the rich. **We were elected to solve problems, not apologize because Mitch McConnell stopped us.** That excuse won't fly, nor should it. We need to reform the filibuster for our priorities: abortion rights, voting rights, protecting Social Security, and climate change. [**Today, I'm asking you to sign my petition to tell the Senate to reform the filibuster. We must get it done so we can continue to make progress on the issues that matter most!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84322868/471155239/719444766?contactdata=W7h04mOVSY4lZ5FwOfwua8yORH23oGROzRSHBiLTGhM4NSzbMJ0h3H3kh/rPr/8KOLKsDln5udMSB2e+ugl8K1aSaObNqLPBVAyRL9Znnpe7ARXtp0NZD9VNk1RsSVtI6vad9m49lwOs8TWeXC9kqw==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzE2NTgzOS0zNzBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hJBRzYe0xQ6ZvOSkeMv_shjlzLkSKFafEdGYMWmCKCE=&emci=1f165839-370a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=2c165839-370a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=7731215) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84322869/471155240/719444766?contactdata=W7h04mOVSY4lZ5FwOfwua8yORH23oGROzRSHBiLTGhM4NSzbMJ0h3H3kh/rPr/8KOLKsDln5udMSB2e+ugl8K1aSaObNqLPBVAyRL9Znnpe7ARXtp0NZD9VNk1RsSVtI6vad9m49lwOs8TWeXC9kqw==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzE2NTgzOS0zNzBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hJBRzYe0xQ6ZvOSkeMv_shjlzLkSKFafEdGYMWmCKCE=&emci=1f165839-370a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=2c165839-370a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=7731215) Onward! _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

YOU ABANDONED US??? 🤬🤬
YOU HATE DEMOCRATS?? - Chip in $5 to say no!** **We’ll be honest with you, friend:** ⬆️ _Those_ ⬆️ types of overly dramatic emails might help campaigns raise more money, but they leave a sour taste in our mouths.

**This campaign and this movement** is not about who can raise the most money. It’s about whose message will resonate with voters. Whose ideas and ideals reflect the electorate, not who has the most over-the-top hysterics.

**So we’ll ask you, in simple terms, if you can chip in just $10 to our campaign.** We’re fighting to protect health care, defend Social Security, and reverse the damage done by the extreme MAGA House Majority’s agenda.

clean_body: | = Look, friend, we’re not going to do further damage to your inbox (or sanity) with emails that look more like ransom notes than requests for a few dollars to flip the House... 🚨 THIS IS A NIGHTMARE!! 🚨 YOU ABANDONED US??? 🤬🤬 YOU HATE DEMOCRATS?? - Chip in $5 to say no! We’ll be honest with you, friend: ⬆️ Those ⬆️ types of overly dramatic emails might help campaigns raise more money, but they leave a sour taste in our mouths. This campaign and this movement is not about who can raise the most money. It’s about whose message will resonate with voters. Whose ideas and ideals reflect the electorate, not who has the most over-the-top hysterics. So we’ll ask you, in simple terms, if you can chip in just $10 to our campaign. We’re fighting to protect health care, defend Social Security, and reverse the damage done by the extreme MAGA House Majority’s agenda. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Thank you, Team Ruiz | | Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P.O. subject: Fox News. Tucker Carlson. Donald Trump.
body:
COURIER is fighting back and we need your help to protect our democracy.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84323608/471157044/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTkyZWZkYzktMzcwYS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WWFJup-TYQJOgO3MAu77vzTLK3lgetk9VFQC_y2cIa8=&emci=c8b39b9d-5509-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=592efdc9-370a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=14016711)
**Peter – America is stuck in a dangerous information crisis. **
Fox News. Tucker Carlson. Donald Trump. It seems like their sole mission is to spread lies, bigotry, and division to millions.
As the 2024 election approaches, we urgently need credible and fact-based journalism to correct the record and stop the spread of bad information before it starts.
Here at COURIER, we’re fighting back by building the largest left-leaning network of local newsrooms in America.
**[But to go toe to toe with the likes of Fox News, we need your help. Right now, we’re working to raise the resources we need to power our newsrooms and ramp up our fight against bad information. So we’re asking: will you chip in](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84323610/471157047/-593472309?refcode=20240504-EM-CarlsonFox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTkyZWZkYzktMzcwYS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WWFJup-TYQJOgO3MAu77vzTLK3lgetk9VFQC_y2cIa8=) [$15 now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84323612/471157049/-593472309?refcode=20240504-EM-CarlsonFox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTkyZWZkYzktMzcwYS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WWFJup-TYQJOgO3MAu77vzTLK3lgetk9VFQC_y2cIa8=)**
On cable news, social media, and even the dark web, right-wing bad actors keep doubling down on propaganda and lies — weakening our democracy in the process.
Without viable alternatives, millions of Americans have found themselves trapped in an echo chamber of bad information and fake news.
That’s where we come in.
**At COURIER, we counter bad information by reporting factual, relevant local news stories, delivered directly to those who need it most.**
We already have local newsrooms in ten battleground states staffed by real journalists who live in the communities we serve, and we’re ready to expand our network to provide good information and news to the communities in need the most.
To do that, we need your help to spread the word about the great reporting published by our talented team of journalists every day. We know that the best antidote to disinformation is good information, and that’s what our newsrooms take pride in delivering across the country.
**Now here’s where you come in.** We’re only able to offer free, accessible local news because grassroots supporters like you chip in what they can when they can.
We’re planning on expanding our network of newsrooms to take on powerful right-wing misinformation engines like Fox News, Tucker Carlson, and Donald Trump. But our work wouldn’t be possible without your support.
**[So](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84323614/471157051/2081106790?refcode=20240504-EM-CarlsonFox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTkyZWZkYzktMzcwYS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WWFJup-TYQJOgO3MAu77vzTLK3lgetk9VFQC_y2cIa8=)**[**, Peter, can you chip in $15 today so we can continue to fight against dangerous misinformation?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84323618/471157053/2081106790?refcode=20240504-EM-CarlsonFox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTkyZWZkYzktMzcwYS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WWFJup-TYQJOgO3MAu77vzTLK3lgetk9VFQC_y2cIa8=)

clean_body: COURIER is fighting back and we need your help to protect our democracy. Peter – America is stuck in a dangerous information crisis. Fox News. Tucker Carlson. Donald Trump. It seems like their sole mission is to spread lies, bigotry, and division to millions. As the 2024 election approaches, we urgently need credible and fact-based journalism to correct the record and stop the spread of bad information before it starts. Here at COURIER, we’re fighting back by building the largest left-leaning network of local newsrooms in America. = = On cable news, social media, and even the dark web, right-wing bad actors keep doubling down on propaganda and lies — weakening our democracy in the process. Without viable alternatives, millions of Americans have found themselves trapped in an echo chamber of bad information and fake news. That’s where we come in. At COURIER, we counter bad information by reporting factual, relevant local news stories, delivered directly to those who need it most. We already have local newsrooms in ten battleground states staffed by real journalists who live in the communities we serve, and we’re ready to expand our network to provide good information and news to the communities in need the most. To do that, we need your help to spread the word about the great reporting published by our talented team of journalists every day. We know that the best antidote to disinformation is good information, and that’s what our newsrooms take pride in delivering across the country. Now here’s where you come in. We’re only able to offer free, accessible local news because grassroots supporters like you chip in what they can when they can. We’re planning on expanding our network of newsrooms to take on powerful right-wing misinformation engines like Fox News, Tucker Carlson, and Donald Trump. But our work wouldn’t be possible without your support. = Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- Thank you! The COURIER Team Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

Hello there, Peter! I have a good feeling about this campaign. And it’s not because I’m running against a stuck-up, half-witted, scruffy-looking nerf-herder. Some may think Arizona is like Tattoine – a desert with Tucsons; a place full of coarse, rough, and irritating sand. But in 2024, if there is a bright center to the political universe, it is Arizona’s First Congressional District. You’d have to be a mindless philosopher to not understand that this is the district that could very well decide who controls the House, the Senate (U.S., not Galactic), and the White House. If we had Chancellor elections, it would probably decide that too. So far, our campaign has outraised David Schweikert’s corporate PAC darth money allies. But don’t get cocky. They’ll soon be back. And in greater numbers. **So help me, Peter. You’re my only hope. I have the high ground against David Schweikert, but I can’t do this Solo.** [In honor of May 4th, will you donate to our campaign today? $5.40, $54, $540 – size matters not. ---
Donald Trump and David Schweikert. Always two there are. Both tried to overturn the election on January 6th and both have worked for a national abortion ban.
Liberty doesn’t die to thunderous applause. It dies when good people do nothing.
**But good people will fight if we lead them. And that’s what this campaign is all about. While rebellions are built on hope, campaigns are won if we have the resources to tell voters about their choice.**
[You may not know (or care) about the difference between a midichlorian and a Mandalorian, but you do know how important it is that our campaign stays on target. So will you make a donation to help me win this race?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84323780/471157205/695535462?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240504_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWIyZWZkYzktMzcwYS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=t654q0i4l1OQCJczhpMVJzK-VOnC7gi4NxDV1SJ_2ik=)
Yes, today’s Congress is a wretched hive of scum and villainy, but I’m willing to take a shot at cleaning it up. Even if it is one in a million.
So, thanks for reading this – and all you do. Now, you can go about your business.
Move along. Move along.
Forcefully yours,
Andrei

Phoenix, AZ 85068

name: brian lenney
subject: ICYMI
body:
|
---
| | Real quick...

I sent a big letter to Nampa Republicans yesterday about what's at stake in my senate race and why we can't let my challenger get his hands on the state checkbook again.

Here it is in case you want to share it:

>> [See it here](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=c6a0167688&e=dea908e0fe "see it")

Have a great weekend!

Cheers,

Brian

**P.S.**

The guy challeneging me, Jeff Agenbroad, just took****_BIG money_**** from Bayer on Thursday...

Yes, _THAT Bayer!_

They're the same company that bought Monsanto and owns Roundup—a product at the heart of thousands of lawsuits for allegedly causing cancer. They're a multinational and multibillion-dollar company. They tried to sneak a bill through Idaho this year to shield themselves from these lawsuits, but we killed that dead on the Senate floor. Looks like they’re lining up their next batch of rubber-stampers to take another swing at it...

So, now, Agenbroad's got his pockets stuffed with cash from**Pfizer, Johnson & Johnson, __AND__ Bayer.**

Clearly, Big Pharma’s puppet strings are tight on him.

What else can you expect from a certified "yes man"?

\---

1) To make sure you keep getting these emails, please add [blforidaho@gmail.com](mailto:blforidaho@gmail.com) to your address book or whitelist me.

3) My postal address: PO Box 3753, Nampa, ID 83653-3753

body:
It will be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

---
# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Reader, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today's media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It's a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun's deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I've been impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun's success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don't wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

name: Mark
subject: ICYMI: Wild Week Edition!
body:
Mark Ronchetti & the No Doubt About It Podcast Recap | | | | | |
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=11f01a7f9b&e=567664f14c)

In case you missed it, from antisemitic campus protests to drag queens at a New Mexico prom we covered it on the [No Doubt About It Podcast](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=4747b54eb9&e=567664f14c):
**CAMPUS CONTROVERSIES:
** We delved into the world of antisemitic campus protests and discussed the various perspectives on how universities should handle them. Tune in to hear a clip featuring Ronald Reagan's insights on this topic.
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=a34e4f7b50&e=567664f14c)
[Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=56bb87dd83&e=567664f14c)
**Prom Royalty??:**
On Monday’s episode we talk about the shock behind a New Mexico prom featuring a drag queen and the parents’ quick response to the school.
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=91ef60630c&e=567664f14c)
[Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=e340215417&e=567664f14c)
**Campaign Contributions:**
With campaign season underway, we shed light on the importance of grassroots support in political campaigns. Learn why even small donations of $10 or $20 can make a meaningful difference to your favorite political candidate.
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=94211c31d7&e=567664f14c)
[Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=246b97de15&e=567664f14c)

clean_body: Mark Ronchetti & the No Doubt About It Podcast Recap | | | | | | In case you missed it, from antisemitic campus protests to drag queens at a New Mexico prom we covered it on the : CAMPUS CONTROVERSIES: We delved into the world of antisemitic campus protests and discussed the various perspectives on how universities should handle them. Tune in to hear a clip featuring Ronald Reagan's insights on this topic. Prom Royalty??: On Monday’s episode we talk about the shock behind a New Mexico prom featuring a drag queen and the parents’ quick response to the school. Campaign Contributions: With campaign season underway, we shed light on the importance of grassroots support in political campaigns. Learn why even small donations of $10 or $20 can make a meaningful difference to your favorite political candidate. | NEW EPISODE MONDAY! Catch up on these discussions and more by tuning in to the of the No Doubt About It Podcast. Best, Mark and Krysty Ronchetti | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | © 2024 Choose Adventure Media. body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84324338/471158733/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2E2OTZhMi0zODBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ujHADtUigjl5jJkWXhYCEc7H-4SogO27RCLwnCe2tEU=) Hey — I didn’t run for Congress just to sound off on Twitter or see myself on TV. (Which is why you probably don’t see me on cable news all that much!) I’m in this fight to deliver real progress for Oregon. And even though we’ve got an extremely tough election right around the corner, I’m still working hard every day to get things done for our community. That’s why I’d love to hear from you about what you’d like to see my colleagues and me focus on in the coming months. [_**So, will you take a moment and let me know what issue, or issues, are top of mind for you and your family right now?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84324339/471158764/-1622308443?refcode=email_050424_survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2E2OTZhMi0zODBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ujHADtUigjl5jJkWXhYCEc7H-4SogO27RCLwnCe2tEU=&emci=9c9c30f4-7d09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=8ca696a2-380a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=5643047) | | [Take The Survey →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84324340/471158790/-648832505?refcode=email_050424_survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2E2OTZhMi0zODBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ujHADtUigjl5jJkWXhYCEc7H-4SogO27RCLwnCe2tEU=&emci=9c9c30f4-7d09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=8ca696a2-380a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=5643047)

This is a grassroots campaign, which means every single person in this fight has a voice, and today, I’m asking you to take just a minute to use yours.
Whether you’re most concerned about the cost of living, the GOP attacks on abortion rights, or the future of Oregon’s agriculture sector, I want to hear from you.
[_**Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts with me. I look forward to hearing what you’ve got to say.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84324341/471158803/-648832505?refcode=email_050424_survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2E2OTZhMi0zODBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ujHADtUigjl5jJkWXhYCEc7H-4SogO27RCLwnCe2tEU=&emci=9c9c30f4-7d09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=8ca696a2-380a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=5643047)
Have a great rest of your Saturday.
-Andrea

We have one question: Is defeating extreme Republicans across the country worth $7 to you? At the state legislative ballot level, races come down to a handful of votes, and resources are limited. A $7 gift could give our in-state partners the necessary resources to fund get-out-the-vote efforts, hire digital staff, and invest in TV ads to spread our message across the airwaves. **Your $7 donation could be the difference between electing state Democrats who will fight to protect abortion rights or losing to one of our far-right Republican opponents who aim to attack all of our fundamental freedoms.** [We’re asking you directly. Is seeing Democrats win in 2024 and defeating MAGA Republicans worth $7 to you? clean_body: Your $7 donation could be the difference between electing state Democrats who fight to protect abortion rights or losing to one of our far-right Republican opponents. | | | | | ---|--- We have one question: Is defeating extreme Republicans across the country worth $7 to you? At the state legislative ballot level, races come down to a handful of votes, and resources are limited. A $7 gift could give our in-state partners the necessary resources to fund get-out-the-vote efforts, hire digital staff, and invest in TV ads to spread our message across the airwaves. Your $7 donation could be the difference between electing state Democrats who will fight to protect abortion rights or losing to one of our far-right Republican opponents who aim to attack all of our fundamental freedoms. We’re working to expand Democratic power, defend our majorities, and break up Republican supermajorities this fall – but it all starts with a donation from grassroots supporters like you. If you step up and decide $7 is worth investing, you can feel good knowing that you helped Democrats gain power in states nationwide. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thank you so much, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Paid for by DLCC PAC. name: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
subject: Am I Left or Right?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Let me be clear: labels do not define my mission.

|
---
| | | | [**Labels do not define my mission. You do!**](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=classic_liberal_5_4_24_un_nd1&n=1)

---
|
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=classic_liberal_5_4_24_un_nd1&n=2)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=classic_liberal_5_4_24_un_nd1&n=3)
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=classic_liberal_5_4_24_un_nd1&n=4)
---
|
---
Dear Peter,
In a world quick to label and divide, I stand before you not just as another candidate, but as a voice for authentic change.
Many wonder if I fit on the Right or the Left politically—some call me a conservative, others a liberal.
Let me be clear: _labels do not define my mission_.
You do!
I am a “classic liberal” in the sense that I believe in the values of JFK and my father RFK. Those were the days when Democrats championed free speech, peace, civil liberties, and (though it may surprise you) a strong border.
Before I unravel what all that means, I want to ask for your much needed contribution to help us seize the momentum. [Your donation will directly fund our ballot access efforts and legal challenges, and ensure my vision for America is heard in every state.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=classic_liberal_5_4_24_un_nd1&n=5)
| [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=50&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=classic_liberal_5_4_24_un_nd1&n=6)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=75&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=classic_liberal_5_4_24_un_nd1&n=7)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=100&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=classic_liberal_5_4_24_un_nd1&n=8)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=240&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=classic_liberal_5_4_24_un_nd1&n=9)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=classic_liberal_5_4_24_un_nd1&n=10)
---
First, Restoring Liberty: My presidency will dismantle the surveillance state that both parties have supported, restoring and protecting constitutional freedoms eroded under the guise of national security.
Second, End the Chronic Disease Epidemic: The CDC admits 60% of Americans suffer from chronic diseases like diabetes, heart disease, Alzheimers, and cancer. I will redirect federal resources toward finding out the causes and enacting the solutions to this terrible crisis that affects nearly every American family.
Third, Supporting the Underserved: My administration will prioritize reversing the marginalization of the 'little guy,' ensuring inclusivity and support for those often overlooked by government policies.
Fourth, Managing Immigration: Advocating for strong borders to protect American labor from being undermined by unregulated, cheap workforce influx, ensuring fair wages and conditions for all workers.
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=classic_liberal_5_4_24_un_nd1&n=11)
---
Fifth, Committing to Peace: Unlike my competitors, I will cease America’s involvement in costly foreign conflicts that have drained our resources and compromised our national values. No more regime change wars!
Sixth, Nurturing the Future: I will focus on policies that enhance the health and economic opportunities for young Americans, making it easier for them to own homes and live prosperously.
Seventh, Protecting the Environment: True to the traditional values of environmentalism, my presidency will focus on conserving our natural resources, eliminating pollutants, and safeguarding our ecosystems.
Eighth, Strengthening Democracy: Understanding that a healthy democracy relies on a robust middle class, I will end the corporate capture of our regulatory agencies that drains America of our resources for the enrichment of a few and the impoverishment of the many.
Finally, Ensuring Fairness: Addressing economic polarization, I will advocate for higher wages, support stronger labor protections, reduce housing costs, and enhance social safety nets to ensure that all Americans can thrive.
Call me a Kennedy Democrat, call me independent or conservative — whatever you want. _These are the things I believe in and that’s where I stand._
If you resonate with my vision for our country then I invite you to stand with me. I invite you to be part of the reweaving of America. I invite you to join our coalition of liberals, conservatives, and independents, committed to taking this country back not just for the left or right, but for the American people.
| [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=50&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=classic_liberal_5_4_24_un_nd1&n=12)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=75&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=classic_liberal_5_4_24_un_nd1&n=13)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=100&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=classic_liberal_5_4_24_un_nd1&n=14)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=240&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=classic_liberal_5_4_24_un_nd1&n=15)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=classic_liberal_5_4_24_un_nd1&n=16)
---
I have about six months left to make sure Americans know what I believe and that there is a third option come Election Day. **As an independent candidate, I’ve alienated all the largest corporate donors – _so I’m relying on small contributions from people like you._**
[As we enter a critical phase of our campaign, your support is more important than ever.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=classic_liberal_5_4_24_un_nd1&n=17)
Thank you for your unwavering dedication to my campaign.
| |
---
---
Sincerely,
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
---

body:
It's Greg's birthday!
Peter, did you see Tara’s email yesterday?
**TODAY is Greg’s 35th birthday! Can you sign his card?**
In a few hours we’ll deliver Greg’s birthday card—and we would love to include your name.
**[Click here to sign Greg’s 35th birthday card! After signing, consider chipping in $35 for his 35th birthday to support his reelection to TX-35.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84324965/471160159/1113216336?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmE3YTA1ZC0zOTBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bVsDNLn_IIsMYUAHfHp1Nr6B9EdHxkfrTS588vk-ebQ=&emci=acca3815-380a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=06a7a05d-390a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=6830379)**

**-Team Casar**

clean_body: It's Greg's birthday! Peter, did you see Tara’s email yesterday? TODAY is Greg’s 35th birthday! Can you sign his card? In a few hours we’ll deliver Greg’s birthday card—and we would love to include your name. Thank you for helping celebrate Greg’s birthday! -Team Casar \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Tara Pohlmeyer Date: May 3, 2024 at 12:25 PM EDT To: Peter Subject: A surprise for Greg! Peter, can you keep a secret? This Saturday, May 4th, is Greg’s 35th birthday – and as one of his top supporters, we were hoping you could help us surprise him by signing his birthday card. Greg spends every day fighting for the people of Texas’s 35th District. So this year, on his 35th birthday, we’re asking our top supporters if they can chip in $35 to support his reelection. Our team plans to deliver Greg’s signed card to him on his birthday this Saturday. And we would LOVE to add your name. ** Thank you for being a part of this team! -Tara Tara Pohlmeyer Communications Director Greg Casar for Congress ****=** | ****** ---|---

Friend,
There are just TWO DAYS left before we pick a winner for the RPK giveaway!
Every $5 you contribute earns you an entry. So, $20 gets you 4 entries and $100 nets you 20 entries.

The reason is simple: the DC swamp is funneling millions of dollars to my opponent, Tony "Turncoat" Gonzales. If he falls, their agenda of increased gun control, open borders, and expanded government surveillance will hit the wall - HARD.

clean_body: | | | | | | Peter, With all the appalling antisemitic acts we have seen take place across New York, and the rest of the country, my colleagues and I are thrilled to announce the passing of our bill The Antisemitic Act. Hi Peter,

Last month, we announced that **Rhode Island will receive nearly $50 million** in federal funding through the EPA’s Solar for All Program.

This money will help thousands of Rhode Island families save money while also achieving significant reductions in carbon emissions. This is what Rhode Island’s clean energy future is all about:**saving money, providing good jobs and taking us one step closer to a decarbonized economy.** I’m proud to be working with my colleagues in Rhode Island’s congressional delegation in bringing home important funding for clean energy projects, and today I’m asking for your support for our re-election campaign.

| | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvY5hIpYyZFo4TAxtBXDcsHf_ax_xlyzGIMdeK0GuEab7UqDPh9GdWCK4h8pCtXT16lv3UOaFTUOZHy-a1e1TErZ-psLXZdC7nexcmTpM780QPMf4uHyhnPBB3aYJg7_jI8hzon7hdlf6wX8nqVhoI--boGba4icxsm67FmoqU4VsZ0lywftJjzpJAF-MV3dHp0qjdw06dveC_verZ3WjwiS1eUzzeZEBWtqW02xvwU5WFErrfT0p4ELk2vNoOQx4e0RC10pfomHiKOGKuAnPLIZul__tfEnN8tTzUpuy7O8rfADAcyj8pyUDNxTCvkiyOimevuV-NCrx2q1-RxNy6eXyhRFAUzIsNqf988A7hfl7DoyWWpBgVJSpnFMzZkZn4FZwZy8W5gWznw6YKJ4C2z/462/o4xN4EoDRn63nIJHa--wHw/h0/h001.GIGfy8x2Tj4PR1GRJDrDkRLEWLPYIPQdC9vUbrta3Mc) Holocaust denier, racist bigot, and Trump-endorsed MAGA Republican Mark Robinson is at 42% for North Carolina Governor - _one point_ ahead of Democrat Josh Stein at 41%.
That's according to an Emerson College/The Hill poll released this week - confirming that this key swing-state governorship is a _TOTAL TOSS-UP._ North Carolina voters need to know that raging antisemite Mark Robinson called the Holocaust _"foolishness ... hogwash"_ and declared that he was _"sick of seeing and hearing people still talk about the Nazis."_ **On Monday, May 6 - Holocaust Day of Remembrance - we're running a TV and digital ad exposing Robinson's Holocaust denial in his own words.** What we raise this weekend will determine whether we go statewide, or target only certain cities. clean_body: | | | Holocaust denier, racist bigot, and Trump-endorsed MAGA Republican Mark Robinson is at 42% for North Carolina Governor - one point ahead of Democrat Josh Stein at 41%. That's according to an Emerson College/The Hill poll released this week - confirming that this key swing-state governorship is a TOTAL TOSS-UP. North Carolina voters need to know that raging antisemite Mark Robinson called the Holocaust "foolishness ... hogwash" and declared that he was "sick of seeing and hearing people still talk about the Nazis." On Monday, May 6 - Holocaust Day of Remembrance - we're running a TV and digital ad exposing Robinson's Holocaust denial in his own words. What we raise this weekend will determine whether we go statewide, or target only certain cities. Every $70 we raise means approximately 2,000 voters will see the ad. body:
Rachel Maddow is calling out David McCormick
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2886%2E552475%2ENqs8xO)
Peter —
David McCormick is lying about his upbringing, and Rachel Maddow just called him out.
This week, Maddow laid out **why Pennsylvanians can’t trust David McCormick** , saying, _“[Republicans] have decided that [McCormick is] going to describe himself as someone who started with nothing...David McCormick largely grew up at what is now Bloomsburg University in the president's sprawling hilltop residence...”_
**[Chip In ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240504-1?refcode=em20240504-1&recurring=1&refcode2=2886_552475_Nqs8xO&akid=2886%2E552475%2ENqs8xO)**
Pennsylvania deserves an honest and reliable leader who actually lives here — not a mega-millionaire hedge fund executive who wants to buy Pennsylvania’s Senate seat.
**That Senator is Bob Casey.**
We’re doing everything we can to keep PA blue and re-elect Bob Casey to continue fighting for working families in the Senate. But to set McCormick’s record straight, we need you, Peter.
[**Will you pitch in $5 or more to share our message across the Commonwealth and stop McCormick and his billionaire backers from buying this seat?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240504-1?refcode=em20240504-1&recurring=1&refcode2=2886_552475_Nqs8xO&akid=2886%2E552475%2ENqs8xO)
