Fight food insecurity with long-term emergency food. Get your kit for $50 OFF!
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kE1zwiAQhn_N5maG7BLIhUNbxU6daXtsjwhEcUAiiWb89x2t7XU_nveZ16Qhhv6qQD4D4j64ERCBngDx9D2ncj6kzXrxwS5xcRLvqb1t8QUQp-vg_08flNonE-JtKpeVU9Q7xiuvGtnwjlNHotorRri1Eo3pSDBr-6b11HdobNuRNNZWQSFDzlrGG0kMWc1F76VBgYYL0dAWOLvn1Cb5Eqxpxmk2peScaptTFdV-mobxLqYB9VxyfTzb6M_j75vNCVA_lAH1BVBv1np7OK6-3g5A-t4CLd1qN79-puyqotwwhxjDKCRwtvvD_AQAAP__kZVgnQ)

| | | |
# **Have you ever experienced true, gnawing hunger?**
In our modern world with all its abundance and options, most people haven't. They’re used to having long-term food security bolstered by supply chains, fast food, delivery apps, and chain restaurants. Some have never even missed a meal. But what if they had to? What if disaster were to strike tomorrow, leaving thousands of Americans without access to food? Most couldn't go even a few days without food, let alone a week. They lack the resources, know-how, and preparation to be able to feed themselves or their families. Sadly, many would go hungry. Some might even starve. Would you? Don't wait to find out.

Don't be like the unprepared, who rely on delicate systems to feed them. They aren't ready for what's coming next and are even less prepared to do the hard work to find food after a crisis.

[The time to start preparing is now.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jjFPwzAQRn_NZUt0OV-dMGQAqjAgwcyE3NhuDbbs2i5R_j1KhVjfPd33VEje2W2C4QmILk4XIALxCETXjzXk21d4fWnf8ce3V_kWDvuVnoGobsn8q39fOhOU8zsdjo2ehNXIjZn6oeeRxShkc5m0MIYQtTaILMdRmRMz8cIoxgeUtnETITEekPtBIGHH0ppBkSTFUvbiBIz3nU4Fk92i-lJXlXOMoVtiaPx0qTWVe9gMNIctqZpdrOWWkt92B2hO6mwK0FySWZzybbTWZBDzrYZPp0Ecef0-YLQWSO6smhxAHJFbGto9sMmTTqvz3hU5AOP5nrTE8BsAAP__iu5mmQ) When groceries are picked over, looted, or permanently closed, they will be scrounging around for scraps while you enjoy the fruits of your labor. They will be left trying to forage or hunt for the first time—competing with thousands of others—while you enjoy your stockpile. As the old saying goes, “an ounce of prevention is worth a pound of cure.” Those who prepare are setting themselves up for success, no matter what comes next. They will be ready to put food on the table for themselves and their families during times of famine, conflict, supply chain disruptions, and more. [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jjFPwzAQRn_NZUt0OV-dMGQAqjAgwcyE3NhuDbbs2i5R_j1KhVjfPd33VEje2W2C4QmILk4XIALxCETXjzXk21d4fWnf8ce3V_kWDvuVnoGobsn8q39fOhOU8zsdjo2ehNXIjZn6oeeRxShkc5m0MIYQtTaILMdRmRMz8cIoxgeUtnETITEekPtBIGHH0ppBkSTFUvbiBIz3nU4Fk92i-lJXlXOMoVtiaPx0qTWVe9gMNIctqZpdrOWWkt92B2hO6mwK0FySWZzybbTWZBDzrYZPp0Ecef0-YLQWSO6smhxAHJFbGto9sMmTTqvz3hU5AOP5nrTE8BsAAP__iu5mmQ) There is no better time to get ready for what's coming next. [**My Patriot Supply**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jjFPwzAQRn_NZUt0OV-dMGQAqjAgwcyE3NhuDbbs2i5R_j1KhVjfPd33VEje2W2C4QmILk4XIALxCETXjzXk21d4fWnf8ce3V_kWDvuVnoGobsn8q39fOhOU8zsdjo2ehNXIjZn6oeeRxShkc5m0MIYQtTaILMdRmRMz8cIoxgeUtnETITEekPtBIGHH0ppBkSTFUvbiBIz3nU4Fk92i-lJXlXOMoVtiaPx0qTWVe9gMNIctqZpdrOWWkt92B2hO6mwK0FySWZzybbTWZBDzrYZPp0Ecef0-YLQWSO6smhxAHJFbGto9sMmTTqvz3hU5AOP5nrTE8BsAAP__iu5mmQ) is here to ensure that you, and _millions_ of other families, are prepared for the worst. **My Patriot Supply** are the experts in emergency preparedness. They have streamlined and perfected the path to securing your peace of mind with readiness essentials.
## With the [**4-Week Emergency Food Supply**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jjFPwzAQRn_NZUt0OV-dMGQAqjAgwcyE3NhuDbbs2i5R_j1KhVjfPd33VEje2W2C4QmILk4XIALxCETXjzXk21d4fWnf8ce3V_kWDvuVnoGobsn8q39fOhOU8zsdjo2ehNXIjZn6oeeRxShkc5m0MIYQtTaILMdRmRMz8cIoxgeUtnETITEekPtBIGHH0ppBkSTFUvbiBIz3nU4Fk92i-lJXlXOMoVtiaPx0qTWVe9gMNIctqZpdrOWWkt92B2hO6mwK0FySWZzybbTWZBDzrYZPp0Ecef0-YLQWSO6smhxAHJFbGto9sMmTTqvz3hU5AOP5nrTE8BsAAP__iu5mmQ) from **My Patriot Supply,** setting up for survival becomes a matter of a single, effortless step.
Even better? For a limited time, this essential food stash is yours for **$50 OFF!** If you're ready to start getting serious about your stockpile, this is the ideal building block. With a whole _month_ of delicious, easy-to-prepare food on hand, you'll be ready to face power outages, evacuations, economic challenges, and more. But this is just the beginning... Once you start taking preparation seriously, you'll be ready to set up a serious stockpile that will last you for months. You'll sleep better at night knowing your family is ready to hold out for the long haul—and it all will have started with this one kit. Whether you're an experienced survivalist or just starting on the road to total readiness, this 4-Week Emergency Food Supply is your plan to fight food insecurity. It's designed to last, offering peace of mind for up to 25 years, ready whenever and wherever you need it. In emergencies, calories are crucial. You need at least 2,000 to make it through each day, and this kit delivers that _and then some_. With options for breakfast, lunch, dinner, and drinks, meal monotony won't be a problem. Instead, you'll find delicious, easy-to-prepare meals to get you through any crisis. [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jjFPwzAQRn_NZUt0OV-dMGQAqjAgwcyE3NhuDbbs2i5R_j1KhVjfPd33VEje2W2C4QmILk4XIALxCETXjzXk21d4fWnf8ce3V_kWDvuVnoGobsn8q39fOhOU8zsdjo2ehNXIjZn6oeeRxShkc5m0MIYQtTaILMdRmRMz8cIoxgeUtnETITEekPtBIGHH0ppBkSTFUvbiBIz3nU4Fk92i-lJXlXOMoVtiaPx0qTWVe9gMNIctqZpdrOWWkt92B2hO6mwK0FySWZzybbTWZBDzrYZPp0Ecef0-YLQWSO6smhxAHJFbGto9sMmTTqvz3hU5AOP5nrTE8BsAAP__iu5mmQ) Just boil water, add it to the meal mix, and let it simmer for a few minutes. The result? Flavors that defy your expectations of emergency food. Far from your typical "disaster diet," these meals are so delightful that many of our customers dig in _immediately_ without waiting for an emergency to strike. In your kit, you can expect to enjoy comforting, morale-boosting favorites like mac and cheese, mashed potatoes, buttermilk pancakes, and more! The inevitability of another crisis is clear, the question is just "when?" That's why keeping a dependable stockpile of emergency food now is your smartest move. Just stock up and set it aside until it's needed. Yes, it really is that simple. Don't gamble with your survival. Complete this essential first step today, and rest easier knowing that, come what may, your family will have what they need during difficult times. Facing an uncertain future doesn't have to be a solo journey. **My Patriot Supply** has got your back, helping you get ready for whatever challenges might come your way. It doesn't matter what kind of danger or where it's coming from—they're here to get you prepared for _anything._ It's time to take this crucial step. Click the button below and secure a 4-Week Emergency Food Kit for **$50 OFF** per kit! Get one for **EVERY** member of your family. But don't wait! This rare deal ends **SOON.** [_Click here_](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jjFPwzAQRn_NZUt0OV-dMGQAqjAgwcyE3NhuDbbs2i5R_j1KhVjfPd33VEje2W2C4QmILk4XIALxCETXjzXk21d4fWnf8ce3V_kWDvuVnoGobsn8q39fOhOU8zsdjo2ehNXIjZn6oeeRxShkc5m0MIYQtTaILMdRmRMz8cIoxgeUtnETITEekPtBIGHH0ppBkSTFUvbiBIz3nU4Fk92i-lJXlXOMoVtiaPx0qTWVe9gMNIctqZpdrOWWkt92B2hO6mwK0FySWZzybbTWZBDzrYZPp0Ecef0-YLQWSO6smhxAHJFbGto9sMmTTqvz3hU5AOP5nrTE8BsAAP__iu5mmQ) to start building your food future today.

clean_body: Fight food insecurity with long-term emergency food. Get your kit for $50 OFF! | | | | Have you ever experienced true, gnawing hunger? In our modern world with all its abundance and options, most people haven't. They’re used to having long-term food security bolstered by supply chains, fast food, delivery apps, and chain restaurants. Some have never even missed a meal. But what if they had to? What if disaster were to strike tomorrow, leaving thousands of Americans without access to food? Most couldn't go even a few days without food, let alone a week. They lack the resources, know-how, and preparation to be able to feed themselves or their families. Sadly, many would go hungry. Some might even starve. Would you? Don't wait to find out. Don't be like the unprepared, who rely on delicate systems to feed them. They aren't ready for what's coming next and are even less prepared to do the hard work to find food after a crisis. When groceries are picked over, looted, or permanently closed, they will be scrounging around for scraps while you enjoy the fruits of your labor. They will be left trying to forage or hunt for the first time—competing with thousands of others—while you enjoy your stockpile. As the old saying goes, “an ounce of prevention is worth a pound of cure.” Those who prepare are setting themselves up for success, no matter what comes next. They will be ready to put food on the table for themselves and their families during times of famine, conflict, supply chain disruptions, and more. There is no better time to get ready for what's coming next. is here to ensure that you, and millions of other families, are prepared for the worst. My Patriot Supply are the experts in emergency preparedness. They have streamlined and perfected the path to securing your peace of mind with readiness essentials. With the from My Patriot Supply, setting up for survival becomes a matter of a single, effortless step. Even better? For a limited time, this essential food stash is yours for $50 OFF! If you're ready to start getting serious about your stockpile, this is the ideal building block. With a whole month of delicious, easy-to-prepare food on hand, you'll be ready to face power outages, evacuations, economic challenges, and more. But this is just the beginning... Once you start taking preparation seriously, you'll be ready to set up a serious stockpile that will last you for months. You'll sleep better at night knowing your family is ready to hold out for the long haul—and it all will have started with this one kit. Whether you're an experienced survivalist or just starting on the road to total readiness, this 4-Week Emergency Food Supply is your plan to fight food insecurity. It's designed to last, offering peace of mind for up to 25 years, ready whenever and wherever you need it. In emergencies, calories are crucial. You need at least 2,000 to make it through each day, and this kit delivers that and then some. With options for breakfast, lunch, dinner, and drinks, meal monotony won't be a problem. Instead, you'll find delicious, easy-to-prepare meals to get you through any crisis. Just boil water, add it to the meal mix, and let it simmer for a few minutes. The result? Flavors that defy your expectations of emergency food. Far from your typical "disaster diet," these meals are so delightful that many of our customers dig in immediately without waiting for an emergency to strike. In your kit, you can expect to enjoy comforting, morale-boosting favorites like mac and cheese, mashed potatoes, buttermilk pancakes, and more! The inevitability of another crisis is clear, the question is just "when?" That's why keeping a dependable stockpile of emergency food now is your smartest move. Just stock up and set it aside until it's needed. Yes, it really is that simple. Don't gamble with your survival. Complete this essential first step today, and rest easier knowing that, come what may, your family will have what they need during difficult times. Facing an uncertain future doesn't have to be a solo journey. My Patriot Supply has got your back, helping you get ready for whatever challenges might come your way. It doesn't matter what kind of danger or where it's coming from—they're here to get you prepared for anything. It's time to take this crucial step. Click the button below and secure a 4-Week Emergency Food Kit for $50 OFF per kit! Get one for EVERY member of your family. But don't wait! name: Colin Allred
subject: We've come a long way in a year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Today marks exactly one year since we launched this campaign to defeat Ted Cruz, and I couldn't be more thrilled with how far we've come.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84326886/471163874/789451736?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-05-03_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFjMTdlZmRjLTNjMGEtZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pBXTR8Ti4KKnoWwmIkceepiwQS_OsmZHiD0vt46fvv4=)
---
WOW, Peter!

Today marks exactly one year since we launched this campaign to defeat Ted Cruz, and I couldn't be more thrilled with how far we've come.

**How it started:** Immediately after we launched this campaign, election experts from _FiveThirtyEight_ to _Roll Call_ UPGRADED our chances of beating Ted Cruz and officially ranked Texas a "battleground."

**How it's going:** After early polls showed us 5 points down, hundreds of thousands of grassroots supporters like you chipped in to help me travel all over Texas to meet voters and spread our message. **Thanks to you, we have officially pulled EVEN with Ted Cruz in the polls.**

**What's next?** Ted Cruz is terrified of our grassroots movement because we're closer than ever to defeating him. But this race is a long way from over, and he's calling all his millionaire mega donors and special interest allies to try and squash our momentum. We can't let up for even a second.

**That's why, to celebrate the one year anniversary of our campaign, my team and I set an ambitious goal to raise $300,000 by midnight.[_Can I count on your split donation between my campaign and Fight for Progress to help us get there, Peter? Every dollar helps power our grassroots movement and gets us closer to beating Ted Cruz on Election Day._](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84326887/471163875/789451736?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-05-03_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFjMTdlZmRjLTNjMGEtZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pBXTR8Ti4KKnoWwmIkceepiwQS_OsmZHiD0vt46fvv4=)**

clean_body: Today marks exactly one year since we launched this campaign to defeat Ted Cruz, and I couldn't be more thrilled with how far we've come. | = WOW, Peter! Today marks exactly one year since we launched this campaign to defeat Ted Cruz, and I couldn't be more thrilled with how far we've come. How it started: Immediately after we launched this campaign, election experts from FiveThirtyEight to Roll Call UPGRADED our chances of beating Ted Cruz and officially ranked Texas a "battleground." How it's going: After early polls showed us 5 points down, hundreds of thousands of grassroots supporters like you chipped in to help me travel all over Texas to meet voters and spread our message. Thanks to you, we have officially pulled EVEN with Ted Cruz in the polls. What's next? Ted Cruz is terrified of our grassroots movement because we're closer than ever to defeating him. But this race is a long way from over, and he's calling all his millionaire mega donors and special interest allies to try and squash our momentum. We can't let up for even a second. That's why, to celebrate the one year anniversary of our campaign, my team and I set an ambitious goal to raise $300,000 by midnight.= | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | = | = | = | = | = I never could've made it this far without you. name: Alsobrooks HQ
subject: It's Your Weekly Team Alsobrooks Newsletter!
body:
Greetings #TeamAlsobrooks,

The polls are open! Our grassroots army is mobilized across the state,
talking to voters, knocking on their doors and getting them to the polls.

It will take all of us, working together, to win this. And right now,
while your friends and neighbors are making their decision, talk to them
about Angela and why you are supporting her for the US Senate - her record
of accomplishments and her vision for our future.

The power of many will determine who wins on May 14th:

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/17083?t=1001&akid=1563%2E52803%2EcqgSOS ]Sign up here to make calls from home with us!

[ http://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/15406?t=1002&akid=1563%2E52803%2EcqgSOS ]Sign up here to volunteer to Get Out the Vote these last two weekends!

Early voting is from Thursday May 2nd to Thursday May 9th. Election Day is
May 14th. Polls are open 7:00 AM - 8:00 PM. Make sure you go and vote!
Find voting resources at [ http://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/23365?t=1003&akid=1563%2E52803%2EcqgSOS ]angelaalsobrooks.com/vote

In case you missed it, here’s what’s been happening for the past week on
the campaign trail and beyond: What an honor to have earned the support of
former Senator Barbara Mikulski, a super bad woman and trailblazer in
Maryland and across the nation. Team Alsobrooks is going to make her and
the entire state of Maryland proud in Washington.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/23380?t=1034&amount=25&akid=1563%2E52803%2EcqgSOS ][IMG]

Baltimore came out and showed out on our All in for Angela Tour. Thank you
to Governor Wes Moore and so many others for joining us.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/23380?t=1040&amount=25&akid=1563%2E52803%2EcqgSOS ][IMG]

Baltimore is fired up! We had a fantastic time with Governor Wes Moore,
Senator Chris Van Hollen, Frm Senator Barabara Milkulski, Congressman
Kweisi Mfume, Congressman John Sarbanes, and Comptroller Brooke Lierman.
Thanks for coming out! Let’s win!

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/23380?t=1041&amount=25&akid=1563%2E52803%2EcqgSOS ][IMG]

Thanks to the 200+ Marylanders who came out to support our campaign for US
Senate in Montgomery County. We are so grateful to Senator Laphonza
Butler, Senator Chris Van Hollen, Congressman, Jamie Raskin, and
Comptroller Brooke Lierman for coming out.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/23380?t=1042&amount=25&akid=1563%2E52803%2EcqgSOS ][IMG]

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/23380?t=1043&amount=25&akid=1563%2E52803%2EcqgSOS ][IMG]

It was wonderful to be joined by our friend native Marylander, Michael
Ealy, alongside Collective PAC founder Stephanie Brown James, and Rep.
Jasmine Crockett (TX-30). Michael, Rep. Crockett, Stephanie, and the
Collective PAC know what many Marylanders do: that Angela will fight like
everything for folks to have their first shot at success by creating
opportunities in every community.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/23380?t=1044&amount=25&akid=1563%2E52803%2EcqgSOS ][IMG]

We had a great time at the Truman-Kennedy-Obama Dinner in Charles County.
It was so wonderful to see so many friends and supporters of our campaign!

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/23380?t=1045&amount=25&akid=1563%2E52803%2EcqgSOS ][IMG]

What a beautiful afternoon in Burtonsville with the Jain Society of
Greater Washington. Thanks to Dipak Thakker for inviting us.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/23380?t=1046&amount=25&akid=1563%2E52803%2EcqgSOS ][IMG]

The last stop of our All in for Angela tour was a smashing success!
Montgomery County is ready to send a fighter to Washington. Always great
to be in Gaithersburg with such a great group of passionate supporters.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/23380?t=1047&amount=25&akid=1563%2E52803%2EcqgSOS ][IMG]

It was great to be in Glenarden for Prince George’s County Young Men's
Democratic Club. Thanks so much to our friend, Betty Armwood for having
us!

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/23380?t=1035&amount=25&akid=1563%2E52803%2EcqgSOS ][IMG]

We had a fantastic time at Art of Balance Spa in Federal Hill discussing
our race with Aaron Dante and Wendy Osefo. Thank you to Nia Banks, Tisha
Edwards, and Wendy Bronfein for organizing a wonderful discussion.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/23380?t=1036&amount=25&akid=1563%2E52803%2EcqgSOS ][IMG]

A HUGE thanks to all the folks that came out to Roland Park! Thank you to
Vinne DeMarco, Molly Mitchell, Louis Perkins, Dru Schmidt-Perkins, and
City Comptroller Bill Henry for organizing such a great group! We need to
keep the Senate blue and protect abortion access. Angela is the only
candidate who can get it done.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/23380?t=1037&amount=25&akid=1563%2E52803%2EcqgSOS ][IMG]

It was great to discuss our plans to protect the environment and create
better health outcomes for Marylanders at the Caucus for African American
Leaders 3rd Annual Energy Summit and Candidate Forum. We can fight climate
change, while creating jobs and protecting the health of folks in
Maryland. That’s a promise!

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/23380?t=1038&amount=25&akid=1563%2E52803%2EcqgSOS ][IMG]

Mark your calendars — [ http://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/15406?t=1028&akid=1563%2E52803%2EcqgSOS ]we need all hands on deck these last two
weekends, May 4th & 5th, and May 11th through 14th to Get Out The Vote! We
need everyone who can come out to an office to knock on doors and make
calls. We can’t leave any vote behind, so make sure you mark your
calendars and sign up TODAY!

clean_body: Greetings #TeamAlsobrooks, The polls are open! Our grassroots army is mobilized across the state, talking to voters, knocking on their doors and getting them to the polls. It will take all of us, working together, to win this. And right now, while your friends and neighbors are making their decision, talk to them about Angela and why you are supporting her for the US Senate - her record of accomplishments and her vision for our future. The power of many will determine who wins on May 14th: [ ]Sign up here to make calls from home with us! [ ]Sign up here to volunteer to Get Out the Vote these last two weekends! Early voting is from Thursday May 2nd to Thursday May 9th. Election Day is May 14th. Polls are open 7:00 AM - 8:00 PM. Make sure you go and vote! Find voting resources at [ ]angelaalsobrooks.com/vote In case you missed it, here’s what’s been happening for the past week on the campaign trail and beyond: What an honor to have earned the support of former Senator Barbara Mikulski, a super bad woman and trailblazer in Maryland and across the nation. Team Alsobrooks is going to make her and the entire state of Maryland proud in Washington. [ ][IMG] Baltimore came out and showed out on our All in for Angela Tour. Thank you to Governor Wes Moore and so many others for joining us. [ ][IMG] Baltimore is fired up! We had a fantastic time with Governor Wes Moore, Senator Chris Van Hollen, Frm Senator Barabara Milkulski, Congressman Kweisi Mfume, Congressman John Sarbanes, and Comptroller Brooke Lierman. Thanks for coming out! Let’s win! [ ][IMG] Thanks to the 200+ Marylanders who came out to support our campaign for US Senate in Montgomery County. name: Victoria
subject: Spartz is a Fighter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Victoria Spartz for Congress
clean_body: Click image to play latest TV ad. Team Victoria, Our nation is going through some challenging times. It's not the first time and not the last time, but it is our time and the responsibility of our generation to leave a better future for our children. That is why I fight so hard. Because the American Dream must be preserved. That's why I battle the Biden Administration and hold them accountable. That's why I don’t buckle down to the establishment and fight against the special interests. It doesn’t make me popular with the insiders, but it is my promise to you and the oath I took that matters to me the most. I would be honored to have your vote on May 7 and I will never let you down! Please sign up to volunteer at the polls: Volunteer at the Polls () Warmest wishes, Victoria Spartz DONATE () ============================================================ Facebook () Website () X () Our mailing address is: Victoria Spartz for Congress PO Box 505 Noblesville, IN 46061 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can update your preferences () or ** unsubscribe from this list () . Paid for by Victoria Spartz for Congress

name: Sharice Davids (personal)
subject: I’m just writing to say thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84328758/471170579/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzVmYzI2Ni00MTBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bd3Gb5MEwy7wOcpabQTXkm3fWcJ5INlA-XQFFuqhdRg=) Hey, I hope you’re having a good weekend. I won’t take up much of your time, but I did want to take a moment just to say thanks. Supporters like you are the backbone of our campaign, and while there’s a long way to go before Election Day, I’m so grateful for all the help you’ve provided already. Whether you’ve pitched in a few hard-earned dollars, gotten the word about our campaign out on social media, or simply put up with more emails from my team and me than you would like to see in your inbox, please know that your support is something I will _never_ take for granted. Look, this will be a tough election. The stakes are high, and our opponents are determined to flip this seat. But to get here, we won _three_ hard-fought races — making me Kansas’s only Democratic representative at the federal level — by building one of the most powerful grassroots coalitions in the nation. A coalition of folks who agree that our nation has had enough chaos and extremism in Washington, and that what we really need are leaders who deliver real progress. That kind of coalition is our path to victory once again. And the incredible strength of this team fills me with hope that we’ll win this election. I couldn’t do it without you, and I so appreciate you. Thanks, and have a great rest of your day. -Sharice | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84328759/471170580/1393599324?refcode=email_050424_Thank-you&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzVmYzI2Ni00MTBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bd3Gb5MEwy7wOcpabQTXkm3fWcJ5INlA-XQFFuqhdRg=)

body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Hi Peter,
A lot of people have underestimated Kirsten and our campaign. Even the analysts at Sabato’s Crystal Ball admitted they should’ve ranked this race as a “tossup” sooner.
But they aren’t underestimating us anymore.
Our campaign has been endorsed by national organizations and inspiring public leaders like Planned Parenthood and Senator Mark Kelly, we’re part of the DCCC’s Red to Blue program, and we outraised Juan Ciscomani, Kirsten’s opponent, last quarter.
Juan Ciscomani may be a MAGA puppet, but here's the good news: Donald Trump has never won this district.
People in AZ-06 want a leader who will fight for what matters—for our kids' futures, our water supply, good-paying jobs, and reproductive rights. That leader is Kirsten.
Now that this race is a tossup, Republicans will do everything they can to protect Ciscomani’s seat. That means millions of dollars from conservative PACs will be poured into our district. Will you help us fight back by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_email?refcode=X_050424_Competitive_act]

name: Michelle Vallejo
subject: 1.7 million households are without internet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress
body:
I wrote a column in the Rio Grande Guardian this week, because a critical program that helps 1.7 million Texas households afford high-speed internet access expired this week.

If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/mAp0_dUZb0WOLyBKJJuqXw2?unsubscribedata=Ck%2Bd7zWrGHxv3QJrVSu%2BfsIKOjvKyjMyltxASi5%2Blo4smuga2kMuceIG9j3L2A6Julwa01h0tO%2BUdYlCJjDLT%2Fq1JysU86TELCmmos4g72aOUDinJy7CBXF3J%2F2hJFCkY8DafQ%2Bz3JLLPIXtgMeQRB%2F4%2BhyDG77rtF3DSU1mBpQqAwMjD4K5w5AmZA0rdtc2cGSkWbfWbof03jxoVEBcSnPIZfT%2BhLuCje%2B6n2gN%2FLeyDi9OWCn6w4GXF%2BgmKnNEFwPiPzx5%2F7%2FBMjZ1F10HIHjOnwwUJAQ%2FA7xGHhsovx9iXA%2BD%2Fn9nlHgjz0QfxBxlE8BycK435rMJLpEstvWKFOwBSrBd6GzTN6sGO8%2BEx8SGFq%2FhU9GCqp2qlDCOykk8vcjpPs3BPn757EpRAOsgbt6Ng9DPp2FiJzX6A4AROge1zLRbZFtbDnX75D%2F6MPga)

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84328973/471171383/1797446916?source=SBD_MV_EM_PT_050324_1_1_RGG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDUzMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTBmMWY0My00MjBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N5oBA78Dfj1cRIv0Rck8fj81gxp-cpuzDeq67ueHB6g=&emci=0a0f1f43-420a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=1e0f1f43-420a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=19309188) Hi, Peter. It’s Michelle Vallejo. I recently wrote a column for the Rio Grande Guardian, because a critical program that helps 1.7 million Texas households afford high-speed internet access expired this week. High-speed internet has become as essential as electricity and running water in modern life. It’s a lifeline for education, healthcare, employment, and staying connected. And guess who is a part of the influential Republican Study Committee, the Republican Caucus’ policy arm, whose budget has called for this critical program to end? My MAGA extremist opponent, Rep. De La Cruz. If she successfully continues to delay this funding – nearly one in three households in our district risk losing their monthly internet subsidy. This will leave many South Texans cut off from vital internet access. Potentially leaving them digitally isolated and unable to work, seek an education, or access healthcare. We cannot have representation in office who refuses to fight for affordable lives for working people. We must call on Rep. De La Cruz to fight for us now. [Can you sign the petition to call on Rep. De La Cruz to fight for internet access for Texans? This program is essential for the people of our district to thrive and receive the care they need in the digital age. I would not be asking if it wasn’t important, Peter.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84328976/471171393/1797446916?source=SBD_MV_EM_PT_050324_1_1_RGG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDUzMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTBmMWY0My00MjBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N5oBA78Dfj1cRIv0Rck8fj81gxp-cpuzDeq67ueHB6g=&emci=0a0f1f43-420a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=1e0f1f43-420a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=19309188) | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84328980/471171403/1797446916?source=SBD_MV_EM_PT_050324_1_1_RGG&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDUzMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTBmMWY0My00MjBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N5oBA78Dfj1cRIv0Rck8fj81gxp-cpuzDeq67ueHB6g=&emci=0a0f1f43-420a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=1e0f1f43-420a-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=19309188)

Thank you for fighting for the working people and families of TX-15.
Michelle Vallejo

clean_body: I wrote a column in the Rio Grande Guardian this week, because a critical program that helps 1.7 million Texas households afford high-speed internet access expired this week. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hi, Peter. It’s Michelle Vallejo. I recently wrote a column for the Rio Grande Guardian, because a critical program that helps 1.7 million Texas households afford high-speed internet access expired this week. High-speed internet has become as essential as electricity and running water in modern life. It’s a lifeline for education, healthcare, employment, and staying connected. And guess who is a part of the influential Republican Study Committee, the Republican Caucus’ policy arm, whose budget has called for this critical program to end? My MAGA extremist opponent, Rep. De La Cruz. If she successfully continues to delay this funding – nearly one in three households in our district risk losing their monthly internet subsidy. This will leave many South Texans cut off from vital internet access. Potentially leaving them digitally isolated and unable to work, seek an education, or access healthcare. We cannot have representation in office who refuses to fight for affordable lives for working people. We must call on Rep. De La Cruz to fight for us now. | | Thank you for fighting for the working people and families of TX-15. Michelle Vallejo | | | ---|---|--- = My name is Michelle Vallejo, and I'm running to represent TX-15 — the most competitive congressional seat in the state**. The stakes have never been higher! subject: AIPAC: "Ilhan Omar is giving Hamas a lifeline"

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17021?t=1011?refcode=email-20240504&akid=5921%2E5885482%2EoEH40t ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis — AIPAC is
targeting Ilhan Omar, Jamaal Bowman, Cori Bush, Pramila Jayapal, and other
pro-Peace progressives simply for criticizing Netanyahu’s atrocities in
Gaza and calling for Peace.

And when AIPAC targets a progressive champion like Ilhan Omar, it’s
usually with disgusting rhetoric and smear campaigns like this:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17093?t=1052&akid=5921%2E5885482%2EoEH40t ][IMG]

AIPAC will use these racist, fear-mongering tactics paired with its $100
million in anti-progressive election spending to try to unseat Ilhan and
remove her courageous voice from Congress. AIPAC’s massive right-wing
spending and gross attack ads won’t stop us from doing everything we can
to re-elect Ilhan!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17021?t=1048?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240504&akid=5921%2E5885482%2EoEH40t ]Donate now to help us fight back against AIPAC’s $100 million in
right-wing billionaire money. We’re working hard to re-elect progressive
champions like Ilhan Omar, expand the Progressive Caucus in Congress, and
pressure the Democratic Party to kick AIPAC out of Democratic primaries.

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

To compare calling for a Ceasefire to helping terrorists is so ridiculous
and dangerous. AIPAC and plenty of the lawmakers in Congress have tried to
vilify anyone trying to save the Palestinian people from more bombs and
mass starvation.

As Bernie says, once a candidate speaks out for the dignity of the
Palestinian people, they end up on AIPAC’s “hitlist.”

US Rep. Summer Lee, an outspoken Peace champion and Our
Revolution-endorsed candidate, recently defeated AIPAC’s hate and spending
to win her Democratic primary in PA-12. We know we can beat AIPAC, but it
will take a mountain of organizing and grassroots donations.

AIPAC’s goal is to remove everyone from Congress who stands up for
Palestinian human rights. Their attack ads and smear campaigns won’t deter
our efforts to defend pro-Peace progressives like Ilhan and continue
pushing for an end to U.S. support for Netanyahu’s horrific war in Gaza.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17021?t=1046?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240504&akid=5921%2E5885482%2EoEH40t ]We’re fighting AIPAC’s smear campaigns and $100 million as the largest
grassroots-funded progressive political organization in the country. Can
you donate today to make sure we have the resources we need to defend
Ilhan and expand pro-Peace progressive power in Congress?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

name: Colin Allred
subject: We've come a long way
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Hi, this is Colin Allred in Texas. I’m running against Ted Cruz for the U.S. Senate. We've come such a long way since launching this campaign one year ago. I want to share some highlights and show you how far we've come, but first, I have to ask: **[My team and I need to raise $300,000 by MIDNIGHT to keep this campaign running strong to finally defeat Ted Cruz, so I'm personally asking: Will you chip in a split donation between my campaign and Tina Smith to help us meet my campaign anniversary goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84329515/471173248/1432755884?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240504_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTlmZWM3ZC00NDBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vBtn4gq6pY3AagAWuZUUpJTwaEQItA8YASCr_UOyYdU=)** | [DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84329516/471173249/1432755884?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240504_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTlmZWM3ZC00NDBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vBtn4gq6pY3AagAWuZUUpJTwaEQItA8YASCr_UOyYdU=)
---
**I've always known that Ted Cruz is wrong for Texas – but until Jan. 6, I never could have imagined myself running against him.**
After that day, I knew without a doubt that Texans needed a Senator they can be proud of. So, after much consideration and talking it over with my wife, Aly, I announced my candidacy on May 3, 2023.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84329517/471173250/1432755884?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240504_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTlmZWM3ZC00NDBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vBtn4gq6pY3AagAWuZUUpJTwaEQItA8YASCr_UOyYdU=)
From the start, I knew I would be the underdog. But just two weeks after launching this campaign, _Roll Call_ upgraded our race from "Solid Republican" to "Battleground!"
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84329518/471173251/1432755884?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240504_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTlmZWM3ZC00NDBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vBtn4gq6pY3AagAWuZUUpJTwaEQItA8YASCr_UOyYdU=)
With supporters like you fired up to beat Ted Cruz, this team helped power our movement with hundreds of thousands of grassroots donations. That grassroots support enabled me to travel across Texas to meet voters and listen to the issues that impact the lives of Texas families.

clean_body: | Hi, this is Colin Allred in Texas. I’m running against Ted Cruz for the U.S. Senate. We've come such a long way since launching this campaign one year ago. I want to share some highlights and show you how far we've come, but first, I have to ask: = | = I've always known that Ted Cruz is wrong for Texas – but until Jan. 6, I never could have imagined myself running against him. After that day, I knew without a doubt that Texans needed a Senator they can be proud of. So, after much consideration and talking it over with my wife, Aly, I announced my candidacy on May 3, 2023. = From the start, I knew I would be the underdog. But just two weeks after launching this campaign, Roll Call upgraded our race from "Solid Republican" to "Battleground!" = With supporters like you fired up to beat Ted Cruz, this team helped power our movement with hundreds of thousands of grassroots donations. That grassroots support enabled me to travel across Texas to meet voters and listen to the issues that impact the lives of Texas families. = And it gets even better: Since we first launched our campaign, we've made huge gains in the polls. I am now TIED with Ted Cruz at 41%! = I never imagined we'd be this close at this stage in the race. In my first race back in 2018, folks didn't give me a chance – even up to Election Day. But luckily, I'm used to hard fights. I put in the work to beat the odds and defeat a 22-year incumbent. We're already better off today than we were then. But Ted Cruz and his extremist mega donors are looking at the same polls we are, and they're not going down without a fight. They're already doing everything they can to crush our momentum – which has amounted to Ted Cruz raising over $51 MILLION. That's why in order to fight back, we need to meet every single fundraising goal we set, including tonight's $300,000 goal. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Tina Smith and Colin Allred will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = I can't thank you enough for your support. It truly means the world. Let's win this thing! – Colin Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: Josh Harder
subject: Woah…
body:
This is not good.
Woah, Peter.
We just learned the Koch Brothers are spending over a million dollars to target Latino voters - and my district is at the top of their list!
**I need your help to respond by funding our Latino organizing program and getting our ads launched in both English and Spanish.**
Will you chip in now to help us raise $10,000 ASAP? name: Sara Jacobs
subject: The latest attacks from my MAGA opponent:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Friends, I really, really try not to give my MAGA opponent any more oxygen than his backwards ideas deserve. I mean, this is a guy who regularly goes on OAN and Fox News to praise Donald Trump and spout off the latest absurd and dangerous conspiracy theories the far-right is pushing.
But I do want to take a second to address a recent criticism he made of me – because the reality is, he’ll be on the ballot in November and he’ll be spending as much as he can to turn out his GOP base.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/6179797872366C46517043474856717253534458372B654C564B78554861304A7335574F6B377543312B454C67712B414F316C566C71786F554E51524A613237/editor_images/BillWells-FB.png]
“We need serious leaders” ... I can only assume what he actually means is that we need someone who isn’t a young woman – because really, it just doesn’t make sense any other way.
I’m a member of the House Armed Services Committee and House Foreign Affairs Committee, where I’m the Ranking Member of the Subcommittee on Africa.
I’m a member of the Bipartisan Task Force on Artificial Intelligence. I’m Vice Chair of the Congressional Equality Caucus, Founding Co-Chair of the Protection of Civilians in Conflict Caucus, and Co-Chair of the Congressional Ghana Caucus.
Oh, and I’m the youngest member of our Democratic House leadership, too.
My background before serving in Congress includes policy work at the United Nations, UNICEF, and the State Department. And I founded two non-profits that are still doing impactful work for our community and the world.
But of course, to some people, you can’t be a young woman – especially one with interests and hobbies – and also be a serious leader! I call BS.
Look – I would love to brush this off and fully ignore every single word that comes out of my opponent’s mouth.
But unfortunately, he’s shown that he can raise enough money from fellow GOP extremists to run a serious campaign against me, and he’s going to spend every penny he can trying to flip our district red.
The rise of candidates like my opponent is directly connected to Donald Trump and his brand of MAGA politics that he’s made popular for so many people on the right – and the fact is, it’s not enough to eke out narrow victories when we’re dealing with this kind of extremism.
We need to deliver resounding Democratic victories this November – in my race and in races all across the country – and make a clear statement that this is not who we are .
To do that, Democrats have to boost our fundraising numbers. Will you help out by making a donation of $25, $50, or even $100 to my re-election campaign today? Your contribution will go directly towards defeating my MAGA opponent. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Thanks so much. I really appreciate your support!
-Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
If you can’t give much right now, I want you to know that even $1 or $5 makes a difference. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em] And if you can’t give at all, I understand. I appreciate you taking the time to read these emails and stay connected with my campaign – regardless of whether or not you’re able to chip in financially. Thank you!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
Sara Jacobs for Congress
PO Box 120085
San Diego, CA 92112
United States
www.facebook.com/SaraJacobsCA/ [www.facebook.com/SaraJacobsCA/] twitter.com/sarajacobsca [twitter.com/sarajacobsca] www.instagram.com/sarajacobsca/ [www.instagram.com/sarajacobsca/]
CONTRIBUTE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
We believe these emails are a critical way for Sara to stay in touch with supporters and constituents. If you'd like to receive less email from us, please click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/1ZAJdGZqA02o6mVNL1jNkQ2] and we'll adjust your preferences. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/hyl6jC1aX0el_nwy_DShOA2?unsubscribedata=jMYwi%2Bz5c1osVNxgij1Oes8cW%2BhLs9Ky2TWrQ0MQJN8lp52ukeHiKANNZ94mEg5CRf79aeFpykZf8GjQAqjGLX95g7JR%2FY5d1uwte9NfydRYkdtXI3cdMU5%2F1CDGHqPG2UfNNiuKbnmbI8I3658%2FvtxI3DY927AFwDqyqtnVUOBSU1w3%2B0JcQ6dE3Re1ujtZ13mkVxG1546tUmqDH3d%2FYUd09oDxzRyyvevl5SPdlKSpdA0Q1DCcajvaAsgb2TSIx3L9YXrLarizNvVve86sddX7BKoSbXl5wA0EmcJx8LVr3Wu96P2CbNfzJoYw3NnXjUFAsJZBw0ak6selhDONf0fE1fd%2B8gykGwGvcG%2Fln6VTtC%2B5XwR%2FU9htQWnn%2FOas3etvRwwFU6pP4DsTSdXGk9VGSNJ98PK207DSdLxop1dY3Je6k9TeZibNuR01czdx .

**1.** Senate Dems are the nation's last defense from a federal ban on abortion from the GOP, but we're also defending a one-seat majority. So we've got to jump on any chance we get to flip a Republican-held seat blue.
**2**. Extremist Sen. Rick Scott, as wealthy as he is unpopular, will be on Florida ballots this fall — _and so will a widely-supported referendum to enshrine reproductive rights in the Sunshine State's constitution._
**3.** **Florida will also have a Democrat like Debbie Mucarsel-Powell on the ballot, too.** If voters show up to save abortion and elect her in the process, Florida could be what saves our Senate majority, _and_ a federal guarantee of reproductive rights.
So I'm __ doing everything in my power to help Debbie defeat Rick Scott and the nasty attack ads his massive personal fortune can buy — **but I just got word from DMP HQ that they’re falling 49% behind on their crucial $60,000 daily goal.**
In other words, everything in my power still won't be enough. She needs a groundswell of support from grassroots Democrats like you, too.

name: Kevin Numerick
subject: Friends We need to catch up.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/Untitled%20design.png]
Dr. Bob has tirelessly campaigned, connecting with communities across our district through town halls to meet-and-greets, hosting over 400 in-person events over the last three years. People like you are fueling this campaign and making it all possible. So firstly, thank you. This has significantly positioned us to challenge Jack Bergman this November. However, to clinch victory and bring the change our district desperately needs, we must elevate our efforts to the next level to finish the job in 2024.
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately.
$1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/altext?express_lane=true&amount=1&refcode=express_lane_1]
$10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/altext?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
$25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/altext?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
$100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/altext?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/altext]
Friends,
Because of you, we can knock on doors in the most rural areas to talk with voters and give a voice to those who feel unheard. We can campaign in every corner of a 25,000 square mile district. We were able to get nominating petition signatures in all 36 counties to get on the ballot. So if you ever question if your contribution makes a difference, they absolutely do!
Click here to donate and help us reach our goals [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1]
We understand the importance of showing up and ensuring every voice is heard in the democratic process. In a district this size, it's easier said than done. Dr. Bob Lorinser’s dedication as a family physician, educator, and diplomat has resonated widely, earning him unprecedented support.
But we can’t stop now. We're on the brink of turning the tide in our favor, and your continued support is crucial. To effectively compete against an entrenched MAGA incumbent and expand our outreach, we need to bolster our campaign's resources now more than ever.
Your contribution today will directly fund strategic initiatives, including intensified advertising, expanded grassroots organizing, and enhanced digital campaigns. Each dollar brings us closer to a Congress representing our values and addressing our needs. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1]
Let's take advantage of this chance to make history. Support Dr. Bob Lorinser today, and let’s ensure our district has the representation it truly deserves.
Thank you for your unwavering commitment and support.
-Kevin Numerick
Bob Lorinser for Congress
Campaign Manager
knumerick@votedrbob.com
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01
P.S. Every bit helps – whether it’s a donation, spreading the word, or volunteering your time. Join us in this crucial fight! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/altext]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]
Or, send a check to
Friends of Dr. Bob
PO Box 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DR. BOB

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=c696ad6f5b8b42f4a0f23e2cf7873585&_t=RVS0TNHFr_O621PH68mdOQEn2V9VorOiYnMURSRKZrKnw_n95cOfdO2PU5A2NiS2fSU1Gogn3kqZ3akWf-TrY1LzedvSPklBXjhVxhCVoio%3D)_
---
---
| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c696ad6f5b8b42f4a0f23e2cf7873585&_e=Y46UaetF5lOjRj_niZBX4zqZK4ZsHWnhRoWMyl-H9votXGM4U4uNFOayQ-uGYkilYiTWS04yyWbqHVeJ7OraPsI6MIwjjPUaMCvUoqM2F3jKxegcBCty7xjzftnLdq4oASHyAwmVpWufnVMiLRH5qR6x-r73H3zQK6xeMMcHS68DBuvJQxnyP7xciQ_tq0EpGTPIt_1g7sXbhCoU7GjMcSXAcVhIH-b5VbjifIrRqMQ4eqHwZRjFNcDKi1UvYUxR8mAGaSSWUL_553PeZheFqkT4y0l48p5y2t-QUvND9LjXvIxZsXNHnMrWO3p824noamxjcIAMUoPEQcAUEqibXrWT3HrgBUdIbMnedlfPPTxEU7unYFrmOLsH4aEG7fnmHifxehd66LKFOuRZnOO8l-bBhn8rLvuib8ldDwj60q0%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values.

After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty_?**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c696ad6f5b8b42f4a0f23e2cf7873585&_e=Y46UaetF5lOjRj_niZBX4zqZK4ZsHWnhRoWMyl-H9votXGM4U4uNFOayQ-uGYkilYiTWS04yyWbqHVeJ7OraPsI6MIwjjPUaMCvUoqM2F3jKxegcBCty7xjzftnLdq4oASHyAwmVpWufnVMiLRH5qR6x-r73H3zQK6xeMMcHS68DBuvJQxnyP7xciQ_tq0EpGTPIt_1g7sXbhCoU7GjMcSXAcVhIH-b5VbjifIrRqMQ4eqHwZRjFNcDKi1UvYUxR8mAGaSSWUL_553PeZheFqsmsDWfq3QWs7OO1uG3AyLf6jimNCxUb4A-c3vpgKE4bYf48lpD3PRfjMiFG1q1KFbmc6vD3WIXbMhJXoNfrzoTUHBB_WhR7xH5p7n9QMpTgl_cDejXfeptWI5tknGNSH4h7-NVc0yWaaY8JThlt4_0%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values.**

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values,**are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=c696ad6f5b8b42f4a0f23e2cf7873585&_e=Y46UaetF5lOjRj_niZBX4zqZK4ZsHWnhRoWMyl-H9votXGM4U4uNFOayQ-uGYkilYiTWS04yyWbqHVeJ7OraPsI6MIwjjPUaMCvUoqM2F3jKxegcBCty7xjzftnLdq4oASHyAwmVpWufnVMiLRH5qR6x-r73H3zQK6xeMMcHS68DBuvJQxnyP7xciQ_tq0EpGTPIt_1g7sXbhCoU7GjMcSXAcVhIH-b5VbjifIrRqMQ4eqHwZRjFNcDKi1UvYUxR8mAGaSSWUL_553PeZheFqtJNguZYEau-0fbEsjlETIqLzHx2kWZEreMRHoaUSQhaxONND5Mx2aVcS6ZD4bufCTbQZ67aaMmyqXDigPntvN2j-5Oey5S-hNsuM-tg3Jk8Ms-bZE2mHBu-5RfwUDUaciXXMSWOwf1U_oJ0ZwYKaRw%3D)

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=c696ad6f5b8b42f4a0f23e2cf7873585&_t=RVS0TNHFr_O621PH68mdOQEn2V9VorOiYnMURSRKZrKnw_n95cOfdO2PU5A2NiS2fSU1Gogn3kqZ3akWf-TrY1LzedvSPklBXjhVxhCVoio%3D).

name: Jedi John
subject: The Fourth is with you, Young Skywalker.

body:
Dear Friends and Supporters, Today is May 4th which means it’s STAR WARS DAY! As we celebrate the decades-spanning, epic saga of rebellion, hope, and the Force, I couldn't resist scratching my nerd itch and reaching out to you with some galactic fun.
__ | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=472db3da8b64495da4f9fbb95d4f4a1c&_e=lpqhz7_6fKh8ENrpMvOjlg7upthJRZ6tIc1GEYv0e64mPoaQmORScykAZHYXsr22WbX9ZOij22jFE7sgZyaLUVtCwTA3T2q-l7yA2GajnyPd_O4K_1heMgFORm0fT4zehmjWt9aY-TWToI69wDjAbkCS_A1Oq60NVEy4u9WOdvVOqLhGB3R5u9YsuHOfFQwS4MfQ0EVQYcFDWCVHqHZbkglwhhFrMMkOcty-2NJGGyH_zoN0aMIiYDB9lZfWua7iE90yNICZAJcRF03lfMaFLIf4zLfGzIaLazqzQy4X2rIKP7xlSiRClf8nQE34kt5wCL4DgjkoYK-jX1s-ZvcILYVISGqxQgGBWRWTtgvEKj4BwnuYythCJsHNeMC1_FGNVcx2-tKDPMtfpP4Cozkwig%3D%3D) [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=472db3da8b64495da4f9fbb95d4f4a1c&_e=lpqhz7_6fKh8ENrpMvOjlg7upthJRZ6tIc1GEYv0e64mPoaQmORScykAZHYXsr22WbX9ZOij22jFE7sgZyaLUVtCwTA3T2q-l7yA2GajnyPd_O4K_1heMgFORm0fT4zehmjWt9aY-TWToI69wDjAbkCS_A1Oq60NVEy4u9WOdvVOqLhGB3R5u9YsuHOfFQwS4MfQ0EVQYcFDWCVHqHZbkglwhhFrMMkOcty-2NJGGyH_zoN0aMIiYDB9lZfWua7i0d_iz8D2vqKF_0Oo8ts3F6jcSFV-SS0Gf7Rc_S5ycEQa9oBsycjnIfr5vVmW70sEU4kW0UN84aCmzonx7pRibZWag1_9HQ83vyNtyu0VPQco7J5rgC11RRiOjd999cgcFZ-Mn0vtXAtxXmVJ4UNE5g%3D%3D) Dear Friends and Supporters, Today is May 4th which means it’s STAR WARS DAY! As we celebrate the decades-spanning, epic saga of rebellion, hope, and the Force, I couldn't resist scratching my nerd itch and reaching out to you with some galactic fun. Yes, I know there is low-hanging fruit in this race to call Lauren Boebert Darth Boebert or something – but honestly, that’s giving her too much credit. Sith Lords are powerful and strong and **Boebert is neither of those,** as evidenced by the fact that she ran away from her district when she got scared she might lose. **What kind of Sith Lord would do that???** But we do need to defeat her in November all the same. [**So I’m asking if you can chip in some credits to my campaign to help us win this race.**](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=472db3da8b64495da4f9fbb95d4f4a1c&_e=lpqhz7_6fKh8ENrpMvOjlg7upthJRZ6tIc1GEYv0e64mPoaQmORScykAZHYXsr22WbX9ZOij22jFE7sgZyaLUVtCwTA3T2q-l7yA2GajnyPd_O4K_1heMgFORm0fT4zehmjWt9aY-TWToI69wDjAbkCS_A1Oq60NVEy4u9WOdvVOqLhGB3R5u9YsuHOfFQwS4MfQ0EVQYcFDWCVHqHZbkglwhhFrMMkOcty-2NJGGyH_zoN0aMIiYDB9lZfWua7inV3L9eKstXKix-XSScZxzV5ux2tQ2xw3dGKxeYunTAkXTRGZ4hCMnPmR4kpp_Q1J26V7LfmshftwcRb5A4s6Ai8y0EXm-9fA0ptlwg4mvxxmYZ--uYq9KbUKUNix_ll9rZUDtRp5swOdqk4R9iJICg%3D%3D) I believe in fighting for the hardworking families of our district, ensuring access to affordable healthcare, protecting our environment (we want Earth to look more like Endor than Tattooine right?), and creating opportunities for all Coloradans to thrive well into the future. But I can't do it alone. Your support is crucial to our campaign's success. [**So please, jump to lightspeed and rush a donation to my campaign on this very special day.**](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=472db3da8b64495da4f9fbb95d4f4a1c&_e=lpqhz7_6fKh8ENrpMvOjlg7upthJRZ6tIc1GEYv0e64mPoaQmORScykAZHYXsr22WbX9ZOij22jFE7sgZyaLUVtCwTA3T2q-l7yA2GajnyPd_O4K_1heMgFORm0fT4zehmjWt9aY-TWToI69wDjAbkCS_A1Oq60NVEy4u9WOdvVOqLhGB3R5u9YsuHOfFQwS4MfQ0EVQYcFDWCVHqHZbkglwhhFrMMkOcty-2NJGGyH_zoN0aMIiYDB9lZfWua7ibGYvmIWyENCwpuU2o61PdKufEiQYz-IbQBkrC9d2ZwPpL43oyfigi29Lgnt7xe8QXWxftAcqk9O7ckEuRlDZQYyK-9gSfA6icFvOLJNEb4tv9cLDkwg9NjCuGWLgK81zd_sEUJwYRbydR8W_4ECAEQ%3D%3D) May the Fourth be with you! Best,
John I'm John Padora, a Democrat running for Congress in CD-04. Lauren Boebert recently jumped into my district in a desperate attempt to stay in DC. My campaign is powered by grassroots donations - donate anything you can monthly to keep Boebert OUT of this seat. Honored and grateful

|

Friend,

I am honored and grateful to have the complete and total endorsement of President Trump. [ ](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a17bd1b183764095bb0c41913712e511&_e=Bqj0XXY5DUxf2y9stAbJY2OCsj5oSJajOai76y7Tl7Zl1PUb0csUkjONFS1wqWxvJoHfUmPPYftgnNk-p5BxrMDOGsvtkQul9J3ISwhlt34BkTZWIA_95vyy8Y2NTEH9nLPqh9uoI049b86YCD3vjCJyQ4NmEIz8XW2QonS6M6TNKhKbOiyCtDxLtgEyWpN6JG6ShHoXmMJM7Rj4pSvAnF25bLjo4AFV7W0572bbYzYjL19fh6rw6GqyMO3tg6pB28rYaGoOFIzUOgNhs3xhFgXbrm6gx4sYOmlA8MXrJx8QHwcUQnLdf54gxuULHyAseeqYY-JwrdokEI7fNGsPNkKzACeJft9Vq4ke26VccAy1aW0Br6kqkkKou9d6RCG45onIiiEdmr60oNPS6AXfMg%3D%3D)
We have officially secured our spot on the Primary ballot, and have to ride the momentum to win. President Trump needs MAGA reinforcements in the US Senate and that is what I hope to bring.

**_I am fighting to defeat the establishment and drain the swamp. I jumped into this race to defeat the RINO Mitt Romney. We need leadership in the US Senate that will put America First and support Trump 's agenda.

As your next US Senator, I promise to Create Jobs, Stop Inflation, Grow the Economy, and Secure the Border. With a MAGA Senate majority, we will Unleash American Energy, Support our Military/Vets, and Protect our always-under-siege Second Amendment. _**

**Again, thank you, President Trump, for the endorsement. I look forward to winning in November and working alongside you to Make America Great AGAIN.**

clean_body: Honored and grateful | Friend, I am honored and grateful to have the complete and total endorsement of President Trump. We have officially secured our spot on the Primary ballot, and have to ride the momentum to win. President Trump needs MAGA reinforcements in the US Senate and that is what I hope to bring. I am fighting to defeat the establishment and drain the swamp. I jumped into this race to defeat the RINO Mitt Romney. We need leadership in the US Senate that will put America First and support Trump 's agenda. As your next US Senator, I promise to Create Jobs, Stop Inflation, Grow the Economy, and Secure the Border. With a MAGA Senate majority, we will Unleash American Energy, Support our Military/Vets, and Protect our always-under-siege Second Amendment. Again, thank you, President Trump, for the endorsement. I look forward to winning in November and working alongside you to Make America Great AGAIN. | Let's do this. Tennessee Taking Lead In Protecting Civil Rights And Free
Enterprise—And Stopping Political Debanking

Last week, Tennessee Gov. Bill Lee (R.) signed into law a
first-of-its-kind ban on politicized debanking. Sponsored by Rep.
Jason Zachary (R.) and Senate Majority Leader Jack Johnson (R.), HB
2100 will prohibit the nation’s largest banks from discriminating

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Star Wars Day!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
As we celebrate May the Fourth, I'm reminded of the epic battles fought in galaxies far, far away. But here in Virginia, we're facing our own battles against divisive rhetoric, threats to our democracy, and political turmoil.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84332248/471183065/-735451230?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-05-04_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGNiZDFiZmYtNGQwYS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Rr7d6z9babT-4b_2PHPaKJCkacX-cbzY3lsq4yOQrh8=)
---
| May the Fourth be with you, Peter!

As we celebrate May the Fourth, I'm reminded of the epic battles fought in galaxies far, far away. But here in Virginia, we're facing our own battles against divisive rhetoric, threats to our democracy, and political turmoil.

Much like the Rebel Alliance fought against the Empire, we're fighting against the forces of division and dysfunction in our capital. I find their lack of faith in our Virginia neighbors disturbing. Extreme voices in our Commonwealth are threatening to move us backward with attacks on voting rights, reproductive rights, and our public schools. But defeating divisive rhetoric won't be easy. It will take dedication, determination, and resources to make sure we can bring people together to solve the real issues facing our Commonwealth — like lowering costs for families, strengthening our schools, and protecting our fundamental freedoms.

Throughout my time in Congress and now as I campaign for Governor of Virginia, I've always been a champion for bringing people together to get things done. But national Republicans are working overtime already to defeat me, and the odds are great. But never tell us the odds!

clean_body: As we celebrate May the Fourth, I'm reminded of the epic battles fought in galaxies far, far away. But here in Virginia, we're facing our own battles against divisive rhetoric, threats to our democracy, and political turmoil. | = | May the Fourth be with you, Peter! As we celebrate May the Fourth, I'm reminded of the epic battles fought in galaxies far, far away. But here in Virginia, we're facing our own battles against divisive rhetoric, threats to our democracy, and political turmoil. Much like the Rebel Alliance fought against the Empire, we're fighting against the forces of division and dysfunction in our capital. I find their lack of faith in our Virginia neighbors disturbing. Extreme voices in our Commonwealth are threatening to move us backward with attacks on voting rights, reproductive rights, and our public schools. But defeating divisive rhetoric won't be easy. It will take dedication, determination, and resources to make sure we can bring people together to solve the real issues facing our Commonwealth — like lowering costs for families, strengthening our schools, and protecting our fundamental freedoms. Throughout my time in Congress and now as I campaign for Governor of Virginia, I've always been a champion for bringing people together to get things done. But national Republicans are working overtime already to defeat me, and the odds are great. But never tell us the odds! = That's why I'm reaching out to you today. Your contribution to our campaign will help us in our quest to defeat division and build a Virginia that creates opportunity and a new hope for everyone. | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Abigail Spanberger * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

## The Cross + The Crescent
---
Tomorrow at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10143370.4598.1.8be4720f11ca8a33aacfd465394c37eb), I am going to pause our WKND series over the [Book of Acts](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10143370.4599.1.de5ad6a91a49674ef943233e702f7809). I sense led to address the _chaos happening in America_ and the **GREAT** deception spreading like cancer throughout our college campuses. There is a battle right now between the **Cross** \+ the **Crescent**. This battle has been raging for nearly 1400 years and it is **THE** battle of the future. I will be addressing **Islam** and what the response of a Christian should be right now. **Join me for a Word in Season.** **Tulsa** | 10am | 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK **OKC** | 6pm | 3100 N Meridian OKC, OK **Upcoming Events At Sheridan:** -Mon, May 20 @6:30pm - **General Michael Flynn**

-Fri, June 28 @6:30pm - **Tim Tebow**

-Fri, July 26 @6:30pm - **Riley Gaines**

-Thur, Oct 24 @6:30pm - **Pete Hegseth** RSVP at:[ https://www.sheridan.church/events](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10143370.4600.1.b5bb5ee1e49945bf8aebedd06ee53e14) Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ Partner w/Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10143370.4601.1.90e7313d3b5c5b552d04c30895905fb6)
---
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10143370.4602.1.2cb053f37b51701457e8a27af03a3dc4)
---
I am super excited to share with you the release of a _new project_ I have been working on. 2 years ago, I did a _32 part series_ over the **Book of Revelation**. Since then, the Lord has shown me so much about **Revelation** that I did not know when I first taught the series and a TON has changed in our world since then. _Therefore_ , I sensed led to redo the series over the **Book of Revelation** with the new insights. This new teaching series will take each chapter of **Revelation** and break it down _verse-by-verse_. _"Blessed is the one who reads aloud the words of this prophecy, and blessed are those who hear it and take to heart what is written in it, because the time is near"_ **\- Revelation1:3** I know this teaching will bless you. I have also included the teaching notes for you to follow along. Watch Revelation 1 here: [https://youtu.be/VfS_4Aii2hE](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10143370.4603.1.4545b36477eb0ff068e94b31faa06ff5)
---
| | [ Watch: Revelation 1 | Verse-By-Verse ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10143370.4604.1.5b4be834c1b5976577ec4f61db3d4ebd)
---
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10143370.4605.1.aa362987edbdd917a3011cfa698f5584)
---
One of my goals at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10143370.4606.1.d39251edad1daa002de0e150b4994dec) is to bring in speakers that are addressing issues we face in our nation. We have been blessed to host: [Lara Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10143370.4607.1.e3b46a331e58d74feb8439d5ee282587), **Perry Stone** , [Rabbi Jonathan Cahn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10143370.4608.1.3d34e59a1e52170fe9f911e4e9e793ef), **Rodney Howard-Browne** , [Darry Strawberry](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10143370.4609.1.5733225ff6ecbbca7fe7a841b47110ed), [Mayor Rudy Giuliani](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10143370.4610.1.2774cd3a7b13e9487a700f70363b6cea), [Roger Stone](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10143370.4611.1.6c7254cd860cb015595ddf3ccc2ee7a5), **David Barton** and others in the past. I am excited to announce that [Riley Gaines](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10143370.4612.1.4f58d438190ad15cd84c087c32835d35) will be joining us on Friday, July 26 to address one of the most crucial battles we have right now that centers upon _gender_. Other Upcoming Speakers: -**General Michael Flynn** : Monday, May 20
-**Tim Tebow** : Friday, June 28 RSVP - [www.sheridan.church/events](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10143370.4613.1.dd23c4fece93b020b1a815c134a84bf8) Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10143370.4614.1.0ba0b3c0edfe5e93b492173a2660ff7d), GAB, [Facebook](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10143370.4615.1.c8b31357ea3cfba3a06505ba737cfa99), [Instagram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10143370.4616.1.b5bab1c953a362b3d6ca430221779516), [Twitter](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10143370.4617.1.d203a26568b9cdf59e348a974d7bb52b), [Telegram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10143370.4618.1.50a1ac4a14f58b0a9edf08cc1c2a064c), GETTR & [YouTube](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10143370.4619.1.71ab05d397bd6762a008c4111d1070a8)). ## General Flynn Wants To Meet YOU!
---
America's General, [Michael Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10143370.4623.1.f563de31311222e73d6792abb1f63c4e), is doing a **Nation-Wide Tour** for his new movie! [General Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10143370.4624.1.2e82e10e0295877c8f836cb1cffda1cd) wants to invite you to join him in a city that is close to you. At the end of each showing, there will be a live Q&A w/[General Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10143370.4625.1.6cbef31f4857bf2b079af175babb9c11). View the locations of the [Flynn Tour](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10143370.4626.1.f893397d9c8268c1fdd19aab49d69e18): [www.flynnmovie.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10143370.4627.1.b1e7f115bc7b1202b8896c19fd225f6e) General Flynn will be coming to [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10143370.4628.1.2e71112252a5155a6c1029aed4bc61c2) Tulsa for the premier of the [NEW Flynn Movie](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10143370.4629.1.c4e2dfa0863f143dfa77ac3580076434)! **Date** : Monday, May 20, 2024
**Meet & Greet**: 5:00pm
**Show Time** : 6:30pm
**Location** : 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK **Ticket Link** : [https://www.flynnmovie.com/ref/Tulsa/](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10143370.4630.1.a83b6b7100c3f2edcdf25d0bbd9b1ab1) Follow the [Link](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10143370.4631.1.e43e68555dec38c14a8cb5c3ac7ea8fc) above, click "Get Tickets" and select the Tulsa Show Time. There will be a **LIVE Q &A** with [General Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10143370.4632.1.4aa26d96c8d53e266ecf6d2d3aa0ba99) after the movie. If you live outside the Tulsa area, there are many other cities that [General Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10143370.4633.1.5a223c0bea71f7a4b609e67015a8ac4e) is visiting that you can view here: [www.flynnmovie.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10143370.4634.1.d30e8cbaccdb20ba877ca70b338a3b06)
---

name: Jill Stein
subject: It’s been 54 years, and we’reliving this nightmare all over again.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024
body:
| | | [ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kent_state&n=1)
---
Dear Peter,

I remember May 4th, 1970.

I was a student at Harvard, and the news that American troops had shot and killed four students hit our campus like an earthquake.

In an instant, our fundamental sense of safety was erased and everything we thought we knew about what it meant to be an American was thrown into question.

I recognize that same unsettled feeling in the faces of the students I’ve met at the encampments I have visited – particularly at Washington University in St. Louis, where my team and I were violently arrested alongside the students.

When you look at these two pictures, I have to ask – what exactly has changed?
---
[ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kent_state&n=2)
---
A few things HAVE changed. American police forces have become hyper-militarized. Police today have more techniques and more advanced technology at their disposal to wound, maim, and kill Americans with impunity. And in the digital age of warrantless wiretapping and mass surveillance, college students today are risking potentially life-ruining consequences just to follow their moral conscience.

**What hasn’t changed are the two major political parties who encourage and even facilitate this police violence in order to protect their power and the power of their donors.

[The young people standing up for Gaza today deserve a president who hears them and stands with them. Ours is the only anti-genocide, pro-peace, pro-planet, pro-worker campaign slated to be on the ballot across the country this November. We need your help today to ensure that we ARE on that ballot in every state.](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kent_state&n=3)**
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kent_state&n=4 "DONATE NOW") [DONATE NOW](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kent_state&n=4)
---
[ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kent_state&n=5)
---
54 years later, we are days if not hours away from a completely predictable, completely avoidable repeat of the Kent State Massacre.

While I pray it never happens, I know that we won’t have peace or justice until we wrestle power from the parties that brought us back to this brink.

In solidarity and gratitude,

Jill
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kent_state&n=6 "Support Jill Today!") [Support Jill Today!](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kent_state&n=6)
---
* * *

name: Kate Roberts, Powered By People
subject: This means so much
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
I want to share a note that we just got one of our volunteers.
#
Hi,
I want to share an email that the Powered by People team just got from one of our volunteers. This is the kind of stuff that gets us through the day:
At just 18 years old, Tez is out there registering voters and laying the groundwork for big, important electoral victories in 2024 and beyond.
Thanks to the generous donations of grassroots supporters like you, we’ve been able to train thousands of volunteers like Tez to help change our state for generations to come.
[**Will you chip in $3 or whatever you can today to help us register more voters and make sure our volunteers have all the support they need to carry out this work?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240504.d5qtN3&refcode=ema20240504-239573&t=1&akid=239573%2E444211%2EJHO11R)

Thank you for making this work possible.
Kate Roberts

| Happy Star Wars Day!
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=6387%2E5257348%2EcGbtMA)
Derek,
It’s May the Fourth — Star Wars Day. And we at Team Schiff are _big, big_ fans (you can imagine the excitement when Mark Hamill endorsed Adam).
These days, there are far too many comparisons one could make between the evils of the galaxy far away and _Donald Trump._
Donald Trump is commanding Republicans’ loyalty. Through fear. Through anger. Through hate. Through suffering. All of this proves that MAGA extremism retains its hold on the collective psyche of the far right.
Remember when Darth Vader Force-choked the Imperial officer who dared question “his sorcerous ways?” As Trump campaigns for president for the third time, he is growing stronger by the day — and silencing all dissent within his party. **_Remember, he threatened to support primary challengers to any Republican that voted *against* censuring Adam._**
His consolidation of power means that we must oppose him with everything we’ve got. Our Democracy’s fiercest defender needs our help.
**_That’s Adam. The Force is strong in this one._**
The Force is all around us. It’s you. It’s us. It binds this grassroots team together.
Trump’s use of brute Force, and Mitch McConnell’s manipulation of the levers of the Senate a la Palpatine, will require a countervailing Force.
Adam has spent years defending our democracy — and many of Trump’s biggest enablers remain in the Senate. That’s why we need to help Adam on his mission. This is where we must take our fight.
**[Will you help Adam harness the power of the Force for good and send him to the Senate by contributing $10 to our campaign?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2024_abs_em.HG8rlH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240504_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=4&akid=6387%2E5257348%2EcGbtMA)**
