clean_body: | Happy Star Wars Day! Derek, It’s May the Fourth — Star Wars Day. And we at Team Schiff are big, big fans (you can imagine the excitement when Mark Hamill endorsed Adam). These days, there are far too many comparisons one could make between the evils of the galaxy far away and Donald Trump. Donald Trump is commanding Republicans’ loyalty. Through fear. Through anger. Through hate. Through suffering. All of this proves that MAGA extremism retains its hold on the collective psyche of the far right. Remember when Darth Vader Force-choked the Imperial officer who dared question “his sorcerous ways?” As Trump campaigns for president for the third time, he is growing stronger by the day — and silencing all dissent within his party. Remember, he threatened to support primary challengers to any Republican that voted against censuring Adam. His consolidation of power means that we must oppose him with everything we’ve got. Our Democracy’s fiercest defender needs our help. That’s Adam. The Force is strong in this one. The Force is all around us. It’s you. It’s us. It binds this grassroots team together. Trump’s use of brute Force, and Mitch McConnell’s manipulation of the levers of the Senate a la Palpatine, will require a countervailing Force. Adam has spent years defending our democracy — and many of Trump’s biggest enablers remain in the Senate. That’s why we need to help Adam on his mission. This is where we must take our fight. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | Thanks, and May the Fourth be with you. Always. — Team Schiff | | 135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502 | mailto:contact@adamschiff.com | PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE Sign up to receive or . Text JOIN to 724433. Hi friend,
Happy Star Wars Day!
I have loved the original Star Wars movies since I was young – the power of hope in overcoming fascism never fails to inspire.
We’re not living through an intergalactic war, but we are living through a time of increasing attacks against democracy.
We can’t stand by while this happens.
We must build an economy that works for everyone, not just those at the top. We must protect the fundamental reproductive rights of women. We must build a democracy without the influence of gerrymandering, partisanship, and voter suppression.
As Han Solo famously says, “Never tell me the odds!” We continue the fight no matter what.
You can help my campaign defend democracy by chipping in now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_050424_StarWars_act]
May the force be with you always,
Michael

Hey,

Team,

**Hi, I’m Mark Guethle, the President of the Illinois Democratic County Chairs’ Association (IDCCA), and Chair of the Kane County Democratic Party.**

**[I have an important message, and in a moment, I’m going to ask you to split a donation between the Democratic Party of Illinois and the IDCCA, the largest and most active grassroots Democratic partner in Illinois focused on being a resource for Democratic County Parties.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84332770/471184973/-589945333?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_040524_FR_DPI-Split&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTI4OWJiZWQtNTAwYS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gd2UDdhK3osONgB8OnxcZkhStprKIO-DE4gd5ncTWXw=) But first, I hope you’ll take the time to hear me out:**

Across our state, Democrats are fighting to make real change happen at the local and county level. In my time at IDCCA, Illinois has become a leader in reproductive freedom, fiscal growth, and in uplifting and protecting union workers and working families. Illinois Democrats have fought for transformative progress – passing legislation to defend abortion access, protect our democracy, and make our communities safer.

Meanwhile, in GOP-controlled states, extremists are abusing their power to chip away at our most basic rights and freedoms through dangerous abortion bans, voter suppression bills, and anti-LGBTQ+ legislation.

**The contrast is clear – Democrats are working to better the lives of working families, while Republicans are hell-bent on controlling them.**

Republicans are sending us down a dangerous path that puts our democracy at risk. But right now, we have a chance to halt this downward trajectory – to repair the damage that right-wing extremists are doing to our democratic institutions and secure a more progressive future by building our Democratic power at the county and local level.

[**From organizing communities to building electoral infrastructure, our County Democratic Parties are critical to preserving our democracy. Will you split a donation right now between IDCCA and DPI to help elect Democrats at the local and county level this fall? Anything you can spare is meaningful in this fight. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84332773/471184975/-253050464?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_040524_FR_DPI-Split&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTI4OWJiZWQtNTAwYS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gd2UDdhK3osONgB8OnxcZkhStprKIO-DE4gd5ncTWXw=)

clean_body: = Team, Hi, I’m Mark Guethle, the President of the Illinois Democratic County Chairs’ Association (IDCCA), and Chair of the Kane County Democratic Party. = But first, I hope you’ll take the time to hear me out: Across our state, Democrats are fighting to make real change happen at the local and county level. In my time at IDCCA, Illinois has become a leader in reproductive freedom, fiscal growth, and in uplifting and protecting union workers and working families. Illinois Democrats have fought for transformative progress – passing legislation to defend abortion access, protect our democracy, and make our communities safer. Meanwhile, in GOP-controlled states, extremists are abusing their power to chip away at our most basic rights and freedoms through dangerous abortion bans, voter suppression bills, and anti-LGBTQ+ legislation. The contrast is clear – Democrats are working to better the lives of working families, while Republicans are hell-bent on controlling them. Republicans are sending us down a dangerous path that puts our democracy at risk. But right now, we have a chance to halt this downward trajectory – to repair the damage that right-wing extremists are doing to our democratic institutions and secure a more progressive future by building our Democratic power at the county and local level. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = = The GOP is relying on building power at the local and county level this year to continue pushing their cruel and unpopular agenda, but we have a chance to turn the tide and elect Democratic leaders who will fight tooth and nail to defend our values against Republican extremism. Together, we can set the stage for Democratic victories down ballot across the state, but it’ll take massive grassroots support from committed Democrats. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = = Thank you for your generous support, Mark Guethle IDCCA President | | | | GET TEXT UPDATES FROM THE IDCCA! | | | | | | = = | | | | Contributions or gifts to the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association are not tax deductible. body:
Before we dive into the state of this race, I’d like to thank everyone for working so hard to get us to where we are today. I am deeply grateful for your commitment and the energy and passion you’ve poured into this pivotal campaign.

| \---------- Forwarded message ---------

FROM: Floyd, Campaign Chairman, Kari Lake for Senate
TO: dpwillis67@gmail.com
CC: Campaign Staff
RE: 2024 Polling Report (Internal)
---
| [ ](http://links.theusapatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=9e8f78ea93024d539241e061d463fe6f&_e=2h_JWiQY-T5W-4x4r8aqkq7qsVBX20042u-_wE3bM3r8EDYF95AG0mdReqPdH9DUQ2QeOasIg-qepFGMzeUNlm162q9gqMy6IekAwGvYrMe3tPj9fddXrbkVyOYS2Mm1WynMJxBZOISOodlSTJrpUiRWQOvi3TnVsjy-6O2GuiEb_QU7ExaSIEg5pQVvhtIkHQlXmwdr95qjmvWB9zamSkA4WPl34D7b0B7ed1Hz0uqFU5l6_A0bdbU3FT951DbAaH6nPvEOXIh9cz0qfL9n73iZjdIsw-8eUDkaPyZLyQ_2bn6RGRdK6ta0xGQ_IiDG02BFg_vNXJDXRyX5kz0zhVoJk8yPo2_KhxRpsMy4olqh1HInokRYlYOWG8Nm7vjO8wFCqtP5-LPv1W7ZNFKnM13ywpFTk47GGU3inW5sqsA%3D)
---
**CONFIDENTIAL** Team,

Before we dive into the state of this race, I’d like to thank everyone for working so hard to get us to where we are today. I am deeply grateful for your commitment and the energy and passion you’ve poured into this pivotal campaign.

Now, down to business. This race is heating up and all eyes will be on us to determine who controls the Senate. So we’re all on the same page: we cannot afford a single misstep or shortfall.

As you are about to see in the polling toplines below, Kari has maintained the slight early lead – this is a big deal because we knew things would get tighter when Sinema dropped out of the race.

[](http://links.theusapatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=9e8f78ea93024d539241e061d463fe6f&_e=2h_JWiQY-T5W-4x4r8aqkq7qsVBX20042u-_wE3bM3r8EDYF95AG0mdReqPdH9DUQ2QeOasIg-qepFGMzeUNlm162q9gqMy6IekAwGvYrMe3tPj9fddXrbkVyOYS2Mm1WynMJxBZOISOodlSTJrpUiRWQOvi3TnVsjy-6O2GuiEb_QU7ExaSIEg5pQVvhtIkHQlXmwdr95qjmvWB9zamSkA4WPl34D7b0B7ed1Hz0uqFU5l6_A0bdbU3FT951DbAAvTeJa3O2mF--z8ICu1qhuyqWhFGOXgzQ4zpgaO-IC2LB-g_P3_was7ASw3CGqBGjvmS3c2oSjMOEDZp-u2g23YI57O7t-lmPKiYqZJL05FG_-u8GaXACXZWYK2o_UoO0HryS2zTCr6QzrVpSQKdSwuY8T-crn0L1GeMAM3gzyA%3D)
This race is still well within the margin of error — you might look at this and think we’re in a good spot — but we still have less than seven months to go until Election Day.

Voter sentiment reflects just how FAR LEFT to the FAR LEFT Ruben Gallego truly is...

_These are the things we need to hammer home about Gallego:_

> Votes with **Joe Biden 100% of the time.**
> Votes with **The Squad 95% of the time.**
> Wants to **gut the filibuster** and allow Democrats to push their radical agenda down our throats.
> supports letting **illegal aliens vote.**
> stood with Joe Biden, **giving Iran billions** of taxpayer dollars so they could wage war in the Middle East

We’ve got two jobs in November, and they're both of equal importance.

#1 Making sure President Trump is re-elected as the next President of the United States of America.

#2 Getting Kari Lake into the U.S. Senate.

Kari is the perfect candidate to represent us in Washington, D.C. She’s the only mom in the race, and she’s consistently held strong to her convictions. She is willing to die for this state, and it’s up to us to make sure we fight equally as hard to secure VICTORY in November.

I’ve got one thing to ask you today — we’re falling behind our upcoming fundraising deadline. You might have seen this in one of my other emails, but this was the quarter-one fundraising breakdown >

[](http://links.theusapatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=9e8f78ea93024d539241e061d463fe6f&_e=2h_JWiQY-T5W-4x4r8aqkq7qsVBX20042u-_wE3bM3r8EDYF95AG0mdReqPdH9DUQ2QeOasIg-qepFGMzeUNlm162q9gqMy6IekAwGvYrMe3tPj9fddXrbkVyOYS2Mm1WynMJxBZOISOodlSTJrpUiRWQOvi3TnVsjy-6O2GuiEb_QU7ExaSIEg5pQVvhtIkHQlXmwdr95qjmvWB9zamSkA4WPl34D7b0B7ed1Hz0uqFU5l6_A0bdbU3FT951DbA5knq5_w5tEXuaIlJXBTL9th2ZMf3ju-kUW8mDHmjn7pRdd02rFkwvm3A-f_LCK19mdOzfYe5gOmvdSwTQf7UkXD83vwvViHc5Ot7Dy-SSeVW8OqZwT3wmzBnvx7MYrG3KROIKcTn_kH8btrbbeiTFKSR3cEkpGuLQN9e8p5wr4k%3D)
I’m setting an important deadline for this campaign. By 11.59 PM tonight, I’m asking you to donate $5, $10, $25, or anything you can spare and donate to [**THIS LINK**](http://links.theusapatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=9e8f78ea93024d539241e061d463fe6f&_e=2h_JWiQY-T5W-4x4r8aqkq7qsVBX20042u-_wE3bM3r8EDYF95AG0mdReqPdH9DUQ2QeOasIg-qepFGMzeUNlm162q9gqMy6IekAwGvYrMe3tPj9fddXrbkVyOYS2Mm1WynMJxBZOISOodlSTJrpUiRWQOvi3TnVsjy-6O2GuiEb_QU7ExaSIEg5pQVvhtIkHQlXmwdr95qjmvWB9zamSkA4WPl34D7b0B7ed1Hz0uqFU5l6_A0bdbU3FT951DbANJHkRMYzb5KKBztn5zJBpYj0V9CbQ9EmZbehM2vCQDPcDQhhLHRHrD9AMr4X5zZLBH964IkastTFw_xBSXUX9SRoK0UM2MJuTO3in0Z1enbGc1WdV9osgMDbbSO0kPu1oo0XAjdlEUw3NqtR8MSRgEJAMlUwQ_9QLh8DaSybYTM%3D) or by clicking one of the buttons below.

| [**DONATE NOW, BEFORE 11:59 PM** ](http://links.theusapatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=9e8f78ea93024d539241e061d463fe6f&_e=2h_JWiQY-T5W-4x4r8aqkq7qsVBX20042u-_wE3bM3r8EDYF95AG0mdReqPdH9DUQ2QeOasIg-qepFGMzeUNlm162q9gqMy6IekAwGvYrMe3tPj9fddXrbkVyOYS2Mm1WynMJxBZOISOodlSTJrpUiRWQOvi3TnVsjy-6O2GuiEb_QU7ExaSIEg5pQVvhtIkHQlXmwdr95qjmvWB9zamSkA4WPl34D7b0B7ed1Hz0uqFU5l6_A0bdbU3FT951DbAEeJhBYcXsv4rNHiw0w5m4B-n1xTY0S2eAhqH1G9y4JErNY-rkf9H9hWbfKuXbk3oXhM_JBxHo2Mlqr3JY2dPW4fn6h2MNKc7cEULQf4lXye0eYeYSF-KBolFN-WpVZflivBrvFsWffK7SGVUAURpX5FcU_EINHYIZ3Jk9sOX1cI%3D)
---

Arizona is the biggest MUST-WIN Senate race in 2024. Not only that, it’s also very doable. If we buckle up and give this fight everything we have, we will start the America First revival right here in Arizona.

I’m counting on all of you to do what needs to be done and help this campaign. Kari’s counting on ALL OF US to do EVERYTHING we can do to help her WIN in November.

clean_body: Before we dive into the state of this race, I’d like to thank everyone for working so hard to get us to where we are today. I am deeply grateful for your commitment and the energy and passion you’ve poured into this pivotal campaign. | \---------- Forwarded message --------- FROM: Floyd, Campaign Chairman, Kari Lake for Senate TO: dpwillis67@gmail.com CC: Campaign Staff RE: 2024 Polling Report (Internal) | CONFIDENTIAL Team, Before we dive into the state of this race, I’d like to thank everyone for working so hard to get us to where we are today. I am deeply grateful for your commitment and the energy and passion you’ve poured into this pivotal campaign. Now, down to business. This race is heating up and all eyes will be on us to determine who controls the Senate. So we’re all on the same page: we cannot afford a single misstep or shortfall. As you are about to see in the polling toplines below, Kari has maintained the slight early lead – this is a big deal because we knew things would get tighter when Sinema dropped out of the race. This race is still well within the margin of error — you might look at this and think we’re in a good spot — but we still have less than seven months to go until Election Day. Voter sentiment reflects just how FAR LEFT to the FAR LEFT Ruben Gallego truly is... These are the things we need to hammer home about Gallego: Votes with Joe Biden 100% of the time. Votes with The Squad 95% of the time. Wants to gut the filibuster and allow Democrats to push their radical agenda down our throats. supports letting illegal aliens vote. stood with Joe Biden, giving Iran billions of taxpayer dollars so they could wage war in the Middle East We’ve got two jobs in November, and they're both of equal importance. #1 Making sure President Trump is re-elected as the next President of the United States of America. #2 Getting Kari Lake into the U.S. Senate. Kari is the perfect candidate to represent us in Washington, D.C. She’s the only mom in the race, and she’s consistently held strong to her convictions. She is willing to die for this state, and it’s up to us to make sure we fight equally as hard to secure VICTORY in November. I’ve got one thing to ask you today — we’re falling behind our upcoming fundraising deadline. You might have seen this in one of my other emails, but this was the quarter-one fundraising breakdown > I’m setting an important deadline for this campaign. By 11.59 PM tonight, I’m asking you to donate $5, $10, $25, or anything you can spare and donate to or by clicking one of the buttons below. | Arizona is the biggest MUST-WIN Senate race in 2024. Not only that, it’s also very doable. If we buckle up and give this fight everything we have, we will start the America First revival right here in Arizona. I’m counting on all of you to do what needs to be done and help this campaign. Kari’s counting on ALL OF US to do EVERYTHING we can do to help her WIN in November. Best, Floyd Campaign Chairman for Kari Lake Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate If you'd like to donate by mail, .

name: Rob Bresnahan Jr.
subject: Keep This Confidential Between Us, Friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB FOR PA
body:
Don’t open this if you can’t keep a secret |
---
Fellow American,

**I’m glad that you opened this email, but this needs to be kept a secret between us.**

**I’m behind my next major fundraising goal and the deadline is TONIGHT, even though President Trump just endorsed me. This is not good. How did we get to this point?**

**FIRST:** I launched my campaign to flip PA-08 red and fire Matt Cartwright, who is backed by Joe Biden. Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left Woke Money Machine. I want to empower my community and stand up for the little guy, and that means standing up to career politicians like Matt Cartwright, who has lied countless times to Americans and sided with Nancy Pelosi 100 percent of the time in Congress. Cartwright snuck by with victories in 2016 and 2020 despite President Trump winning in PA-08 both times.

**THEN:** President Trump endorsed me, noting the difference between my opponent and me, “Rob worked hard to Create Jobs and Grow the Economy, unlike his opponent, Matt Cartwright, who is completely beholden to Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left.” Speaker Johnson, Steve Scalise, Elise Stefanik, Tom Emmer, and countless others also endorsed me.

**NOW:** [**I’m asking you to endorse me and to chip in a donation of whatever you can afford.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=32835ca732b74926a3c9f43d164a77cd&_e=mVFLjfCs_FlaIqkJSgS0TaIk5f2X0-SkQq-TikwVsHwGsys747s-hb_RoHDHGj3BFvhL1y8t8CLKr7Mf0fJnL0-KRaBRY6Z246f11edY7lciaoXeslPTcku8mrSomVCx4D32h6c0Ypdi9wjvKunD_TV3zKmKsU6yNYycz9AXkngbWU9MAkMi50ymjaFM_pLoW79JiAr5WoArLRihF50XcRmjIbete4Vvyfv43sk32JSHNxtI68BFDfghOve4orpZx7woMahzkpxPboIqlpErjcBnfvnnnDzuPnVfb-ZEOSE9oR2tWZvbrxYfwEuz7ciR0Po5LiDCUBMNLlzB_CwdslQ2CFm_E-MW9GogkR9aErTjj2TKBY8CgQq-Aw34MWh_uSsMxUBTjP8mdMNrtr-jGFFyCs9si52pqmnm3J6Be04%3D) It may not seem like much, but having a strong flow of grassroots donors and supporters will help me finally unseat Cartwright, expand our House Majority, and give President Trump one more much-needed ally in Congress when we win on November 5. This is only achievable if we meet our fundraising goals, and it starts with my next major deadline. Help me catch up.

**President Trump endorsed me because he knows I’ll fight hard to Secure the Border, Cut Wasteful Spending, Strengthen our Military, Support our Veterans, Protect our Second Amendment, and Hold Joe Biden and his Thugs accountable for their Unconstitutional Lawfare, Corruption, and Election Interference.**

If you care about any or all of those issues, then you should care about supporting my campaign, even if you’re not within the PA-08 boundary lines. This race is about more than just Northeastern PA; it’s about the future of our country.

name: Team Mazie
subject: It’s just common sense, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
| It's just common sense, Peter: **Voting should be easy and accessible for every American. After all, the right to vote is not a privilege, it’s a _right!_**
---
But for many Americans, that’s simply not the case. Nearly 10% of Americans say they can’t vote even if they want to, because they can’t afford to take time off from work to do so. It’s ridiculous and unfair. It’s bad for our democracy. **But thankfully, Mazie is taking action!**
---
Mazie recently introduced the _Time Off to Vote Act_ — legislation that would guarantee every American worker the paid leave they need to exercise their sacred right to vote and participate in our democracy. Because **no one** should have to choose between their paycheck and their ballot. _No one._
---

_\- WKBN, 5/1/24_ Team, In November, Ohioans overwhelmingly voted to enshrine reproductive rights in the state constitution. But if Republicans have their way, that could come to an end. Three critical Supreme Court races on the ballot this year could decide the future of reproductive rights. We already know what the Republican Party wants to do, because they’ve done it, repeatedly: from passing a ban on abortion at six weeks which Governor Mike DeWine signed, to Attorney General Dave Yost appealing to enforce it even after Issue 1 passed in November, the GOP has proven they’ll stop at nothing to restrict reproductive healthcare. ********[We _must_ elect judges to the Ohio Supreme Court who will protect reproductive freedom. Please, chip in to our Judicial Fund if you’re standing with us in support of keeping politicians out of personal medical decisions.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84333807/471188378/-33275699?refcode=odp_em_240503_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDE0MGY3YS01NDBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v_D2n7k3cSsLmgkJwEG8eiry1aL_wnKlJ43AVsvAmPU=)******** Since the U.S. Supreme Court overturned _Roe_ , Ohio hasn’t been the only state where Republicans have pushed to restrict reproductive healthcare – or the only state where voters have stood up and fought back. We did exactly that last year. Now we have to do it again. By electing Melody Stewart, Michael Donnelly, and Lisa Forbes this November, we can put a stop to Republican attempts to overturn Issue 1 and to jeopardize reproductive freedom in Ohio. ********[Help elect a majority to the Ohio Supreme Court who will protect our rights: Chip in to our Judicial Fund now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84333808/471188379/-33275699?refcode=odp_em_240503_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDE0MGY3YS01NDBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v_D2n7k3cSsLmgkJwEG8eiry1aL_wnKlJ43AVsvAmPU=)******** Thank you, Ohio Democrats | ******Ohio is the only state in the country that can flip its Supreme Court this year. Can Ohio Democrats count on you to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to help fuel our fight to Build the Bench and flip the Court? → ****** | ************[********](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84333809/471188380/-33275699?refcode=odp_em_240503_1&amount=5;email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDE0MGY3YS01NDBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v_D2n7k3cSsLmgkJwEG8eiry1aL_wnKlJ43AVsvAmPU=)****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84333810/471188381/-33275699?refcode=odp_em_240503_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDE0MGY3YS01NDBhLWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v_D2n7k3cSsLmgkJwEG8eiry1aL_wnKlJ43AVsvAmPU=) ****************

TO: Rep. Jamie Raskin
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: You’re a hero! **_To Rep. Jamie Raskin — thank you for being one of the top defenders of our democracy!_**

We owe _so much_ of our Democratic success this year to you.

You were a crucial figure in averting the disastrous government shutdown (twice!). You called out the GOP for electing extremist Speaker Mike Johnson.

**And now, you’re fighting tooth and nail to save President Biden from a baseless impeachment — even in the face of vile MAGA attacks.**

[**I know Republicans are using every dirty trick in the book to SILENCE you — So today, I’m fighting back and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to elect more amazing Democrats like you who will flip the House and save our democracy! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/67005?t=9&akid=14091%2E878179%2E8N2Cr3) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/67005?t=10&akid=14091%2E878179%2E8N2Cr3)

subject: Peter, this is what our records are showing for you this week:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
| | |

body:
Facebook is preventing users from posting and viewing a short film about RFK Jr.’s life.

|

| | | [Fight Facebook's Censorship – We Need Your Help!](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=mJdrkLFvShKUmZcHEQvL3-b0NXHJmlxyYy7sW3Kb_NT9DkcwEV2Q3O_3bkitMumFVROdcQ4nH982jNTTdD57Rj70NSEJjtyStM-9AAE7W3n-_4vRmKeDYDtDQcP82065hGPux0FOSLRGcA2lflPAUQ4tOjLE8K7lpU28CY65Kwo&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=facebook_suppression_5_4_24_f1&n=1)

[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=facebook_suppression_5_4_24_f1&n=2)

Dear Peter,
**We're confronting a blatant attack on free speech.**
Facebook is preventing users from posting and viewing a short film about RFK Jr.’s life, [narrated by Woody Harrelson](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=R1Auh2OBmL9W8Oh0l4YEAaArz2Cl5Ccs9w0dkvmjkGY9K9bFvCCxgOY0NzvfDsiHOlbBZWP1p3mIAzxQ_OgQW5WkSNp8F7lNizpe2qHimCik3IljVqhrChI4LcUPvw-mzxv90w-J7tSBcDuATSYjTQ&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=facebook_suppression_5_4_24_f1&n=3). This raises serious concerns about free speech and election integrity.
The messages that users are getting are laughable. “Looks like spam.” “Violates community standards.” “Might be malicious.” “File failed to upload.” The excuses are diverse but the pattern is clear: _interference in a Presidential election_.
Here’s how you can help break through the censorship:
1. name: Dan Bishop
subject: Allow me to introduce myself, Fellow American
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bishop for NC
body:
In case you don’t know this about me already

| [ ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=6cefe49d86c8498bb6252e8cd87c8781&_e=43PCgcuVSA2jLZLCmfAgTYKqpPfNENCOaCtKfSTwcjJWc9JBzN2YtVCGlthCCYD4yS4cuN7zZ_eV8-8spoSfiFG6nF-aE2L_QmRw2QY-bC1wMGMWOf2IT-CrnzqN-vVkHP0ZLml3BVREAW-pKIpwlYHZB_ee9dTKm2tGy7swkW8AgZ3oHbmTuj7ald1a2Men3hqmEDi2F2UcOhL-7H0vgHzM5b3wPY1Z7gpyP29SxYGWTGK3mrtgSo1Cxxm3EfdNIregGDrgJGZSQkIhwzAEXEZDu2RoAiZhl0GFpbmQhoTIZ6r7bik-YsEwy6DNBXTxqyoJSpOeRpVmBQ2Lm19H_x7oYK6s1dlunyDx5QZHCjZvLZeucx8ALsh6CIo03AeffaNQg-vy_TDX7NVqBU7dCw%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

You may already know who I am from my time in Congress serving North Carolina’s 8th District. Or you may be coming across me for the first time. Either way, I’m glad to be reaching out to you, and I think this could be the beginning of a great relationship. My name is Dan Bishop, and I’m running for Attorney General for North Carolina with the intention of bringing Law and Order back to the Tar Heel State.

**[This email is a bit longer and I hope you’ll read through it. I’m going to ask you for a donation to my campaign at the end of this email, but let me explain why it’s so crucial you join my team first.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=6cefe49d86c8498bb6252e8cd87c8781&_e=43PCgcuVSA2jLZLCmfAgTYKqpPfNENCOaCtKfSTwcjJWc9JBzN2YtVCGlthCCYD4yS4cuN7zZ_eV8-8spoSfiFG6nF-aE2L_QmRw2QY-bC1wMGMWOf2IT-CrnzqN-vVkHP0ZLml3BVREAW-pKIpwlYHZB_ee9dTKm2tGy7swkW8AgZ3oHbmTuj7ald1a2Men3hqmEDi2F2UcOhL-7H0vgHfwpOrHCtWZGBZvXzvXZCKvWr4-Qo-Hk6qB_s9ZyMXJoUAnWy_p7cua4f6vTfa8xDlyhtVcVyaaUxTYCIkIjPH0PGNCD1jMmeDFhe8WQ2F8vMtdJC48vdA4aDsMgzUGei0y3-jAs5D7hKaTGyksngpwjTmF8VHvqxZJLh3iN912wHyhBDHG_AMe3zupdQq0Sw%3D%3D)**

[](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=6cefe49d86c8498bb6252e8cd87c8781&_e=43PCgcuVSA2jLZLCmfAgTYKqpPfNENCOaCtKfSTwcjJWc9JBzN2YtVCGlthCCYD4yS4cuN7zZ_eV8-8spoSfiFG6nF-aE2L_QmRw2QY-bC1wMGMWOf2IT-CrnzqN-vVkHP0ZLml3BVREAW-pKIpwlYHZB_ee9dTKm2tGy7swkW8AgZ3oHbmTuj7ald1a2Men3hqmEDi2F2UcOhL-7H0vgHfwpOrHCtWZGBZvXzvXZCKvWr4-Qo-Hk6qB_s9ZyMXJg4jJwCKrmbpl6YuEuzW0eO8F4sNlI2Nf_f_l_dP3F3TyQGtaWWFzV1GD1R_xF4BteDVQRJvBr0RSJjPr_aUtYyVXpGlcYDVsLuWIpiQcSlEHv2JCHiQQrC-Zfqaafm4bYRRDft3PfxyNcY2-LNfphg%3D%3D)
I was born and raised with my four siblings in North Carolina by my parents, Kaytee and Bud. They didn’t come from much, but they pushed me towards an education and instilled a hard work ethic. With a passion for law and justice, I earned my JD at UNC Chapel Hill. I then went on to marry my wife of 25 years (and going), Jo; we raised our son, Jack, who’s currently following in his dad’s footsteps as he’s working to attain his law degree.

As a lawyer, I’m very proud of my track record. I was a commercial litigator for nearly three decades, where I was voted 10 times to Business NC’s “Legal Elite” and was selected 7 times by “Super Lawyers.” I was tenacious as a litigator and handled complex cases. But, I finally felt that it was time to help a broader scope of North Carolinians and decided to run for Congress.

In Congress, I’ve been one of the toughest and most outspoken conservatives, challenging the radical left and holding my fellow Republicans accountable. As a member of the judiciary committee and the subcommittee on the weaponization of the federal government, I fought the Biden administration’s dangerous policies and exposed the federal government’s abuses against the Trump presidency.

Now, I’m running for Attorney General to defend the rule of law and protect North Carolina. I believe Democrats like Roy Cooper and Josh Stein have abused the state’s top law enforcement office by turning it into a stepping stone for higher office and a platform to spread liberal propaganda. I’m putting my foot down, demanding respect for the office of Attorney General, and bringing Law and Order back to our great state.

**All that to say, I have a track record of fighting the good fight. And I hope you’ll join my team. The good fight is not free; running a campaign gets expensive, having to reach voters across the state, taking care of campaign staffers with food and gas, and running ads on TV.** **[That’s why I’m humbly asking you for a donation of whatever you can afford.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=6cefe49d86c8498bb6252e8cd87c8781&_e=43PCgcuVSA2jLZLCmfAgTYKqpPfNENCOaCtKfSTwcjJWc9JBzN2YtVCGlthCCYD4yS4cuN7zZ_eV8-8spoSfiFG6nF-aE2L_QmRw2QY-bC1wMGMWOf2IT-CrnzqN-vVkHP0ZLml3BVREAW-pKIpwlYHZB_ee9dTKm2tGy7swkW8AgZ3oHbmTuj7ald1a2Men3hqmEDi2F2UcOhL-7H0vgHfwpOrHCtWZGBZvXzvXZCKvWr4-Qo-Hk6qB_s9ZyMXJ1C4Pu6iE1bSaeQtkv54azWLZCf8TmWCuiMJ130XBKswLrdUeg_sSzJopkGrPWPUguGuNY_M6gqQOro_HN5qvT-siWaM9_d0x1V2NqIltVJqL3eRTZB6i39Qba4zXT00YWdIeV4gBCtyE1CH_kjmOKw%3D%3D)**

If you’ve gotten this far, I want to personally thank you for reading this email. Maybe it means you’ve been a supporter for quite some time. Or maybe it means you’re intrigued by my story and also believe in Law and Order over Chaos and Disorder. **[Either way, can you send my campaign just $1 or more to help me out?](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=6cefe49d86c8498bb6252e8cd87c8781&_e=43PCgcuVSA2jLZLCmfAgTYKqpPfNENCOaCtKfSTwcjJWc9JBzN2YtVCGlthCCYD4yS4cuN7zZ_eV8-8spoSfiFG6nF-aE2L_QmRw2QY-bC1wMGMWOf2IT-CrnzqN-vVkHP0ZLml3BVREAW-pKIpwlYHZB_ee9dTKm2tGy7swkW8AgZ3oHbmTuj7ald1a2Men3hqmEDi2F2UcOhL-7H0vgHfwpOrHCtWZGBZvXzvXZCKvWr4-Qo-Hk6qB_s9ZyMXJsNKXi7Xu0dsuH36jD1AeaVYeZIWihJK8LNZLCWRMDEIdp7mAxnm8gxmorkD7s2xofSkzU4umB72WN9Vz-ZN_4z_0FqT5GbN6z3I-HJsURrLX7TAgia5EffFLWnuZIVZvmf554eQH6LmKlAeYUHt41A%3D%3D)**

Thank you,

[](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=6cefe49d86c8498bb6252e8cd87c8781&_e=43PCgcuVSA2jLZLCmfAgTYKqpPfNENCOaCtKfSTwcjJWc9JBzN2YtVCGlthCCYD4yS4cuN7zZ_eV8-8spoSfiFG6nF-aE2L_QmRw2QY-bC1wMGMWOf2IT-CrnzqN-vVkHP0ZLml3BVREAW-pKIpwlYHZB_ee9dTKm2tGy7swkW8AgZ3oHbmTuj7ald1a2Men3hqmEDi2F2UcOhL-7H0vgHfwpOrHCtWZGBZvXzvXZCKvWr4-Qo-Hk6qB_s9ZyMXJ0L-f8v-sFCEzRaRIJLXQ1lM5ydyy_jZ0rRspk16qY8McFFj9Ts5b9Nr8q1D8Hfpi-NLmnigJmwxxk1rBTU3hLB2YOPEoeWHCMhdnfiyIoABWucTEOWw8eqQaEFf45qZha8ZReMC_dR1mUmVlYOXVFA%3D%3D)
Dan Bishop
| [ **DONATE TODAY** ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=6cefe49d86c8498bb6252e8cd87c8781&_e=43PCgcuVSA2jLZLCmfAgTYKqpPfNENCOaCtKfSTwcjJWc9JBzN2YtVCGlthCCYD4yS4cuN7zZ_eV8-8spoSfiFG6nF-aE2L_QmRw2QY-bC1wMGMWOf2IT-CrnzqN-vVkHP0ZLml3BVREAW-pKIpwlYHZB_ee9dTKm2tGy7swkW8AgZ3oHbmTuj7ald1a2Men3hqmEDi2F2UcOhL-7H0vgHfwpOrHCtWZGBZvXzvXZCKvWr4-Qo-Hk6qB_s9ZyMXJg2qN66WA4q-pVYD3wpfs9PGhHDnKuLMGsfaDQZCSzlAGruvCTnS4LNmRPVMZ3cAIg1yGz9SxVz6abDKnmj0kzwSYPIvAw6LniPZRzVuY_ZcnHELyeXC51qNLkLf1B9lgDtU9ofGXZnbtyV5xRiKJ9w%3D%3D)

Paid for by Bishop for NC
---

PO Box 1285
Waxhaw, NC 28173

This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Don't want to receive our emails anymore? Friend,

This is Dalia Al-Aqidi. I’m running for Minnesotas’s 5th Congressional District against Ilhan Omar, and I’m here to tell you it’s time to eliminate the “squad” once and for all.

America needs to wake up. The radical left “squad” is gaining traction in the House of Representatives. Initially composed of four women, including Ilhan Omar, they have since added new members in hopes of increasing their influence on the Democratic Party and Congress as a whole.

For several years now, this group has infiltrated Washington with anti-American, Marxist, communist, anti-Semitic, and pro-Hamas rhetoric. They do not care about the interests of their constituents and want to fundamentally change our country for the worse!

It is critical we shut this down in November.

I am offering you an exclusive opportunity...

I’m running for Minnesotas’s 5th Congressional District against Ilhan Omar, and I’m here to tell you it’s time to eliminate the “squad” once and for all. America needs to wake up. The radical left “squad” is gaining traction in the House of Representatives. Initially composed of four women, including Ilhan Omar, they have since added new members in hopes of increasing their influence on the Democratic Party and Congress as a whole. For several years now, this group has infiltrated Washington with anti-American, Marxist, communist, anti-Semitic, and pro-Hamas rhetoric. They do not care about the interests of their constituents and want to fundamentally change our country for the worse! It is critical we shut this down in November. I am offering you an exclusive opportunity... **400% MATCH ON ALL DONATIONS UNTILMIDNIGHT HELP DALIA STOP THE SQUAD** | Thank you! Dalia Al-Aqidi Candidate for Minnesota's 5th Congressional District Paid for by Dalia for Congress.

# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2887%2E552475%2EbXov5Y)
Peter, fun fact: did you know that Pennsylvania is called the Keystone State because of its essential role in the founding of the United States?
I’m one of our Commonwealth’s number one fans, so there’s a lot more where that came from.
Before I share, my Finance Director, Taylor, said that I can’t use this email to only recite facts about Pennsylvania, no matter how much I might want to. I should also ask folks to chip in to help me continue representing the place I’ve always called home.
[**Peter, will you chip in now to help me continue fighting for my fellow Pennsylvanians in the U.S. Senate?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240504-2?refcode=em20240504-2&recurring=1&refcode2=2887_552475_bXov5Y&akid=2887%2E552475%2EbXov5Y)
With that out of the way, are you ready for some more facts?
Did you know that the first daily newspaper in America was published in Pennsylvania on September 21, 1784 -- called the Pennsylvania Packet?
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240504-2?refcode=em20240504-2&recurring=1&refcode2=2887_552475_bXov5Y&akid=2887%2E552475%2EbXov5Y)
Or that our state tree is the Eastern hemlock, which our first settlers chopped down to build log cabins?
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240504-2?refcode=em20240504-2&recurring=1&refcode2=2887_552475_bXov5Y&akid=2887%2E552475%2EbXov5Y)
Here’s an interesting one. In 1943, for only one season, the Philadelphia Eagles and Pittsburgh Steelers merged to form one team: the Steagles.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240504-2?refcode=em20240504-2&recurring=1&refcode2=2887_552475_bXov5Y&akid=2887%2E552475%2EbXov5Y)
These are just a few of my favorite pieces of Pennsylvania trivia, Peter. I love the Commonwealth and its history -- it’s a big part of who I am.
[**Now I’m hoping you’ll chip in $10 or more to support our re-election fight. I’m Pennsylvania through and through, and I need your support to keep making progress for our Commonwealth.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240504-2?refcode=em20240504-2&recurring=1&refcode2=2887_552475_bXov5Y&akid=2887%2E552475%2EbXov5Y)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240504-2?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240504-2-el&refcode2=2887_552475_bXov5Y&akid=2887%2E552475%2EbXov5Y) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240504-2?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240504-2-el&refcode2=2887_552475_bXov5Y&akid=2887%2E552475%2EbXov5Y) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240504-2?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240504-2-el&refcode2=2887_552475_bXov5Y&akid=2887%2E552475%2EbXov5Y) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240504-2?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240504-2-el&refcode2=2887_552475_bXov5Y&akid=2887%2E552475%2EbXov5Y) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240504-2?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240504-2-el&refcode2=2887_552475_bXov5Y&akid=2887%2E552475%2EbXov5Y) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240504-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240504-2&refcode2=2887_552475_bXov5Y&akid=2887%2E552475%2EbXov5Y)
---
Thank you for your support, Peter.
With gratitude,
Bob

* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2887%2E552475%2EbXov5Y)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

# Videos and Radio Ads Are Up - Funding Is Needed to Finish this Race With the Win.
Dear ,

Please watch and listen to my latest Videos and Radio ads running across the Sixth District on social media and radio stations.

BUT I'M ABOUT $5000 SHORT IN PAYING FOR THESE ADS TO RUN. In order to pay for the last two weeks of this Primary Race on digital, TV and radio, my Treasurer just informed me we are IN THE RED - SHORT OUR MEDIA PAYMENTS in the amount of $4,311.73 as of today.

We recently received a $5000 donation which we need to be matched to reach this media goal.

That is ONE contribution from a Liberty Donor in the amount of $4311.73, or $431.17 each from 10 donors, or $862.20 each from five donors. Or any amount will help!

Our future is genuinely in the balance. Thank you!

Freedom and Victory,

body:
| [ ](http://links.newspatriot.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a2acf32e97a04632b294741ec8e302f2&_e=1xyCgynPOjIZk0XN3jSRj9V4cMl7NnUa8yqx64vSHXbT7_IFSOVzfqt2ELZLFzMj1AIntRS1yxAi-pJY6ZreJaJO4WjltU8VXPei6e-nKGEFT7S3A0ika5jW8i9qg4L1qD0RfrRM_CHK_TakhL1dtVhA4ekji4YuJooj6JwopZVKP59cGjXiofC2HORzqij22FeS2sIr5nrGkaHj02wM-zKFROD_bfBjPiBir2t83ryO8OH2Bs0BLVr1haPdhMTcJ2nZedXG-erFDdeno7bYeAwc4LE_ZxR5Yc65U7-9lRXwfEyXeGmrOGQCbd0ZVL7OeXkhOMwpSwHKojcmdtWQ7DKB8P-BY6r8BV932pLD63AC5rIT2O8IgmLyonhe5H8zMRMDRafzkSRBlXMeJkH7c-2Ulph55EgEb6FMCaQaWltm-s7fAqFps89n4IvUlk7R)
---
Fellow American,

It's Kari Lake, and I have a personal invitation for you. As 2024 gets underway, I want to hear your thoughts on how to take back our country from the Radical Left.

2024 is going to be special. It's the year this country will be saved from the brink of destruction, and we will remember the next few months for the rest of our lives.

It's never been more important to know what YOU think. I want you to complete my 2024 Priorities Survey.

I need input from 5 more solid conservatives in your area before 11:59pm tonight.

clean_body: Now that the primary election is behind us and our general election matchup is set, we wanted to touch base with you to ensure that we're focusing on the issues that matter most to our invaluable grassroots team. | Peter, Now that the primary election is behind us and our general election matchup is set, we wanted to touch base with you to ensure that we're focusing on the issues that matter most to our invaluable grassroots team. From expanding access to affordable health care to strengthening our economy, Matt is working every day to pass legislation to help the hardworking families in PA-08. That's why Matt wants to take a moment to check in with his supporters about the issues on the top of their minds. Your responses will help us understand what matters most to you and your community as we move forward in this critical election season. Your voice matters, and we want to make sure it's heard loud and clear. | Thank you, Team Cartwright In 2022, Matt Cartwright was one of only 5 Democrats to win a House race in a district that Donald Trump carried in 2020. He's gearing up for another tough re-election, and he needs your support to keep PA-08 blue. name: John Lee
subject: National Small Business Week.
body:
Keeping the American Dream Alive | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2bf2592252c6/john-lee-mayor-who-rescued-north-las-vegas-announces-for-congress-12695104?e=91a702298f)
---
[](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=bce495d534&e=91a702298f)
|
---
Friend,

This week is very special to me, because as a former small businesses owner, I know exactly the kind of strength and determination you need to create something from scratch.

Growing up, I was raised about how hard work and grit will not only get you far in life but allow you to achieve the American Dream; an ideal that states we all have equal opportunity to succeed and prosper in this great country. Nowadays, under the Democrat’s oppressive socialist agenda, that ideal is nothing more than just that; a dream.
Because of rising prices, high taxes, and overregulation, current business owners are struggling to make ends meet and provide for their families. The American Dream is getting farther and farther away from working Americans, but luckily we have this November to change our trajectory.

_**As a former small business owner**_ , I understand the burden of trying to provide for your family with taxes and regulations keeping you from thriving.

_**As the Mayor of North Las Vegas,**_ I know that the only way you can continue to drive the economy is to lower regulations, and help attract new businesses that generate new jobs for the community.

_**As Congressman**_ , I will work with leaders in Washington to drive down prices for our supply chain, stop new regulations that are in the way of business owners, and stop the wasteful spending that the American people are paying for.

We need to keep the American Dream alive, and we need to flip NV-04 this November. [**Will you make a contribution today and help us win this November?**](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=b034a28142&e=91a702298f)
[DONATE $5](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=125e86bb59&e=91a702298f)
[DONATE $10](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=909b1d56b7&e=91a702298f)
[DONATE $25](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=d9ebbc357c&e=91a702298f)
[DONATE $50](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=2e763f761b&e=91a702298f)
[DONATE $100](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=62e0f73906&e=91a702298f)
**Thank you for your support,**
_John Lee_
|

body:
I'm asking you for $3 today to help me replace him in the U.S. Senate.
#
Peter — Josh Hawley is the guy who made himself famous for raising his fist and then skittering out the back door at the Capitol on January 6th.
He wants you to pay $30 to read his weird book all about “Manhood.”
**Today, I’m asking you for just $3 to help us defeat him.**

# **FOX & Friends Features
Breakthrough Solar
Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans
Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jjFPwzAQRn_NZWtkf3FsZ_BQqFIBEgMbE3Jim5rGSuqkVP33KBEw3nunu2fTNMRwN6QeCDhFNxNA1Z6Ay_st5etXejnu3p4vx91FvqZ6tXgkYLlP_n_190rpk43DStWhcKYKjonCG6640LJiWhcnIzvV1XBBQ-jOysYGGSw4U50IIVhVRAMGwWomgJpDlFqKunOeM8Bbxz0Jtv0pbfI59pbPy83mPI6p7MdUDOa0LNO8hbWEVkxLPoOvjtD2Q-zPVLVL_o6OqgNHwxqC3LdPh3VkTU2QNoSP-dqtQFds9xdUZOOmWxyGOEtFgn1uGf2YfgIAAP__KLReuw) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jjFPwzAQRn_NZWtkf3FsZ_BQqFIBEgMbE3Jim5rGSuqkVP33KBEw3nunu2fTNMRwN6QeCDhFNxNA1Z6Ay_st5etXejnu3p4vx91FvqZ6tXgkYLlP_n_190rpk43DStWhcKYKjonCG6640LJiWhcnIzvV1XBBQ-jOysYGGSw4U50IIVhVRAMGwWomgJpDlFqKunOeM8Bbxz0Jtv0pbfI59pbPy83mPI6p7MdUDOa0LNO8hbWEVkxLPoOvjtD2Q-zPVLVL_o6OqgNHwxqC3LdPh3VkTU2QNoSP-dqtQFds9xdUZOOmWxyGOEtFgn1uGf2YfgIAAP__KLReuw) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts
Fear Imminent Threat To
Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** A former CIA Director warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government Is
Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer – spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most – and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jjFPwzAQRn_NZWtkf3FsZ_BQqFIBEgMbE3Jim5rGSuqkVP33KBEw3nunu2fTNMRwN6QeCDhFNxNA1Z6Ay_st5etXejnu3p4vx91FvqZ6tXgkYLlP_n_190rpk43DStWhcKYKjonCG6640LJiWhcnIzvV1XBBQ-jOysYGGSw4U50IIVhVRAMGwWomgJpDlFqKunOeM8Bbxz0Jtv0pbfI59pbPy83mPI6p7MdUDOa0LNO8hbWEVkxLPoOvjtD2Q-zPVLVL_o6OqgNHwxqC3LdPh3VkTU2QNoSP-dqtQFds9xdUZOOmWxyGOEtFgn1uGf2YfgIAAP__KLReuw). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000
Americans already have it
in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or – what's really cool – with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generator In Action!**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jjFPwzAQRn_NZWtkf3FsZ_BQqFIBEgMbE3Jim5rGSuqkVP33KBEw3nunu2fTNMRwN6QeCDhFNxNA1Z6Ay_st5etXejnu3p4vx91FvqZ6tXgkYLlP_n_190rpk43DStWhcKYKjonCG6640LJiWhcnIzvV1XBBQ-jOysYGGSw4U50IIVhVRAMGwWomgJpDlFqKunOeM8Bbxz0Jtv0pbfI59pbPy83mPI6p7MdUDOa0LNO8hbWEVkxLPoOvjtD2Q-zPVLVL_o6OqgNHwxqC3LdPh3VkTU2QNoSP-dqtQFds9xdUZOOmWxyGOEtFgn1uGf2YfgIAAP__KLReuw) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. **Customers Are
Raving About Their
Solar Generator** **Joe B.**
"My Patriot Power Generator arrived four days before Ian "the beast" hurricane hit my town. It was a lifesaver. After losing all power, we would have been in absolute darkness with no way to communicate to the outside world. If we needed aid or rescue, it would have been impossible with dead phone batteries. The Patriot Power Generator was everything you said it was and more. I say this with tears in my eyes: I'll never be without at least one. Great product, people! You should be proud!" **Bob A.**
"Could not be happier! Generator works flawlessly, solar works flawlessly, plus all the other goodies in the package are amazing! Would definitely recommend 4Patriots for all your generator and other survival needs! Just spoke with Sienna at customer service to say how much I love the products! Sienna was very courteous and professional!" **Carla U.**
"The ice storms in February left us without any type of electricity for a solid week. If it wasn't for the solar generator, my husband wouldn't have been able to sleep with his CPAP and we would have been in the dark for a week. It was very helpful and very convenient to be able to keep it charging continuously by day in the sun. It's well worth the money. Get off the fence and order this for the safety and security of your family!" **Bernice L.**
"Don't wait to add this vital piece of equipment to your preparedness arsenal! We were able to keep our lights on and our electronic equipment charged for 5 days when the power went out last year. As soon as we could, we purchased another generator!" **Patricia T.**
"This is great not just emergencies, but everyday help as well! I needed to repair my shed, but there's no power out there, and most of my tools are plug-in electric. I was unhappily thinking about running 150ft of extension cords, then remembered my 4Patriots Solar Generator! Worked like a charm. Utterly reliable and easy to use. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I’m used to being written off
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
|
---
I’m used to being written off, Peter.

When I first ran for Congress in Wisconsin in 1997, no one thought I could win — especially when an extremely popular challenger jumped into the race.

I remember huddling with one of my staffers at the time, and she said, “Well Tammy, maybe you want to rethink what you’re doing because it’s going to be tough.”

I looked her right in the eye and asked, “Do you think I should wait my turn?”

The next thing I said was this: I believe that women have to run — especially when it’s hard — and not wait our turn. We can’t wait until we get a tap on our shoulder or we’ll never get anywhere.

**I ended up winning that race and became the very first woman elected to the House of Representatives from Wisconsin. And it wouldn’t be the last time our team would make history.**

When I ran for U.S. Senate in 2012, an incredible team of grassroots supporters like you fought alongside me — even as some people wrote us off. You helped me become the first woman elected to the chamber from our state and the first openly gay Senator in our nation’s history.

In 2018, despite being a top target for national Republicans and enduring over a year of attacks, you stood with me again,_and we won._

Time and again, grassroots supporters like you have defied the odds. The battle to protect this seat this November will be no different, and it will require all of us working together to overcome the millions of dollars right-wing megadonors will spend to defeat us and flip the Senate majority over red.

[Together, I know we can defy the odds once again. So Peter, I’m humbly asking: Will you help us protect this seat and the Senate majority with it by splitting a donation today between my campaign in Wisconsin and Defeat Republicans? ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84336289/471197338/-1023080386?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240504_1_3&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNiZjA4NGFiLTY4MGEtZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Z53dWJ_ttsIbSnIZLqF-NXymSQIFIpjHKKgkPHoDq-w=)

Hello,
$3.
That’s the amount I am humbly asking you to chip in to my campaign today to help me win this critical House seat. Yes, just $3.

$3 because all the pundits say that this time, we absolutely _can_ win this seat.

My faith has _always_ been a core part of my values and my work in the Senate. I'm guided and motivated by the Jewish principle of "Tikkun Olam," which means to repair the world and leave it in a better place than how we found it.
It’s why I ran for office, becoming the first former synagogue president and third Jewish woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate. And it’s why I'm proudly fighting to bring positive change to communities in Nevada and across the country. **But right now, I need your help.**
National Republicans are doing everything in their power to flip my seat red: **Mitch McConnell handpicked my opponent to run against me, and he's being propped up by a shady GOP billionaire. Now, polling shows me 2 points down in a race that experts say could decide Senate control.**

I've got to say I was a little embarrassed when I gave an update to our generous donor that there were only 53 people who accepted his generous 1500% match.

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights.
